name: Emily Randall for Congress
subject: We ♥️ Ferries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
If you’re reading this, you might be one of the 20 MILLION passengers who took a Washington State Ferry last year. ⛴️

| If you’re reading this, you might be one of the 20 MILLION passengers who took a Washington State Ferry last year. ⛴️ Our ferries help us get to work, to medical appointments, see beautiful places, visit friends and family, and so much more – and ridership is growing fast. That’s why Emily teamed up with a Democrat from California and Republicans from Alaska and New York on the bipartisan **Federal Enhancement and Revitalization of Reliable Infrastructure for Essential Seaways (FERRIES) Act. ** The FERRIES Act would 1.) boost funding for ferry systems, 2.) help electrify our fleets, and 3.) invest in shipyard jobs to build the new generation of vessels. Fully funding and modernizing our ferry system means fewer mechanical problems, which means fewer delays, so you can get where you’re going on time. **Is that something you can get behind, Peter?_[Add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor and show your support for Emily’s FERRIES Act – and let’s get this bipartisan bill passed!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128789622/612363139/1530478533?contactdata=eRyCn/1749/9cepEmQE/2iXgAMBZnKTiKznk+iOclrsuqzzKkjwc+nQx9ZOLtjzBknrWgtYnMGbOcyZK91vnpxGwb3C9CZnxdzRxugq0KU1aXKfBftS8Om7qDKfPQuxJgB8E/lHTWl9zBKf7cIMO9o6vuf51dkmS8evK+8Py99I=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2026.04.04_FERRIESAct_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJhZjM0MC04MjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k2T6LzU8Y6s7rat9Fq5MlAoSknLnIj0BjP2tj3AcXc=&emci=cbed9c2e-6d21-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=78baf340-8230-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442)_** [⛴️ SUPPORT FERRIES ⛴️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128789623/612363140/-497855290?contactdata=eRyCn/1749/9cepEmQE/2iXgAMBZnKTiKznk+iOclrsuqzzKkjwc+nQx9ZOLtjzBknrWgtYnMGbOcyZK91vnpxGwb3C9CZnxdzRxugq0KU1aXKfBftS8Om7qDKfPQuxJgB8E/lHTWl9zBKf7cIMO9o6vuf51dkmS8evK+8Py99I=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2026.04.04_FERRIESAct_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJhZjM0MC04MjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k2T6LzU8Y6s7rat9Fq5MlAoSknLnIj0BjP2tj3AcXc=&emci=cbed9c2e-6d21-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=78baf340-8230-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442) We know there’s a lot going on in the world. clean_body: 🚨 THEY'RE HUNTING OUR BORDER AGENTS. THIS ENDS NOW. Patriot, let me tell you something that ought to make your blood boil. Not sneaking across. Not running from law enforcement. Hunting them. Drones. Military-grade rifles. Coordinated ambushes designed to kill Americans in uniform. And Jon Ossoff? Silent as a church mouse. Because Chuck Schumer told him to be. See, Schumer needs the border open. He needs the chaos. He needs the cartels moving freely so Democrats can keep counting bodies and calling it a "humanitarian crisis" instead of what it really is: An invasion. And Ossoff has voted with Schumer's open-border agenda every single time he had the chance to stop it. While American families bury loved ones lost to fentanyl, fentanyl that crossed that same border Ossoff REFUSES to secure, They live behind walls. They have private security. Their kids don't go to schools flooded with cartel poison. Yours might. I'm Mike Collins. I'm a Georgian, a businessman, and a fighter who believes if you won't defend this country's border, you've got no business sitting in the United States Senate. But right now, I need to hear from YOU. We're building a Rapid Response Poll from America First patriots across Georgia and this great country. I want to know exactly where you stand, because your voice shapes this fight. 👉 Thank you, Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=3&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj) Team, we're THRILLED!!!

Senator Amy Klobuchar just introduced a SWEEPING new bill that would automatically register all eligible U.S. citizens to vote [!!]

Donald Trump must be furious! We need 1,000 signatures TODAY on our MASSIVE petition to help pass the _Register America to Vote Act,_ SAVE our right to vote, and make Trump SCREAM!!

[**SIGN OUR PETITION NOW:
_Demand Congress pass the _Register America to Vote Act_ ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=4&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj) | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=5&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj)
---
This groundbreaking legislation would automatically register every eligible voter in every state and allow **_all Americans to hold Trump and his MAGA Republicans accountable during elections.**_

Our democracy works best when every voice is heard, and this Bill would remove barriers that keep millions from the ballot box.

**_But Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking it - because they know higher voter turnout means they will KEEP LOSING._**

So we're launching an urgent 24-hour petition to show MASSIVE grassroots support for Sen. Klobuchar's bill. [**_Sign our petition to help us reach 1,000 signatures in your state before midnight!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=6&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj)
[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=7&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj)
---
Republicans will fight this bill with everything they've got. _With Automatic Voter Registration, Republicans would never win an election again._

[**_Team, we need you to do the right thing. Sign our petition now to help DEMAND Congress pass Amy Klobuchar 's MASSIVE bill ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=8&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj)
[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73547?t=9&akid=24083%2E4449941%2E2tgSkj)
---
Counting on you,

_Fight For Reform_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23480%2E878179%2EtPf-u3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23480%2E878179%2EtPf-u3).**

name: TPUSA Faith
subject: The Greatest Love Story ✝️
body:
Spend this day remembering the most beautiful love story in history. The story of our God who sent His one and only Son to take the keys of death, hell, and the grave to fulfill all of the old and new testament prophecies.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX6PT_4jpYQTW6ThTFL8d7Tf7W4KxtYX5MvywwN15bQWY3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3mFW12LJ6T2C-FDCVXqsZ_6NM9czW6D75kz3Y-dlHVMmkd151dLDKW3k116J1FFFVcVGPS807R76LbW1cmbr73QZChYW4Lsl5M4Vkcx7VjPTBk6y9xS_W7Hlgv-14-zlWW3-9btF5xJd9gN26fYtDshMqYW82rMJG5HnXCQW1237k16dMH4_W327kDR6J1nV3W23Dt7W8cYHKZW1dzKhT11fMp2W6SzYRS3KF30yN1Sld8Gpml5mW1dylL426fGy5W3v09c-4fnPQtW7Rlwx81t2009f39N5XT04)
---
Dear Peter, Today we remember ". . . that Christ died for our sins in accordance with the Scriptures, that he was buried, that he was raised on the third day. . ." (1 Corinthians 15:3–4 ESV). In scripture, we read that He can do all things. He heals the sick, raises the dead, rewrites stories, and so much more. Though Jesus can conquer anything, God allowed Him to be beaten, bruised, and tortured because He so loved the world that He gave His only begotten son that whosoever believes in Him should not perish but have everlasting life (John 3:16).
---
---
He did all of this because He loves us and wants to do the same for us. He wants to heal YOU, rewrite YOUR story, and raise whatever feels dead in YOUR life. If you are ready to be raised back to life through Christ, we want to walk alongside you. If you need prayer, please let us know how we can be praying for you by filling out the prayer request form.
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX6PT_4jpYQTW6ThTFL8d7Tf7W4KxtYX5MvywwN15bQXx3m2nnW7Y8-PT6lZ3kyW5gXwtM2_mPSnVT0zH660ZcBKW8gT73d1fsyxhMmM4r1Ljrl6N7CYxPgdscY6N1gLQWZZFtn0W1fqJ7G9cvx96W5xVC6b3-4YPdW2txzn66HKpDkW8qJPcx2WnfTXW4ds2tP4WM2TmW9dfM2T1XQYr_W8dYbZs6S0Dx3W3CBnPY1dfQXfW4hQyrH750J-fW5Tmbq_5wKlm4W6fMJ6h3CJtjHW32wGTZ7-vcJWW3G-19V18b8D5W1prFXl8NGR3cW6fxlw-5CRplXW3jKQL44VY0XRW32ZwQf6-0PLDW63ZS8x2vRvYsW3YB1MC53Th6hW1rK9L65dNQWxf4dsNMd04)
---

Spend this day remembering the most beautiful love story in history. The story of our God who sent His one and only Son to take the keys of death, hell, and the grave to fulfill all of the old and new testament prophecies. Happy Resurrection Sunday!

body:
His incompetence and ego are endangering our troops
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Hegseth is a Dangerous, Unqualified Moron, and Must Be Replaced NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb772e3c3-0436-4a92-b66f-239c18394a8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T491f5850-a54f-49cb-98f7-afd82a3f4485/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(If you do not wish to receive emails, use the unsubscribe link below)_ Hegseth is a Dangerous, Unqualified Moron, and he Must Be Replaced as Secretary of Defense NOW. Every day he is charge of Defense, he puts our troops in danger:
* This is the moron who sent out battle plans via a[ public app](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefd2a3eb-3c3d-4add-a8b2-a1e2aa2d2e0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* He is systematically getting rid of the best [generals](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc012f21d-603e-462d-871a-ab29aa1c1c67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) because, well, because he is a moron
* He has nowhere near the experience or smarts to run a department this large and complex.
* He is acting like a complete [dick](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5e941d2-06b3-49cd-84e6-0c80e6eca22b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and putting our troops in danger.

And now he is doing all this in the middle of a war, and people are getting killed as a result. There are plenty of qualified people across the political spectrum. For the love of god, fire this idiot, and put one of those qualified people in the job instead. [**Please join our call: "Hegseth is a Dangerous, Unqualified Moron, and he Must Be Replaced as Secretary of Defense NOW"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3dd7d12-23fe-4120-a7a7-01f4a0747d5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Dan Steiner
subject: A simple way to prepare your heart for Easter
body:
Have you ever reached Easter Sunday feeling spiritually unprepared or wishing you had spent more time reflecting beforehand

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ap1uoujcp5d0m18q6v566uiplidcij7d4v6u50_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpge6o71cjh2bs)
---
Friend of Life, Have you ever reached Easter Sunday feeling spiritually unprepared or wishing you had spent more time reflecting beforehand? I know I have. Easter has a way of coming up fast. So before the services, before the plans with family, or the big dinner to follow, I wanted to share something my team created with you in mind. [**_He Is Risen: 12 Scriptures to Prepare Your Heart for Easter_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1233osmv47n8t5g8c7rhfku0cceddsqkhg9pke0_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpge6o71cjh2bs) is a free devotional designed for the days leading up to Easter. It’s meant to be simple, steady, and grounding as you prepare your heart. Here’s what you’ll find inside:
---
* One full Scripture passage each day
* A short reflection to help you process what you’re reading
* A prayer to help you pause and respond

---
If you’re looking for a way to engage with Easter more thoughtfully this year, I hope this devotional serves you well. You can download your free copy here: [https://resources.preborn.com/he-is-risen](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuk9qs7kitnnbq4qn0t80rcgjb8km2qvq7b82ot8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpge6o71cjh2bs) Wishing you a meaningful Easter season, Dan Steiner

---
The Senate Banking Committee will hold a nomination hearing on April 16 for Kevin Warsh to be the next chair of the Federal Reserve, a person familiar with the matter told CNBC. Warsh’s nomination is moving ahead even as a separate criminal probe into the Fed continues, setting up a potential clash between the two [...]...Click to read more

[](http://trk.libertyledger.__PX8AGFfXp9ED5A)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-dCXP76w)
# **[8 arguments that the Resurrection really happened](http://trk.libertyledger.-dCXP76w)**
---
If you had to summarize what Christians believe in as few words as possible, you could do worse than "He is risen."In fact, the resurrection is so central to the faith that believers and nonbelievers alike often lose sight of it. In arguing over what Jesus said and what he meant by it and whether or not his moral prescriptions make sense in our "enlightened" 21st century, it's easy to skip over the one simple, historical question at the heart of it all.Even ex-evangelists like Ehrman accept that Paul genuinely believed he had an encounter with the risen Jesus.Did the first-century Jewish leader known as Jesus of Nazareth, executed by Roman authorities in Judea circa A.D. 33, come back from the dead?If he didn't, Christianity is nothing more than a nice set of lessons and aphorisms.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-dCXP76w)

name: Breaking:
subject: Colorado redistricting in jeopardy after new ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RAUe0Zf1Xi7pdNV_MjY-bsrXG9ZHU0Q_VvJ-Py7Nkh6LvincmbPK61IwzyOOH8XRkYchzmXX4qNEILlouYfuUAJ_XjjlylVPUYU4tFh-XYZW5lAHZ68KEe_WNhDECDdi87d9EtUt4AVulyGVVYhN5UH0vnu8b2_HKO2wVQY7qze2wsQsjgOoGFTEVUYWioqEhgYwiCbWnohf7krq9s4VBamN9pHFWARj&c=_UMJ5g0-i7kHlE-lYWnNNdtVqdMUAi0n85C4HGGKALnih0UaQDSquQ==&ch=LpM2isizjktJrPT5bQXjKiN5q8bj5SxW63_LBJ7wbcqcN7A6W7MHNQ==)
---
Peter,
On Wednesday, our legal team stood in front of the Colorado title board and fought for our best shot at countering MAGA's election rigging scheme. The title board has final say over ballot measure language and the vote threshold required to pass.
Trump sent his own lawyer to personally argue against our ballot initiative.
The title board sided with Trump's lawyer, and shot down our best proposal.
The board left us two paths forward. Two separate initiatives, each needing a simple majority. Or one combined measure where we'd need to clear 55%. A threshold MAGA is banking on us never hitting.
Both paths are unacceptable.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RAUe0Zf1Xi7pdNV_MjY-bsrXG9ZHU0Q_VvJ-Py7Nkh6LvincmbPK61IwzyOOH8XRkYchzmXX4qNEILlouYfuUAJ_XjjlylVPUYU4tFh-XYZW5lAHZ68KEe_WNhDECDdi87d9EtUt4AVulyGVVYhN5UH0vnu8b2_HKO2wVQY7qze2wsQsjgOoGFTEVUYWioqEhgYwiCbWnoi9UoSEeWV6rzKxWzeXd7gl&c=_UMJ5g0-i7kHlE-lYWnNNdtVqdMUAi0n85C4HGGKALnih0UaQDSquQ==&ch=LpM2isizjktJrPT5bQXjKiN5q8bj5SxW63_LBJ7wbcqcN7A6W7MHNQ==)
---
That's why we will be challenging the board's decision at the Colorado Supreme Court.
That means we will be taking on Trump's lawyer again, this time in front of the Colorado Supreme Court.
MAGA is going all out to stop our initiative because they know what will happen when we win--their election rigging scheme will completely crumble and their desperate powergrab will fail.
This will be a costly legal battle and we need to get out lawyers everything they need to win in the Colorado Supreme Court. So we're asking you today:
[Peter, We've come too far to back down now. Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help get our lawyers every resource they need to battle Trump's lawyer in front of the Supreme Court?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RAUe0Zf1Xi7pdNV_MjY-bsrXG9ZHU0Q_VvJ-Py7Nkh6LvincmbPK61IwzyOOH8XRMN091hiCal4j0QPAn1EVTfLtbZ5hLdPTKrX94RjfLckNFKuV5PpcKoMrTgvLNktDL3kArBSeZZmonD85tRZY4PDK09EcEI0_MV1dUrCLcRznVw1be70G-ObUiI1MRYUcvEbqbbfSawyjdA7mLHF7r97OwDlksETxxRljWYU_ybg=&c=_UMJ5g0-i7kHlE-lYWnNNdtVqdMUAi0n85C4HGGKALnih0UaQDSquQ==&ch=LpM2isizjktJrPT5bQXjKiN5q8bj5SxW63_LBJ7wbcqcN7A6W7MHNQ==)
---

clean_body: | | | | | == Peter, On Wednesday, our legal team stood in front of the Colorado title board and fought for our best shot at countering MAGA's election rigging scheme. The title board has final say over ballot measure language and the vote threshold required to pass. Trump sent his own lawyer to personally argue against our ballot initiative. The title board sided with Trump's lawyer, and shot down our best proposal. The board left us two paths forward. Two separate initiatives, each needing a simple majority. Or one combined measure where we'd need to clear 55%. A threshold MAGA is banking on us never hitting. Both paths are unacceptable. | == That's why we will be challenging the board's decision at the Colorado Supreme Court. That means we will be taking on Trump's lawyer again, this time in front of the Colorado Supreme Court. MAGA is going all out to stop our initiative because they know what will happen when we win--their election rigging scheme will completely crumble and their desperate powergrab will fail. This will be a costly legal battle and we need to get out lawyers everything they need to win in the Colorado Supreme Court. So we're asking you today: == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Trump's lawyer flew to Colorado to stop us. Trump asserts that DHS will decide who can vote. State Supreme Courts are the firewall that can stop this power grab.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wlfZwuk7SqXbJOiCopzU2yiOUo64bgG32GuRxNVX_4w9YzEsD1b83rpL8zn3ZQmXJUf28-B2oBBSRjpX3pZHLS12k5Psi1jJL2KNW1m43pJ87HV_0UvoFVuI5ZiV3eVyrlzRAs-s4SZbudR25PNqiaWyeWtCWqDRe887KDhtVzXVpIE4CvYrGPORIQSXn14tnwn_1rjJbw6JLaV7xnWEd0yMJMk0xf6ZuE2L6XQU8hLP7NrXSns-HA==&c=SsLJg8c_vMYWEss1rGQxZxiAhdj00-K99er1lwmOxMGL0Sz3JF8ftA==&ch=1k_TjVfeMBh_VnX6sJBtmylsrCJfAypJaRjty69D3NiVIAjx9uXnDQ==)

|
Peter,
The other night, with the stroke of a Sharpie, Donald Trump crossed a line.
He put his administration on a direct collision course with American voters--and with state Supreme Courts across the country.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wlfZwuk7SqXbJOiCopzU2yiOUo64bgG32GuRxNVX_4w9YzEsD1b83rpL8zn3ZQmXJUf28-B2oBBSRjpX3pZHLS12k5Psi1jJL2KNW1m43pJ87HV_0UvoFVuI5ZiV3eVyrlzRAs-s4SZbudR25PNqiaWyeWtCWqDRe887KDhtVzXVpIE4CvYrGPORIQSXn14tnwn_1rjJbw6JLaV7xnWEd0yMJMk0xf6ZsP_Vh6ZOI4mHNAYYjTSDOA==&c=SsLJg8c_vMYWEss1rGQxZxiAhdj00-K99er1lwmOxMGL0Sz3JF8ftA==&ch=1k_TjVfeMBh_VnX6sJBtmylsrCJfAypJaRjty69D3NiVIAjx9uXnDQ==)

Trump is now claiming that his Department of Homeland Security, the same DHS tied to alarming abuses of power including the killing of two Americans, can decide:

* Who is a citizen

* Who gets to vote

* And who doesn't

That power does not belong to the President. It belongs to the states.
Which means this blatantly unconstitutional move is headed straight for the courts--and ultimately, state Supreme Courts will likely decide what happens.
We have been warning about this since 2025. We said Trump would try to rig the 2026 and 2028 elections by any means necessary.
Our warning has become reality.
Now the only thing standing between this power grab and our democracy is the firewall of state Supreme Courts.
And that firewall is being tested right now.
Last year, grassroots supporters like you helped us defend the Pennsylvania Supreme Court with an average donation of just $26. We proved what's possible. Now we have to do it again.
The Wisconsin Supreme Court election is just 2 days away.
On Tuesday, Wisconsin will decide whether that firewall holds in one of the most critical swing states in America. We can win this. But not without you:

subject: The White House responded
body:
Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill.

| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdpff5bar09domu7t7mijqd4ntrcn65mruf07gd8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpie2o36cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=aan&amount=25")
---
| Dear Patriot,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z60ehr85vnhoi3d19jau19lgjm7dahhl7tdjt83o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpie2o36cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=aan&amount=25") Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill. On the note was a name, an address, a date of birth. A real voter's identity. "Sign his name," the man said. "Just write what I tell you to write." **2.5 million people watched that video in the first 48 hours.** 82,000 liked it. 33,000 shared it. Eric Daugherty's post demanding "ARREST HIM NOW" hit 1.5 million views and 95,000 likes. Libs of TikTok's coverage: 846,000 views and 45,000 likes. The White House responded. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called our footage "astounding" and said the President is "working on an executive order to strengthen our elections." The DOJ issued a statement: they will "aggressively pursue anyone" involved in election fraud. Governor Newsom -- _Gavin Newsom_ -- said: "This alleged activity is a felony and should be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law." Los Angeles DA Nathan Hochman personally contacted us: "We have received your complaint and will open a file." **And then a detective from the Palm Beach County Sheriff 's Office showed up at my headquarters. Looking for me.** Not a single person from our videos has been arrested. But a law enforcement officer showed up at **my** door. **[▶ STAND WITH JAMES -- CHIP IN $35 TO KEEP US IN THE FIELD](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv718fedo199dhu3fj4r6aic45b0pp0qsmi4hip8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpie2o36cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=aan&amount=25")** Here's what I need you to understand: Everything you just read -- the footage, the White House response, the DA opening a file, the Governor forced to respond -- all of it happened because of what we built together over the past four months. This year, O'Keefe Media Group investigations have generated over **9.9 million views on a single post.** We've triggered a **$9 billion Treasury audit.** We got **$253 million in federal contracts suspended.** A Secret Service agent was suspended within hours of our report. An FBI security specialist confessed on hidden camera that major fraud cases are deliberately slow-walked so "everyone walks." **That 's not opinion journalism. That's results.** But I'm going to be straight with you -- results cost money. And right now, I need to fund my team's operations through the entire month of April. We need to raise **$92,430** to cover fieldwork, equipment, legal defense, and payroll for the journalists who made every one of those investigations possible. That's the real number. That's what it takes. $35 covers a background check on the voter identities being stolen in Los Angeles. $50 funds a day of undercover equipment. $100 covers a full day of field operations. $250 goes directly toward the legal defense fund protecting our journalists from the people who want us silenced. **[▶ CHIP IN $50 TO FUND APRIL OPERATIONS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qodkrbn5e0ddnsmpbi5anqmg2psmg6kkfgvn5o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpie2o36cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=aan&amount=25")** Bo Loudon, a supporter and political commentator, put it simply: "God bless James for uncovering this. These fraudsters NEED to be arrested." He's right. But arrests don't happen without evidence. Evidence doesn't happen without investigators. And investigators don't happen without you. We have four active investigations in the pipeline right now. Jonathan Choe, the journalist who broke the Los Angeles footage, is expanding into San Francisco's Tenderloin district. We're hiring new undercover operatives. The Citizen Justice League -- our network of trained citizen journalists -- is growing every week. But none of it moves forward without funding. Can I count on you for April? **[▶ YES -- RUSH $100 TO FUND APRIL INVESTIGATIONS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2pmbj67p0on003cvmo6hpqn4jlsv2qbqu6hjht8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpie2o36cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=aan&amount=25")** In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** 2.5 million people watched our footage. The White House responded. The DOJ promised action. The LA District Attorney opened a file. And a detective showed up at my door. All because of what your donations made possible. **Now I need $92,430 to fund April. Your $35, $50, or $100 today is the reason we can keep going when they try to make us stop.** **[Chip in now to fund April operations.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ocpat3qqbhkvuvv8cv5huv3k80j7no21bubmbo_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpie2o36cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=aan&amount=25")**

---

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: He is risen!
body:
On this joyous and holy Easter Sunday, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a truly blessed day.

| | | | | “He is not here: for he is risen, as he said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay.”
\- Matthew 28:6
Peter,
On this joyous and holy Easter Sunday, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a truly blessed day.
Today, we celebrate the Resurrection of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.
Let us rejoice in His ultimate sacrifice, honor His goodness, and spread His word across our great nation.
May your home be filled with peace and the light of His love today.
Happy Easter,
Marsha Blackburn

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Happy Easter, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I wanted to take a moment to send my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones.

| | | | | [](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDc1NDE2NzMsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjIwNjgtZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNjA5NS1kN2IwMTA2YTg4OGE0Mjk4YTdkY2MwZDY0OGNhM2E4MyIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2plbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS8_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNDA1X05MLTQ1LjExMDExN190MTg2MjkxNS0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDQwNV9OTC00NS4xMTAxMTdfdDE4NjI5MTUtMjA2OCJ9/8EZhFQtwjrGBtOC7XEi7mA)
---
Peter,
Today, as we celebrate the miracle of Easter, I wanted to take a moment to send my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones.
Easter is a sacred time to celebrate the promise of renewal, the power of hope, and the many blessings we share.
It is a day to rejoice in the promise of the Resurrection, and it serves as a beautiful reminder that even after the longest winter, spring always returns, bringing with it new beginnings and the opportunity to reflect on our many blessings.
I hope your heart is full and your day is bright.
From my family to yours, have a wonderful and blessed Easter Sunday!
\- Jen Kiggans

name: NEGOP
subject: Happy Easter from the NEGOP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party, 1610 N St
body:
HE IS RISEN!
| | |
---
| |
---
| Nebraskans,
Today, we celebrate the greatest victory ever won.
The resurrection of Jesus Christ is the foundation of our faith and the source of our hope. On this Easter Sunday, we are reminded that no darkness is permanent, no stone is immovable, and no grave is final.
As Nebraska Republicans, our values are rooted in faith, family, and the Nebraska we love. Easter is a powerful reminder of why those values matter and why we fight to protect them.
From our NEGOP family to yours, we wish you a blessed and joyful Easter. May your celebrations be filled with the love of Christ, the warmth of family, and the joy of this holy day.
He is risen. He is risen indeed.
Happy Easter!
-Nebraska Republican Party

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

My name is Porter Stansberry.

Recently, I made a very public bet.

I said that my friend and colleague Erez Kalir’s advisory, _Biotech Frontiers_ , was going to be one of the most lucrative in the history of our industry.

Not because he’s a former Tiger Cub. Not because he’s managed billions of dollars. And not because he’s one of the most gifted analysts that I’ve ever met.

But because he had [uncovered the greatest financial paradox of our generation](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtfZNSLBsVxZBfhRvlE_fQ6tcsw_aTBDOd6pH9iZT3wP0tyIsub-vOcYZAfXS25lzDzIO9vcmOdogNSbDxMLnWVqnBFsToa3yG-edHgYALsH3OLzn6hVEV4g0b0IXaeqNOTF-QAxABLbckOmt3nieaemXhpda_yM_UlygUs5HdLzgAoWbOgZcKmh8XnYHs2z5sDyQgtEdTJ60vQurBAQJtEdCo1xHjsathSCIzSiyTSQ-ykvqNkSP7xNSnLO5jYzbeV_RmbaGlnhh-fgd7MwlL6xR8dtvnfXF3BSBtyJZyjUH4sk4fKRibrbKGZUAfvfJyBTeu69kQcdjosZUsOw1K8zKQoo0Ii0WgXyaVOUFzJshJ-i13ssBku02bmWZMOE5JLcul-57x-YaLlxIkgSbzHeMdUzICZ9SqJgFJlA7yewf)... one that almost every other analyst was sleeping on... but could make those who know about it wildly wealthy.

You see, we were, and still are, in the midst of a truly unparalleled moment in biotech. We’re experiencing nothing short of a Cambrian explosion in the underlying science of biotechnology

Diseases that we thought were impossible to cure, treatments that sounded like science fiction a few years ago... they’re happening right now and they’re going to transform the world.

And from a financial perspective... they’re going to deliver _trillions_ of dollars to the companies on the frontier of this revolution.

And yet... the paradox is that at the same time all of this is happening... biotech stocks have suffered a historic collapse with prices crashing 70%, 80%, even 90% as investors abandoned the industry because of high interest rates.

Dozens of biotech companies with, quite literally, some of the most exciting IP ever developed are trading for LESS than the cash on their balance sheet.

It was this paradox...

And the fact _nobody_ else was seeing it...

Which is why I was willing to wager _Biotech Frontiers_ would be one of the most profitable advisories ever published. And for those who listened, the results have been remarkable.

_Biotech Frontiers_ has made more than seven recommendations that gained 100% or more during the past 18 months... and Erez has achieved this during the worst biotech bear market ever.

And, as you can imagine, the feedback from our subscribers has been incredible:
[ ](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtS90Ds_8WDByK3r7HbyMFsZgJ8Yk3uxsIoh8Y8yl8MHpTK-inJPZOhfCxK8I2FZCfrwpQ3-j7Nw6K9Qom8QVbnxzBBvO3WOwpUU0us_-nkfW1q-NVAYdx7XIXLihuIcqTA3XadBJ7Lf86vnjrv6NWRin7JHmLVc1qYRyTjjxoBMpjZl2O4DGCDhoXpGOxdNCmqYU30HlL404dabxx_jEnwn2xgNdn59QRZJkdo9Z1dYpwxZSbGxoE-wvQLcaMika-HfKwARN5v16B0biiwr6-ceq-8jC8Yd6T5Nfq0pmMjKPtdfJoPtBEL0Ef4SHp_acFMYGNw6DlUxRbnIoUJUsjrP83_wpW8T891FRKR4IXUacFP1vU-0fil2EgGxaVUoXH2Do7uMwJitg2srifBOMCGKuXnZUDPp1Hs-KrzVI_oDc)
But that’s not why I asked Erez to [sit down with me this time](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtSdc_Ay6GSnjkEtaC_BENlLf3hHy9rRbvNPFR5NYawSer9oD5w3JKX6ewIqRBi5kLayz5tkGPYiZ1QLnhm0xGoZ0T6v2_sP5vhiwY_PboQFY0K13EXT0_Tc4kI5zOQ19DEQkRmgYmURhxui6EK0fDzyYFvCrVdShGcHSKU1PEVG2d91Vmp-arsybBzCF6eHTM8Q20onAXO1tdFht1tBy2e4onCuu8GTDJRtpOrgOZkjTOT6Srceaom8LieZ6kimdaTWlJIaRo0wYwKNzBBSAqVW9d9Xy-7rLDKZFw49UP_dH9lTU8rlA7QMb2ZXCoOWe6XE758EHWce7_VSs7qXCnDb6-sqRa31gk40NZS6WN5F-e1NMfGcxovGVMz1VUTypi4OltmsYf6MM4cy_w71NqyGlTBPf2FZXgRaRk4LC1-lS).

We both dropped everything to host this broadcast because Erez has uncovered _another_ major financial paradox. One that we’re calling **“the most asymmetric opportunity of our careers.”**

And, ironically, it’s **not** in biotech.

It’s in an industry far bigger than biotech. [Almost 100-times bigger, in fact.](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtd-E0LuMCEh_24HoSVSdmct_7AlLL2WOR-JLv_ZcIjgunB6ths8l8C66pkS6IpxClaFaKqeEq_r_J9xtVF90rmFGh4SsjihAjsIXOiRsYanCK_j16VYiBWfOgAHcbOSD4I60fKAxH3yEXEeTzQBG08QLt_5CdAgPfWyntq-RJPbVEzulSgyOnCWdJB_Ye8nk0zL3gSoR__VjRKwAvpONKRAfRE9DVNmFEPnvw10U_pk93q3HUfcgSRAb2Y8GljHm5sCEHdz4zxgiGVcRzWsG9CeK2XCBMFSk97Ky4sW-gZ7U1mnFkOIgeAtTNTGLkJzxSMDRvrBotvFP6FCWUg6aAbzMfYG6ulDibJEDhnx6f1XhoMeCXJVmiQSFFl71AjlpWAP_PWq0bgcIGJ1cP6od4F_99MqTAgkbyXK9bpuSjl1E)

And although this has nothing to do with things like cancer treatments or editing the human genome, the impact it could have on society is no less dramatic.

We’re talking about a shift with the potential to send shockwaves through every corner of our economy: How we work, trade, travel, invest, and even plan for retirement... _everything_.

If you miss it, you risk being left behind as the very foundations of daily life shift beneath your feet.

And one company sits at the center of this change. An obscure, mundane, company that – on the surface – has _nothing_ to do with this looming societal shift.

[But it is actually the sleeping giant of the sector](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtZGu7BTJ333lAho5qkaVYCBI3RPwJ5oiUt0POQNZL2SO1Gc8uSt32qIlOhelsCNoG3bx5Iew7XCFGvsRuuVTHZ0ydpLs-cmkymbQE7afd8JdfL6Ibn-UFybhKfUwHTo_b_N4padX3BzFDzR-QOrfpVZWVMnwB-ysvgbh6AWRyaubXFZ3lNflTUMO7Vkm3pJTMu2xBKhh2_z3lKWg6vso6mGLVLBM-i8AIzLHvSgSzwycEOf6Dbwf76xWtxuqDWp60OMKRW_dnAkWwI_ryf50vGlz-A9Tdjgg7q-QXSgLbWZ2MxC-sroqMrIsJTpJFr1GH-QC6Yoh4DMvXuzwQmcxiCx9m3UxUcCS_965U9OmIJEF4_Os1BXlSyR0LauFid9szGKKr6fMVd3_S6DZRVvPEaJtB_kmdE153sp6hBV_TZop) because of a multi-billion-dollar asset hidden in their financials... and I would bet that 99% of professional investors, let alone retail investors, have never heard of this company.

Even if they had, they wouldn’t see the value in it because they’re viewing the company through the wrong lens. Almost no one has tied it to the event that could set off one of the largest transfers of wealth in human history.

We believe they will soon though.

And when they do, they will see this for what it is:

[An investment that is asymmetric in the purest sense of the word](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtdZxidE71h1v_G-r9o9XeD15hQY7DmeKk6dUBf9j_vxXLVJsTHBli334YIYxFdQsYHtsLKjLdBG4dN-xavQJ23ihFCX3Y_KFzO1T2c4bAiMGRmHFI2tdhVWNWXiOmvuQiHRkCNLnP-DAREwdkxFoiSn7D6cWNxT5wmBaqbgjCErs5uzzHvZNE288jjZpQALImriM6L2CNGt3Io-WdeQs-FKU_QneJ2UUfzumhMo9Hw4o9OLgY9jC2QhCi6adZdhyMeBVMP-sRZ5b1EGZDtOtnH4PGFGXTFfMbfPZB4I6HYt9f4ebCfKi-aHDiy8Njw2_DgPWwSx8xvekaf9_ohd-JaJtoc3m9shDTJ1yGslbuYdrYYaIP9EBmQHWppjEWW8OY62kSWxzhc4oVLC7kBYvRL4HstOBpQUOEj-wHmAu3W14).

Because what we’re looking at here is a fundamental mis-pricing of a business... not by a few points but by _billions_ of dollars.

It’s one of those rare situations Warren Buffett would describe as “raining gold”... when all you have to do is step outside if you want to get rich. And it’s the type of setup Erez has built his entire investing career around.

The type of opportunity with the potential to make you a small fortune.

And in our most recent broadcast, Erez and I laid out all the details for you.

[You can watch it by going here](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=92d78cdfb7e04e239c768ffe1dfd9a53&_e=eXtimMoRASFkfzP0l4IEwSaj78oxtgdEp9hQ-O329xzsJSNUAe33JuqEUdmK9rSbCjdD-MFl1O--06kEeO5bT09dJYoOBuWhhSbsARt7FoOXyqcaFXW6D69R1UczNp-tNNJMeugzslv8KfO9f19exvUQnI1Ow4XFMkp5rKATSVj2_SDkADLRllZypFv6GTNncYirdbw0U-BvUo4z81TRtbSvz5F-jv-5XOxzC1isQ7HQ_Q0-5rHadFgAhaEtCgq-BARjU6NeLzDVzrRRy-jnDJ6v9e3uSyl2UGckK4c5tOqQnzlB1BMP2Gl9GAuGWgnIpaebEWrJQOcTxmYhggb9dMFFKna4bh62IhS6W65f-zvY5-wzPGG3sE9BgswZde4m8GqS-nrQ6khA1tSxlHv1irsmDnGFbkRO7uZeEYQ0w7NIlQVHTaVhLb-2MiCeudi87Na5N-bYLj2gCOloVa-4NCxzjFdrhN_1wZMsU03L63Mbil45ZkmkZXb2wDa3jYZ0FipbODjNFk42clnKBcmeJB_myLPTv2V0zsjLXQe7M2tCKhczT0biPLMZKKVjWrEvaj5FKtunVCI851aLu1E6RZhA6H5ViP__zwTpOPJSQ8XdmySbnQiisMjd9pJmAmOe). And do it now because we believe the window is closing fast. Even before we had the chance to sit down together one of the five catalysts that Erez identified was triggered. The others could follow soon.

Good investing,

Porter Stansberry

clean_body: I said that my friend and colleague Erez Kalir’s advisory, Biotech Frontiers, was going to be one of the most lucrative in the history of our industry. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | My name is Porter Stansberry. Recently, I made a very public bet. I said that my friend and colleague Erez Kalir’s advisory, Biotech Frontiers , was going to be one of the most lucrative in the history of our industry. Not because he’s a former Tiger Cub. Not because he’s managed billions of dollars. And not because he’s one of the most gifted analysts that I’ve ever met. But because he had ... one that almost every other analyst was sleeping on... but could make those who know about it wildly wealthy. You see, we were, and still are, in the midst of a truly unparalleled moment in biotech. We’re experiencing nothing short of a Cambrian explosion in the underlying science of biotechnology Diseases that we thought were impossible to cure, treatments that sounded like science fiction a few years ago... they’re happening right now and they’re going to transform the world. And from a financial perspective... they’re going to deliver trillions of dollars to the companies on the frontier of this revolution. And yet... the paradox is that at the same time all of this is happening... biotech stocks have suffered a historic collapse with prices crashing 70%, 80%, even 90% as investors abandoned the industry because of high interest rates. Dozens of biotech companies with, quite literally, some of the most exciting IP ever developed are trading for LESS than the cash on their balance sheet. It was this paradox... And the fact nobody else was seeing it... Which is why I was willing to wager Biotech Frontiers would be one of the most profitable advisories ever published. And for those who listened, the results have been remarkable. Biotech Frontiers has made more than seven recommendations that gained 100% or more during the past 18 months... and Erez has achieved this during the worst biotech bear market ever. And, as you can imagine, the feedback from our subscribers has been incredible: But that’s not why I asked Erez to . We both dropped everything to host this broadcast because Erez has uncovered another major financial paradox. One that we’re calling “the most asymmetric opportunity of our careers.” And, ironically, it’s not in biotech. It’s in an industry far bigger than biotech. And although this has nothing to do with things like cancer treatments or editing the human genome, the impact it could have on society is no less dramatic. We’re talking about a shift with the potential to send shockwaves through every corner of our economy: How we work, trade, travel, invest, and even plan for retirement... everything. If you miss it, you risk being left behind as the very foundations of daily life shift beneath your feet. And one company sits at the center of this change. An obscure, mundane, company that – on the surface – has nothing to do with this looming societal shift. because of a multi-billion-dollar asset hidden in their financials... and I would bet that 99% of professional investors, let alone retail investors, have never heard of this company. Even if they had, they wouldn’t see the value in it because they’re viewing the company through the wrong lens. Almost no one has tied it to the event that could set off one of the largest transfers of wealth in human history. We believe they will soon though. And when they do, they will see this for what it is: . Because what we’re looking at here is a fundamental mis-pricing of a business... not by a few points but by billions of dollars. It’s one of those rare situations Warren Buffett would describe as “raining gold”... when all you have to do is step outside if you want to get rich. And it’s the type of setup Erez has built his entire investing career around. The type of opportunity with the potential to make you a small fortune. And in our most recent broadcast, Erez and I laid out all the details for you. . And do it now because we believe the window is closing fast. name: Dan Steiner
subject: Have you ever reached Easter feeling unprepared?
body:
If you’re looking for a way to engage with Easter more thoughtfully this year, I hope this devotional serves you well.

| | | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2KpDAUhZ8m7pT8GmuRxYC4q4EZhullSCVXDa1RbmI1_faNXVUv0Nv7HT7uOW9Xe3VxiWn67VYwWEaL2c7uDp_bAXdABOdnCOByARwtp7ytqaypsjtueQdfLKuCCT445iswTGslOiG7tpqNHrlUbUcpGyVVTNMw3rRktGUjZZ2gVTSnkJ6QUsEuzYVxFbiSQmnHpFNEUrcAlgZhP25L9C4Vl9_HDT00flurxcyl7JmIX4QPhA8IeTvQQ252hNuG6UwRPsxQx1xjzJCIGI6y2keOiP5VJKaJ8PZEK4R4rET0sLq4PI_erbuLUyKin8HGbB-yJ9xSgVSI6P8r-0fXf_8N9atahSbsH3FZYm41kXQ6pd_Pl58Ofjf8KwAA__8gYZI-)
---
Friend of Life, Have you ever reached Easter Sunday feeling spiritually unprepared or wishing you had spent more time reflecting beforehand? I know I have. Easter has a way of coming up fast. So before the services, before the plans with family, or the big dinner to follow, I wanted to share something my team created with you in mind. [**_He Is Risen: 12 Scriptures to Prepare Your Heart for Easter_**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2KpDAUhZ8m7pT8GmuRxYC4q4EZhullSCVXDa1RbmI1_faNXVUv0Nv7HT7uOW9Xe3VxiWn67VYwWEaL2c7uDp_bAXdABOdnCOByARwtp7ytqaypsjtueQdfLKuCCT445iswTGslOiG7tpqNHrlUbUcpGyVVTNMw3rRktGUjZZ2gVTSnkJ6QUsEuzYVxFbiSQmnHpFNEUrcAlgZhP25L9C4Vl9_HDT00flurxcyl7JmIX4QPhA8IeTvQQ252hNuG6UwRPsxQx1xjzJCIGI6y2keOiP5VJKaJ8PZEK4R4rET0sLq4PI_erbuLUyKin8HGbB-yJ9xSgVSI6P8r-0fXf_8N9atahSbsH3FZYm41kXQ6pd_Pl58Ofjf8KwAA__8gYZI-) is a free devotional designed for the days leading up to Easter. It’s meant to be simple, steady, and grounding as you prepare your heart. Here’s what you’ll find inside:
---
* One full Scripture passage each day
* A short reflection to help you process what you’re reading
* A prayer to help you pause and respond

---
If you’re looking for a way to engage with Easter more thoughtfully this year, I hope this devotional serves you well. You can download your free copy here: [https://resources.preborn.com/he-is-risen](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2KpDAUhZ8m7pT8GmuRxYC4q4EZhullSCVXDa1RbmI1_faNXVUv0Nv7HT7uOW9Xe3VxiWn67VYwWEaL2c7uDp_bAXdABOdnCOByARwtp7ytqaypsjtueQdfLKuCCT445iswTGslOiG7tpqNHrlUbUcpGyVVTNMw3rRktGUjZZ2gVTSnkJ6QUsEuzYVxFbiSQmnHpFNEUrcAlgZhP25L9C4Vl9_HDT00flurxcyl7JmIX4QPhA8IeTvQQ252hNuG6UwRPsxQx1xjzJCIGI6y2keOiP5VJKaJ8PZEK4R4rET0sLq4PI_erbuLUyKin8HGbB-yJ9xSgVSI6P8r-0fXf_8N9atahSbsH3FZYm41kXQ6pd_Pl58Ofjf8KwAA__8gYZI-) Wishing you a meaningful Easter season, Dan Steiner

name: James O'Keefe
subject: The White House responded
body:
Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill.

| | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z758o21s5ahq9kdtmqkjek4mn8lbj5giu9hs5f1g_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpieeor4cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")
---
| Dear Patriot,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7pcvt0rm0gg0pg6tmditimchu7b4lvleq4b432o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpieeor4cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=gopp&amount=25") Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill. On the note was a name, an address, a date of birth. A real voter's identity. "Sign his name," the man said. "Just write what I tell you to write." **2.5 million people watched that video in the first 48 hours.** 82,000 liked it. 33,000 shared it. Eric Daugherty's post demanding "ARREST HIM NOW" hit 1.5 million views and 95,000 likes. Libs of TikTok's coverage: 846,000 views and 45,000 likes. The White House responded. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called our footage "astounding" and said the President is "working on an executive order to strengthen our elections." The DOJ issued a statement: they will "aggressively pursue anyone" involved in election fraud. Governor Newsom -- _Gavin Newsom_ -- said: "This alleged activity is a felony and should be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law." Los Angeles DA Nathan Hochman personally contacted us: "We have received your complaint and will open a file." **And then a detective from the Palm Beach County Sheriff 's Office showed up at my headquarters. Looking for me.** Not a single person from our videos has been arrested. But a law enforcement officer showed up at **my** door. **[▶ STAND WITH JAMES -- CHIP IN $35 TO KEEP US IN THE FIELD](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5fhmb91rme3cbjvdfsp4c34gnvvq8tf0rvakb08_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpieeor4cjh2bs "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260405&utm_content=gopp&amount=25")** Here's what I need you to understand: Everything you just read -- the footage, the White House response, the DA opening a file, the Governor forced to respond -- all of it happened because of what we built together over the past four months. This year, O'Keefe Media Group investigations have generated over **9.9 million views on a single post.** We've triggered a **$9 billion Treasury audit.** We got **$253 million in federal contracts suspended.** A Secret Service agent was suspended within hours of our report. An FBI security specialist confessed on hidden camera that major fraud cases are deliberately slow-walked so "everyone walks." **That 's not opinion journalism. That's results.** But I'm going to be straight with you -- results cost money. And right now, I need to fund my team's operations through the entire month of April. We need to raise **$92,430** to cover fieldwork, equipment, legal defense, and payroll for the journalists who made every one of those investigations possible. That's the real number. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1862, [the Siege of Yorktown](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAUheGnwR0GLyi6YNGNu-m2S4N6xdsyMAE6xLdvpukbdP0l5yT_x225WfIU3Lu9oylHXALW7LEUTItV4xm_U7UpUHDJUsZ9tc7ZBQQMXCgu-mW35K9FNbs5EAFlg6bTupej1DA1p5HjdkybBDHhht2x9tCh3PSgtvVQatINmdeaUKLvhBiVbkXXS4GDGnoF2sLKlMCdSkztZ6RQTjz8FZ-Y2i3eG2_OUh6ZyTcGM4O51tqelEtM18sZzOWkzHd7cQr8TxjM9pHI857BnAkd8njwK6avEmvgKzoKuUlmf1TynvKgmRLubsn_fpZ_hXoa-AkAAP__Fm18xw) began as Union Gen. George McClellan's forces arrived in Virginia, launching the Peninsula Campaign. Rather than attack, he chose a siege, marking the campaign's first encounter with Confederate resistance. Today, Christians celebrate Jesus' resurrection, the cornerstone of Christian faith. Many Christians in America will celebrate by going to church, followed by Easter Brunch. If you celebrate Easter, what makes the day special for you and your family? Hit reply and tell us your story. We would love to hear it. ## President Trump Issues 48-Hour Warning to Iran
President Trump warned Iran on Saturday that "time is running out" to [reopen the Strait of Hormuz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOwwiglNQvMZuXvtKcxyOel4QDOCQuV9_4_2FW-7sZGev9e85P4E8he0vHGjLGueANXssBdMMatzjlSqkQGFLQBndAtsGsxRSc6G4GGYH5D-zapxdESX2DdrOmKEfeyMfzW77VQ4djlqOYFZlFq3V6ITuO2HcguOjIXuvCSWGTohRmVZ0Qy9QKz0oaUAuTAl0VGJq_0cKZcfVf-IbU_uKR-PtXsqZWf-HyYnJqdbavpZ8U9w9k5OnN_LrdFAwMzlRgsArJH5lXtJ1nHcImR8xIX_Fg8LGI3m-Qea5JKDC95iO64vJqUnWnZW8p6wNU2I7gPzPjfIrd28rvwMAAP__IM6DYg) before the U.S. will unleash "Hell." On Truth Social, [Trump wrote](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2q4zAQxfGnsbuEkTT6SKFiYXGXrRa2NGNrbGuRLSMpCXn7S-4r3PYc-BX_f_fxTjHFY_1DO_u25PHgV03cGpeR0G35UV5UjnishWLlMNG60ihBmgvgBfQYKKb3iH3wC7Nk1bMX1mrllJW3fvNLCLNVSiIYYEthIofCaTS8uMnMuo_-owGCFgAO7RWEVsAGjUZpSU4dAofYcrn-z_FoGy_pnZ9crnPe--S31s7aqV-dHDo5tPJoW81zpPT5PyNCYUq_80Ep_C2P_ezkcObaaicHIYxC44SRGp25CaX74sP5iinFamyHsO4Uv6m-_ajP08uvAAAA__9PNXX_): "_Remember when I gave Iran ten days to MAKE A DEAL or OPEN UP THE HORMUZ STRAIT. Time is running out - 48 hours before all Hell will reign down on them. Glory be to GOD!_ " Meanwhile, the search for a missing U.S. crew member continued on Saturday after Iran shot down an F-15E fighter jet on Friday. [Two rescue helicopters](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZD0yxmAmcHAJ2Vx6IWpwA30yNrLNjPj7FSvtF2xSSUlPVe_fa3whew7rX9zJliWOgT7ZUymURtT9Fs_0wRQ4rAk5k5twXXFUUnUgNch2dMj-GnXl7EKkqKnI1sa0Td8Y9aw22z9rN_VKd1q7qTUdOpL93E2EqLVcTMX2pkkt21rKXpuHrNtGUqe7ViuDahJakuMS0-N_5FA2WvwV35Qec9wrb7dSjiyaP0INQg3hOmIudyXUcIOFGqT-iTPD_U-oYWfPBdMFcwyFw0kZzrRSKJAJ07zBEhMsULcwRzjYxwITbRwcUKD9As-BMnAAThiEGqpk3fFh7zl3Rmi57sj-e2H5lda3VV8BAAD__xVGin4) have been deployed in the search for the co-pilot missing behind enemy lines, while the Iranian government offered a $60,000 reward for the pilot's capture. The President previously [threatened more strikes on Iran's bridges and electrical infrastructure](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3uozAQBPCnMZ0jsxgbChfX0OXaK9ESNrAnf0RmSZS3P3Gv8K9HmtFv_tznO3LkvP3GREGeZc70OSKJUJ3RDns56wdr5rxV5IPWBbcNZzDgtLHa9POKHL-zbdbwJALqGgqt9303dB7GZg_d4BC8s6Z7LKNtl9EM6-LBtYs144DQcLjajDV9a8xg_c20fWfIWddb8AiLsoZWllJvfwtn2ekZv-VN9fYoqYlhF3kdqvulYFIwyU47x3hlCqa9JLpACiZcE2c-pKJwyQqmfmgdtKClnumlL-ShuWLWwol0PfOF1uUUBVNTw_r6cIx8OK-s2RLy_41GfnTaO8C_AAAA__-RNH82), warning that the U.S. military "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran."
## States Sue to Block Trump on Mail-in Voting
Officials from 23 states and the District of Columbia filed a lawsuit Friday seeking to block President Trump's executive order that [aims to restrict mail voting](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOpCAQhJ8GbxpsUZwDh714m73u0TTYaG8QJsgMmbffuK_w3yqpSlXq-_Ncn8iB4_4bTzLFpzVSvQKVQnlFNR_pnSvmyHHPyBdtFvcdV5AwtVK1clw35PBdVbMZTwQ0NGR6rcdhHjQ8msN40N4p57UdcJjtrB_WoSPd95OzHqFhc7dJJcdeylnpTvbjIGlS06hAI1ihJG1cUu7-Jo7lIB--6UO5c-lsgjlKeV1i-CVgEbDUWjtnr_vF7QtYbilgKfl9vtoTObQc208qHPc2YL3eXAQsTTbbq3IIfE1aKLnfyf8L5UdYPgb-BQAA__8dZXbW). The lawsuit asserts that neither the Constitution nor any federal law gives the President the power to mandate widespread changes to states' electoral systems or voting procedures. The directive calls for the Department of Homeland Security [to compile "State Citizenship Lists"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb9GMywERCcgeInZvHRDC6XVnkKwoNWZv99y9xM27Oq6p-49X8_hadFjWP7bDQzNcQhwZQ9EkAarujUe6bIpYFiSxQxutMtiB8GFZlwx3gzOov8MqnRmBhAgSzB12zayk614lKvRtXYTtJ3Uo3a1lUJ3fBwVPGzjRjnrEs1N44o3NeedaiteN5KDVrpRorViLBQHhxRT9YoYaIXZf-IJqZriVnqzEu25kP8K0Reiv66rmuP7XnH_C9Hv0SPhlAvRUzq2nWVcQmbwhukgPIHF5CCxm7ja43bBNoueYWBnpN_zFRMDDxNhDAwDwZKQPmw_8lom4_YLvces20Lx5Q7_VKM_-TyN-A4AAP__fnqNLA) of U.S. citizens who are eligible to vote in federal elections and requires the U.S. Postal Service to send mail or absentee ballots only to voters on each state's list. Eight states and Washington D.C. [allow all elections to be conducted entirely by mail,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQxfHT4I4Iw2DjgmIbd9l2S2tsxoYVNhFMEuX2q-wVvvpJP-n9_9yXO6acruM3nuR5L8tF75aJmeqC4GJ51jfWK11HxdQorHgcuGilB6lAKrsETPmzQBf8TqTJdOT7cbTGmVFPXfQTmnXaNwAFqws4qX7Su3EBBnR2XalL_qspULZXysF4U701igYYLOgR9SpAUUhc6u1vSRdH2vOnvKjetnJ22UfmRxPml9Cz0DNHiinn7yb0HMtJ30NCz9b1FkYjA51lq8hpk42Rqcn2JMn1eT7kqzBVWWqgKvTcVR8e75RzasMoQB0npv9wxz8q9fL6XwAAAP__AWJ8Hw) while 28 states allow any voters to request an absentee ballot.
## List: Best-Selling Cars by State
The Ford F-Series is the [best-selling vehicle in 29 U.S. states](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OrDAQBk8DmZGnMRgCBy8hm5duiBrchl6ZH9k9oLn9avYKm3_6SlVfz_GJHHlf_uNGTsIx7nTnSCKURjTderzSjWnnfUnImfyEy4IjaGiVNko3o0eO79GU3gUioLok97C2qbvaQl-ubgLog54m39vQtU2Nvodak6WuC2GedMnu86aNbh5ad8ZW-tHUmlrTNgYswlQYTZ7lSNX3wbusFOL7uChV87GV0a0iZy7qfwUMBQz3fVcX5xfGGU8WjJzlMyxg2PA8yStZSU2URWWKH3N10cpzJMW7oovSW71UVllQqIChTM6fN8fIubWF0cuGHH_J8qdcl4OfAAAA__-bS3-T), dominating much of the South, Midwest, and Mountain West, according to data from Edmunds. Its dominance reflects the continued strength of full-size pickup trucks, particularly in states with large rural populations, construction industries, and strong truck culture. [Compact SUVs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUgOGnwU5zPKI4BcVt7Oa2W5rDcFQ2CAaYIfP2m9lX2PpPvuL_uq93ct6F_T-drMsW18A1ey6F00pyPuIzVUrBhT2Ry2wN7TutCDi1IFsYV0vOv1fZWL0xIw8N616pcZgHhbfm0I9NGYuSezVZsjxJowzAYEjdZgYyjdMfDSSMPcAsVQf9OABPcholKkIjJLB1JabuO7pQDt78O744dY94Nl4fpVxZDP8ELgKXWmvH9nwGmz9d4HLGXNorXk9PqX1QygKXJml7Vee9y5MSEvaTnP_1yp8mvDT-BAAA__-0iHAA) like the Toyota RAV4 and Honda CR-V dominate in several Northeastern and Mid-Atlantic states, while California stands apart with its best-selling vehicle, the Tesla Model Y.

**Whatever happened to _LIFE_ Magazine?** For much of the 20th century, _LIFE_ magazine wasn't just popular. It was how Americans saw the world. Reborn in 1936 under publisher Henry Luce, _LIFE_ pioneered a simple but powerful idea: tell the news through photographs. At a time when most media was text-heavy, _LIFE_ delivered sweeping visual stories, from Dust Bowl migrants to war zones abroad. Within a decade, its circulation topped 5 million, and its images became part of the national memory. You can still see some of its most iconic work, including wartime photography and mid-century life, in [this archive](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQAL_GdCBjbEMKF6-hy2uvRMaszZ42NjKboPz9KfcL149mpPm6L3ePhDn99w9wHMuS4ToJmKEuXk97edbL14w5VY8nbKtPyS9KKttK3UqzbB7pvehmcxFAwdCA68fRDNMwqluzu14bFYcAADYGE8Par8H0t0naGxgLtkH3sUktTS_lpMdO9maQYLU1Wo1erUJL2JBL7b4LZt4h0ru8oHahPBpyO_NxiuGfULNQs698-ryFJ_GzQpdKSQQfUqj58JUzVKFmwgjtsRcubShEEBhLbqrbjguJ8LSj0DI9PNJvhP905uXUTwAAAP__dvR4UQ). By the 1950s and 60s, _LIFE_ was at its peak. It captured the civil rights movement, the Kennedy years, and the Space Race with a cinematic clarity no rival could match. Its photo essays didn't just document events; they defined them. A sample of those defining images, from the moon landing to Muhammad Ali, lives on [here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FugzAQgOGnMVvQcRgMg4cubOna0TriM1zl4Mi4sfL2VfoKnX_pk_6vq7uSRDm2T7qzLSG5g-sZuRTOjvS0p59cKR9ybJnkZL_StpFDwPEC-gKD8yTx5XTjbWBG7hu2nTFDP_UG52a3GMxKhuaph4471reRg1lv80we1mnkRuxbAw1DBzBp00I39MCjHgeNhnBVGthLSbn9TnKUnUN8pSfn9pbuTbR7KY9T9R8KF4VLrbWNEvgdFS67nCXll8KlydY_qsQo52iUhu1OEv-I8q_vp8XfAAAA___Snmrb). But the very thing that made _LIFE_ revolutionary also made it vulnerable. Television brought moving images into American homes faster and more cheaply. By the early 1970s, advertising revenue had slipped, and in 1972 the weekly magazine shut down. Attempts to revive _LIFE_ followed. It returned as a monthly in 1978, then as a newspaper insert in the 2000s. None recaptured its former influence. What remains today is not a magazine in the traditional sense, but a vast photographic archive, repackaged in books and special editions.

In the end, _LIFE_ didn't disappear. It became history itself, a record of how the 20th century looked and felt when it was still unfolding. _Did you look forward to the arrival of LIFE magazine every week? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

States Sue to Block Trump on Mail-in Voting Officials from 23 states and the District of Columbia filed a lawsuit Friday seeking to block President Trump's executive order that . The lawsuit asserts that neither the Constitution nor any federal law gives the President the power to mandate widespread changes to states' electoral systems or voting procedures. The directive calls for the Department of Homeland Security of U.S. citizens who are eligible to vote in federal elections and requires the U.S. Postal Service to send mail or absentee ballots only to voters on each state's list. Discover how TRT works, with no doctor’s visit required and surprisingly affordable options that can help restore your energy, strength, and confidence. () | Flying together with our sponsor One reader called "the only news that doesn't leave me feeling anxious." We think you'll agree. You can't control the news, but you can control how you read it. Here's what you'll get. The biggest headlines written in a way that: tells you exactly what you need to know... and not a word more doesn't tell you how to think always reminds you of the bigger perspective will probably make you laugh The world may feel chaotic, but you don't have to. . | ➤****ICE agents arrested the niece and grandniece of Gen. Qasem Soleimani in Los Angeles after officials revoked their green cards over alleged ties to Iran's regime and anti-American activity. () ➤ Pope Leo XIV carried the cross through all 14 stations of the Way of the Cross at the Colosseum on Good Friday, marking the first such papal act in decades. () ➤ Police arrested a fourth suspect in connection with an arson attack on Jewish charity ambulances in north London as prosecutors allege the incident was a premeditated, targeted attack. () ➤****An 8-year-old California student designed a moon plush named "Rise," that was selected as Artemis II 's zero-gravity indicator and launched into space with astronauts on NASA's lunar mission. () ➤ A new report finds many graduate degrees offer limited or negative returns, including psychology at -8%, while medicine (173%), pharmacy (68%), and law (41%) deliver significantly higher lifetime earnings gains. () ➤ A Porsche was split in half after a high-speed crash into a tree in Dunwoody, Georgia, remarkably leaving the driver with only minor injuries as investigators cite speed as a likely factor. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Popular hair loss treatment linked to alarming side effects. A 2025 study found 15% of minoxidil users developed unwanted facial hair--with women at highest risk. Researchers identified a natural "liquid gold" compound that matched minoxidil's results in just 13 days--without swelling, weight gain, or lifelong commitment. | Whatever happened to LIFE Magazine? For much of the 20th century, LIFE magazine wasn't just popular. It was how Americans saw the world. Reborn in 1936 under publisher Henry Luce, LIFE pioneered a simple but powerful idea: tell the news through photographs. At a time when most media was text-heavy, LIFE delivered sweeping visual stories, from Dust Bowl migrants to war zones abroad. Within a decade, its circulation topped 5 million, and its images became part of the national memory. You can still see some of its most iconic work, including wartime photography and mid-century life, in . By the 1950s and 60s, LIFE was at its peak. It captured the civil rights movement, the Kennedy years, and the Space Race with a cinematic clarity no rival could match. Its photo essays didn't just document events; they defined them. A sample of those defining images, from the moon landing to Muhammad Ali, lives on . But the very thing that made LIFE revolutionary also made it vulnerable. Television brought moving images into American homes faster and more cheaply. By the early 1970s, advertising revenue had slipped, and in 1972 the weekly magazine shut down. Attempts to revive LIFE followed. It returned as a monthly in 1978, then as a newspaper insert in the 2000s. None recaptured its former influence. What remains today is not a magazine in the traditional sense, but a vast photographic archive, repackaged in books and special editions. In the end, LIFE didn't disappear. It became history itself, a record of how the 20th century looked and felt when it was still unfolding. Did you look forward to the arrival of LIFE magazine every week? name: Royce White for US Senate
subject: Join Royce White & Mike Lindell April 8th
body:
Time for Change
| | |
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friends,
Join us for Voices for Change and Truth, a community town hall featuring two candidates and a conversation about what it will take to create real change.
The truth is that America First candidates can only do so much on their own. Lasting change requires citizens who are informed, engaged, and ready to act in their communities.
This event is about more than hearing from candidates. It is about bringing people together, asking serious questions, and challenging ourselves to step forward as active citizens.
Come hear the candidates, engage the issues, and be part of a movement focused on truth, responsibility, and action.

Two Candidates. One Community. A Call to Action. Royce White & Mike Lindell
Date: Wednesday, April 8th, 2026 Location: Wayzata Central Middle School 305 Vicksburg Ln N, Plymouth, MN 55447 Social Hour: 6:30-7:00 PM Meet the candidates, connect with neighbors, and engage in meaningful conversation. Community Forum: 7:00-9:00 PM
The time for spectatorship is over. Let's step in, get involved, and do the work real change requires.
---
---
| |
---
Royce White U.S. Senate

| |
---
Mike Lindell MN Governor
