Yes, China has surrounded Taiwan with 125 warplanes and a fleet of warships. Yes, it’s the largest military blockade in human history.

But hidden inside this "[Justice Mission](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=8a9e7f91ce324922a63781cb1729617b&_e=MJ5RAqE07YwRHGhzMmcWDIVNLk-uikVD0uEnuMyPn8Xy5fi3wT8HFketBkQK9z7vyh6MoHZ2yKyUuewWkjEyhcCsXPmTULb5us3f0ta7UEMyFbOchDA881tM1KzIpR-PgHzH8eAbmfchSZhGGKsFZaruC49UJXhJ7ksXIlLbiOynFtqJTahc5bgw9Z73xUUwp8v63iWltL2vWY2rAbLif07Creyp4yKBW_spG7-IP7K8JCvH88-STPvXCvmECdk1xG5ABWQ8qxGTDCDACdnbvaVpfStWCkLkHiZAnZNx1rjuhuv12UAhTFGYpP3K76YKWzeiR7lbhnTyUClyIMkIIkvhpL2noEMVuJL_RtZABKDjpDpPOewt-HoMpXAeT-XEGTTiW9DARc_PgVEPZQ6R7Y76BKtQNJ9Gw4FGbyrd7Qe9FH64EAueGYU_XTWVhSyJyBTQWO-1bX3kEFdFYV8Hp7p5zRZc4k0-uO3gLBFSnBCWleXhWyrZSB2lh1nTTueMCJcbg32cMg9-UnYhKeErglsWzBDV9c4sEywqIjfQvUcZSRIkwxbUOGw0ibhaq4nlIKvkjHi8AlaU0GEVyVNtVHWCU27lZE0Y4nEz9sOzIHf2Cfn-A-PqfTWyj0BiUC02)" is something much more calculated than a drill.

A specific photo of the ["blockade zones" just blew up the internet](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=8a9e7f91ce324922a63781cb1729617b&_e=MJ5RAqE07YwRHGhzMmcWDIVNLk-uikVD0uEnuMyPn8Xy5fi3wT8HFketBkQK9z7vyh6MoHZ2yKyUuewWkjEyhcCsXPmTULb5us3f0ta7UEMyFbOchDA881tM1KzIpR-PgHzH8eAbmfchSZhGGKsFZaruC49UJXhJ7ksXIlLbiOynFtqJTahc5bgw9Z73xUUwp8v63iWltL2vWY2rAbLifyMOkYLTFD4d9vZYn5hdXT9_tleeNW2rozTjI9FP-ucHBW5fgZJV7LfolKRBzXwGE7RAq08f2Wp7zYRmsDDBefTVFPpeBIdr3LsTxbOB5nLoDxrIp-YHUldvRkjAEfZhz1dHvvKP7m-EZ1dE7M5QfbCNt7looX1j4NwBqkH6bakB3bPyly0aWzUysJQ7Gpa2Fp0qNrQWISfUOX7-zSDB4iGXM3J3AVX-uZYu9GpLe3IfKYNxh06Ej6boAzXspe778xR6zAJd7gZcSELJuic7cJrB7xOkuTO11tcQ1L8dNygXBp88N9dBIAvtRQOJqiauycl-M5Q4lHtoIRf4H6RMTfWGzOp3HhXtsu9UO0nTfmwacyK4uMCdGvDMNlTJgETR_7a6csPqFZJpwcYq7vK6Aq70MfaISQLcU-9V2bZCvkpc) because it reveals a terrifying truth: They didn't just practice an invasion... they practiced a "shutdown" of the American lifestyle.

When these seven zones go dark, the ships carrying everything from your medications to the tech in your pocket stop moving.

Most people are watching the fighter jets. But you need to see what’s happening _underneath_ the surface. It’s a move that could ["turn off" the U.S. economy faster](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=8a9e7f91ce324922a63781cb1729617b&_e=MJ5RAqE07YwRHGhzMmcWDIVNLk-uikVD0uEnuMyPn8Xy5fi3wT8HFketBkQK9z7vyh6MoHZ2yKyUuewWkjEyhcCsXPmTULb5us3f0ta7UEMyFbOchDA881tM1KzIpR-PgHzH8eAbmfchSZhGGKsFZaruC49UJXhJ7ksXIlLbiOynFtqJTahc5bgw9Z73xUUwp8v63iWltL2vWY2rAbLif0--u4wRdgVAK2SEyp8eYVgp7h14MhhhECNkqHFiBOKS8HtVrSuwhPTd_tEZzu7HdDY_poyHyFOSqxsq7kWKpXraaD1K1_3-SGHxvn6vTHyykGw8B20bwUKODz_nZd3OMhYBTkO_S5jlN1NN_OmIXxOxLZD0pyrDCLiXYPFlDRBNmKDn0JKOfix1FmU9alawmDDbPZOAJl1Wrkm0-PtmIXEbrH7OlHOgSBvffZ_7hjoU8HSfgP5_mNw448KJ37xZGiMKt6W-qTmBXf5j2NlhYtKkcnSmuooyLKZvRf3Arc4Ahta4Smwoew-BmeM9jL1f0dMZqcc38SblO-mGYb2Cgo-o8xmAj46Gw5IzkFaJaclFU7Oo3tueA2UtAXSmWfxg8-BD8GAt4VNKFaCd5a5_CWA9UP98fQxve8kKtig6XrOh) than any missile.

[Click here to see the map they aren't showing on the news](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=8a9e7f91ce324922a63781cb1729617b&_e=MJ5RAqE07YwRHGhzMmcWDIVNLk-uikVD0uEnuMyPn8Xy5fi3wT8HFketBkQK9z7vyh6MoHZ2yKyUuewWkjEyhcCsXPmTULb5us3f0ta7UEMyFbOchDA881tM1KzIpR-PgHzH8eAbmfchSZhGGKsFZaruC49UJXhJ7ksXIlLbiOynFtqJTahc5bgw9Z73xUUwp8v63iWltL2vWY2rAbLif4izQ42v15Sn2lWEoFjwkVnUT6mWV1UigS9yh1269NeHW3Sxk3IuiySlRWp8XT1IJaCbHbkCJt4pI37oY_Hl1cr1q3q17fY8Sa4ssdivbaDeKRs3DuNZ_zZ3kgiax5KeztFMS35gusliNiH2UaFyvy3485K13CUXx5g1XaRwb8nHg3EXjX6WH3W0WEusbkYo4K_5rJlHF8Q_t12AmZVc4Ea_7L3yYr2z4LS4_0oTk6G_8U-Z0hrJNZ7RCZnl4s29XqYZRo_UaV_qV13nUKupBmxNR3mNJbEGbUiCZwrFFyMW4c49gYh63bqJ2VdesHe-4qAO-GlDonKsKUcYO1-eFOZDN_RVS5vIFiguNbl-qAUmBBpPUOVsRDS47BlQccQ10kCGBoAKRMHMwohh0A5u3_K2SAQrrKE-WapfNNqH5lBS)
Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Officer in Recovery, Flagg Sets Record, and Baby Beaver Rescued
body:
A South Houston police officer shot in the head during a traffic stop last week was [released from the hospital](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOpC92EsoXFxDl2uvRAYv2JLBkb0J4e1P_K_wdyONNDPf_HtOTxtiOLa_difD3zVNB50lEjPlKa1rWCiHI9OSPpSvNdptK8QTCMBGqEboydkQr0nVzszCDbImI_tedw8cJNTeACFo3ROJHrFfQCthBS6I84qdQlUHc4cJJbSUQqqhHdw8I-I8CCeXDqBSglzglFv2xPS1ZY3XPadd0l5H45lfper-VDBWMJ7n2V7Wp3S7FYw3TgWjzRyWSLcsPnHjybrGvXM4tsand-F0NJztDdyAFBoeD9St5z3W2bjXGWIMBftKiW23If5U8-8O-xj4HwAA__9Hi39w) on Friday, marking a major step in Officer Aaron Botello's recovery.

## Google-Backed AI Data Center Planned in Texas
A Google-backed [AI data center campus planned](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ymzAQhZ9GdOuRhIyhUJGG7qZNyehnhXciJEZszPXbZ3AeIf3u-b5zfn0tX44ylfWn29Dyd6pLwfPIyIxtqSlRwEalYagvbO-U3boeyIuWegBpQN6X6Ci_F9NF62WcVIdWPR73fhwmpbunncw4ovZ9CtNjcBhNP6IPSmsV7pMfTUf2CpNG3pWSyky3KXo_DIOfZFSh11oYiZG4ths_kfHbHSm_L51bqFuX7ZN5P0T_Q-hZ6Pk8z1t07AIWxhbfxW0UjutU6BmL0PNVUOh5rXXNCFxhb_VFESFRcSWQy-Bd-E1lhVQbbH8yE3jKmWqBWHN2DVzhZ6s7BbhY8A8GVODjBw332ljouWs27uf1ewwPYeS6Ocofb_6_tV9W_w0AAP__BhiY2w) in Texas will span 2,800 acres and exceed $5 billion in initial investment, with Anthropic leasing the site as demand for computing infrastructure grows. The site is expected to deliver about 500 megawatts of power capacity by 2026, with long-term plans to scale significantly higher. Developers say the location near major gas pipelines will allow the facility to rely on onsite energy generation. [Google's financial backing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OwyAUBODT2B0RYMBxQbGNu2y7pcXPAz8tgQg_5ef2q-QKW4_0zWh-LtvFYcGav90VLD1T2yo8jgJE0LeWEgboWDuEdof-SsXlfABtkkvDuGJcb9FheW1qjNbzuIgRrJhnPZ3NIuS420V4mWKYjfZSOHBKnyWfPAeujRJqGtG-Ma64FoILtZyW6L0xxi88ijBJOSgOEan1E-1A8HRHKq_3nFNo17HYneh2DNPXINdBrqFhzQC_73CQa24tF2DUWMLqagCmPfsgzCGLjhwLUAk6S60zV2nv7YZhkOvYbbw9sBQ8zDwonq8Oy6eS_nfU3cq_AAAA___wt32v) is expected to help secure lower-cost financing for the project, which is being developed by Nexus Data Centers. The expansion comes as competition intensifies to build out infrastructure supporting next-generation AI systems.
## Teens Charged in Kidnapping Case
Four 17-year-olds in the Austin area [face felony charges](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEGu4yAMhk9DdlTGEFoWWcwmuzfbWUYEOyl6NKmAJu3tR4w0J3gr2_pky9__52v68jHFbf3tHzzU97JPG58lca2cp31ZYuAct8xhPzh_luTXtXCdENBKMBL6iXxMn8l0NMxATnU8qOu11zfrFHb3weme58BaW3vTFhayZBR4ANNbRYRdHNoxMNArBcq4i6N5ttbODkgFjSgMMMW650u9c-W3L0v6tHcuYX90abjX-ixC_xI4ChzP87x8Hy9uUODoc40hscCxeQkcQ46PNhInefiUWMZCstQX8VaLDHefVybZSKvfkTb_fMZtlXXP9ZVbt3BK-_l_SeCI1knliC0olE4TSQM3Jx0rLbH3Zvbo3axUlwd6njGlWOxVGFgfPqZ_GvVn4R8D_g0AAP__2U6YgA) after authorities say they kidnapped and assaulted a fellow classmate in February. The suspects are no longer enrolled in Del Valle ISD, according to officials. According to arrest affidavits, the victim was lured under the pretense of getting food, then taken to a home where he was restrained, threatened with a gun, and beaten. Investigators say the attack involved multiple weapons and was planned in advance. The victim was later released and reported the incident, with authorities documenting significant injuries. The suspects are charged with [aggravated kidnapping](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOkfGEBMXLrahe9tuiQbPGEbr4Mge8sLfr9hfeN2VrnR17vnzNX8BJ97X3_AkL5-Y552-ayIRKnOOkQMV3guF_KZyxgTrWklmo41VelD6PiNwOuehRb9odF1LvhvHe_-wrjPt5tEap-MDqe8MxnGxGMaHG2l0rtd2MS37a0wP-t51uhvczeGyWGsXp7ELvTHNoAlZcrnJRkIfqDGdF84t5Geb_Cbyqk3_qzFTY6awVDiq8H61jZmuO42ZUg6QGjPFfBSFlNQbUiK18bqpKgfSLlVBCEclVDmqv4w7vF68r0pykaNcKSSo9QlCCmJkhDdLVRXOtnh8fXNKXO3YDHp9Aqf_dPIzp29v_gUAAP__tsuPeg) with a deadly weapon as the investigation continues.
## Officer Released from Hospital
A South Houston police officer shot in the head during a traffic stop last week was [released from the hospital](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOpC92EsoXFxDl2uvRAYv2JLBkb0J4e1P_K_wdyONNDPf_HtOTxtiOLa_difD3zVNB50lEjPlKa1rWCiHI9OSPpSvNdptK8QTCMBGqEboydkQr0nVzszCDbImI_tedw8cJNTeACFo3ROJHrFfQCthBS6I84qdQlUHc4cJJbSUQqqhHdw8I-I8CCeXDqBSglzglFv2xPS1ZY3XPadd0l5H45lfper-VDBWMJ7n2V7Wp3S7FYw3TgWjzRyWSLcsPnHjybrGvXM4tsand-F0NJztDdyAFBoeD9St5z3W2bjXGWIMBftKiW23If5U8-8O-xj4HwAA__9Hi39w) on Friday, marking a major step in Officer Aaron Botello's recovery. Authorities say [the incident began as a traffic stop](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnwR0RYBvHhYtr3P3XXmkt7GKQiLFg_yR--1NO9wZ_PdLom_nztX1ByunYf8ODFn6Hsh30apmYqW4lhOSppqOSL0-qV8iw7414M8pYqQapxg0h5WsbOlycwll3tOhpGvu7nbXp4hKshd6roAZ0ExLgOM3BBvSkvJ5g6NLyKVODGrVWephvMzpnrXWzQu17Y8SgCBOXeuNITG9oIV8fzs2XR5eXyHw20f8SZhVmBed1_0mEWc_SWJi1lW-OMpbvxuWQJ8r_u6Qrzl3SFaaci3xBky0WlpEAJdb0pCoxNR-h7oQylnYmhixhp8NfssHVhFn1_d5PvZmFWbu64PlKOadmJzGo_QEp_1Pyz759LuZvAAAA__88WZCV) that escalated into a slow-speed pursuit before a suspect opened fire with a shotgun. Officers returned fire, and the suspect was pronounced dead at the scene. [Doctors described Botello's survival as remarkable](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S3CAQhU-DMqagxaBRQOBE2Tp1qGKgEZSRUEHPauf2Lrb2Bk466L_33vfnY_2wKadj-213NPQVynrg1TISYV1LCMlhTUdFVz6xvkO229aQVhCguVBc3FdvU36vavDmKfwsBzRymu7jQ88Shmi0QniM6vEIQsxiBC3uUoKXMDsnpykMyfRnQvW-kGq-zf751Fo_Z-GlGwGYEugTlXqjiIRftoX87nZuruxDNpHobGz8xWBhsFzXdXM5ub8Qy6tROfoWg6XHYrDk4mxmsHRNBotQvYwMllZeFPnPDT9LTg75DwDeYiGeDh7Reu5fNR0bp2r7lDcqJ6-Y0Tb0PNSy81jamehbZ6jGn1fKOTU9MSW23ab8bZz-D_engX8BAAD__7q9lPI), though he still faces a long recovery with bullet fragments remaining in his head. The case has drawn widespread support from law enforcement agencies across the region.

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: A brutal new wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4l2i6kv3cdb80tqhn7n966kss1fkikkv2knbmsg_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c5g68oj2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jhhfsrehhaavsifmq934kiq6gg7qggvo8j2fto_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c5g68oj2cjh2bs)
---
These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable.

**[Your gift today will fuel our advocacy, amplify their stories, open doors with policymakers, and send a powerful message to the persecuted: You are seen. You are not alone. The risen Christ stands with you — and so do we.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqud69qqochu7l8ttgj0krp68mctprlchetifad0_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c5g68oj2cjh2bs)**

_Will you act now?_ Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church.

He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged.

In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen
President & CEO
Save the Persecuted Christians
---

Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone. That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness. Across multiple attacks this week, nearly 100 precious souls were killed — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out simply for loving Jesus. The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe. When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph. Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear. These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable. Will you act now? Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church. He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged. In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen President & CEO Save the Persecuted Christians | | Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians Save the Persecuted Christians PO Box 543 Monument, CO 80132 USA Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: She was locked in an attic for months… until this happened
body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
Sound of FreedomA rescue team changed Kristen’s life. Another mission begins in Phoenix. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE

Friend,

No one could hear her.

A young girl named Kristen was locked in an attic.

No windows. No fresh air. No way out.

The door was locked from the outside.

For months she lived there.
Alone.

There was no bathroom.
Just a bucket.

No shower. No clean clothes.

And the only time she left that attic was when she was sold for sex.
Over. And over. And over.

This is the reality of child trafficking.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Send help to children waiting

Millions of children are trapped in exploitation around the world.

But Kristen’s story did not end in that attic.

One night she knocked on a hotel room door. Her trafficker had arranged and forced her into another “date.”

But instead…she met a rescue team - Freedom Strike Force. They were working alongside law enforcement to identify victims and traffickers.

When Kristen realized she was safe…

She collapsed into the arms of one of our female advocates.

Free.

Law enforcement then raided the house where she was held. Traffickers were arrested. Kristen was taken to a safe place. For the first time in months, she had a real bed and a hot meal.

She took the first step toward healing.

This rescue was possible because people chose to act.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Send help to children waiting

The Sound of Freedom Foundation exists to stop the sale of God’s children.

Inspired by the film Sound of Freedom, the Foundation works around the world to prevent trafficking, support rescue efforts, educate families, raise awareness, and push for stronger laws that protect children.

Our mission is simple.

To stop the sale of God’s children.

And right now we are preparing a new mission, happening in just a few weeks in Phoenix.

Our Freedom Strike Force partner will train local law enforcement for two days, teaching them how to identify traffickers and victims hidden in plain sight.

Then on day three…they go into the field.

Real operations. Real arrests. Real rescues.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

Children like Kristen are waiting.

But these missions cannot happen without support from people who care.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Send help to children waiting

That is why I am reaching out to you today.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Would you consider making your first gift of $30, $60, $130 or whatever you can do right now to help rescue children from trafficking?

Your donation today can help:

- Train officers to find trafficked children
- Support rescue operations
- Provide food, clothing, and care for survivors
- Help children begin the journey to healing

When I first heard the stories of trafficked children, I asked myself a question.

What if it were my child?

I could not stay silent.
And you do not have to either.

Friend, will you please help rescue the next child today?

Your gift — whatever God places on your heart — will help bring freedom to children still waiting in the dark.

Together we can make sure more children hear the Sound of Freedom.

With gratitude and prayer,

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation

P.S. The cost to staff, equip, and execute a Freedom Strike ForceTraining Camp is $25,000. To raise these funds, I need Freedom Fighters like you to rally in support and sponsor this mission.

Please pray about what you can do to help and donate today.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation

6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

You are receiving this sponsored email because you subscribe to Parler's newsletter. The views in this email do not necessarily reflect those of Parler, its leadership or staff. If you'd prefer not to receive these types of messages on behalf of our sponsors, you can click "Unsubscribe" below.

We originally sent this email to dpwillis67@gmail.com
(c) 2026 Parler, All Rights Reserved.

PO Box 60989,
Nashville, TN, 37206 US

# ['Celebrating Christ's resurrection' by Vincent Cavaleri](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=193247636&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMjQ3NjM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUzOTE3MTYsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzk4MzcxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iEZHE4wWqOeTa3ClaKpCLaXwnHt8hWQFibREny_PFZk)
### Celebrating Christ's resurrection victory over death bringing eternal new life.
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Apr 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=193247636&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMjQ3NjM2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTM5MTcxNiwiZXhwIjoxNzc3OTgzNzE2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.daS5WZG2FiIcIODzdobwkJmBvc37NCVvnf2sy8YECpc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

> > Easter Sunday stands as the most profound and transformative celebration in the Christian faith. The day is a sacred commemoration of the resurrection of Jesus Christ; and we joyfully strive to celebrate God's victory over the grave. This holy event is not merely a historical moment in time, but a divine gift that offers followers enduring hope, a powerful testament to God's love for mankind, and a call to a life renewed in His grace and purpose. To reflect on the gift of Easter is to enter a deeper understanding of the resurrection and its eternal significance on humanity.
>> At the heart of Easter lies the resurrection of Christ, a miraculous victory over death that redefined the very nature of existence. Through His crucifixion, Jesus bore the sins of man, embracing suffering and death with unparalleled obedience and eternal love. The tomb, once a symbol of finality and despair, became the gateway to eternal life when Jesus rose on the third day. He affirmed that death does not have the final word, instead, He testified to the power of God's redemption and the promise of eternal life.
>> For the individual believer, it is an invitation to embrace transformation; to die to sin and rise to righteousness through faith in Christ. It also reminds us that no matter how heavy our burdens, or how dark our circumstances, the power of rebirth can bring us healing, restoration, and renewed life. The Apostle Paul encapsulates this truth when he writes "And if the spirit of Him who raised Jesus from the dead is living in you, He who raised Christ Jesus from the dead will also give life to your mortal bodies because of His Spirit who lives in you" (Romans 8:11 NKJ).
>> [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=193247636&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMjQ3NjM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUzOTE3MTYsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzk4MzcxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iEZHE4wWqOeTa3ClaKpCLaXwnHt8hWQFibREny_PFZk)
>> For the community, Easter binds the church together as the body of Christ, united in worship, witness and service. It calls His followers to proclaim the good news that Jesus conquered sin and death on behalf of mankind, offering salvation to all who believe in Him. His message transcends cultural, racial, and social boundaries, reflecting the inclusive nature of God's kingdom and His everlasting mercy and grace
>> | [](https://substack.com/redirect/90da5ed1-989d-4ab3-8543-0c15292ada2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
>> ---|---|---
>> Easter reminds us that Christ challenges His followers to embody the same humility and compassion in their daily lives, serving others as Christ served humanity. This is a powerful reminder that faith is not static, but alive, and rising, and calling for ongoing commitments and a continued transformation from all that follow Him.
>> As we honor His sacred gift, may we allow its transforming power to shape our hearts, deepen our faith, and inspire a life that boldly reflects the risen Christ. We must all remember, Easter is not simply a celebrated moment in time, but a divine triumph; an eternal reminder that through Christs resurrection we are gifted with new life, renewed purpose, and an unwavering promise for everlasting life in His kingdom. Amen.
>> Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer
>> Vincent served in the United States Army Reserve for 6 years and subsequently moved to Washington. He is currently a deputy with the Snohomish County Sheriff's office; and has been for over 21 years.

name: Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Please give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter -
We're pretty sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and say "Today is the day I am going to donate to Jon Ossoff's U.S. Senate campaign!"
_(If you did, great! Here’s the link and thank you in advance:[**https://act.electjon.com/go/Wake-Up**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260405-1-f&t=1&akid=2008%2E5691347%2EL9iSQ0))_
Otherwise, please give us a second to explain why we’re asking you to chip in and why particularly right now.
Jon won his last election by building the largest on-the-ground movement that Georgia had ever seen.
Doing it again — and going _even bigger_ — is not going to be easy. It is going to take sustained effort from now through Election Day. And we have to get to work right away.
Unfortunately, a lot of people think maybe it's too early to give. Or they'll wait until later. We get that.
But the truth is _early money to a campaign is more important than a donation at any other time._
Your donation now will help us build the strong foundation we need to win, and ensure we’re ready for anything that comes our way on this campaign, from Donald Trump, our MAGA opponents, or anyone else. **So what do you say?**
[**Can Jon count on you to chip in $5, or any amount today? We’ve got a tough road ahead of us, and every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260405-1-f&t=2&akid=2008%2E5691347%2EL9iSQ0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/1686?c0=ossoff-em-april26.cW0fSf&refcode=em260405-1-f&t=21&akid=2008%2E5691347%2EL9iSQ0)**

Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=27&akid=2008%2E5691347%2EL9iSQ0) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2008%2E5691347%2EL9iSQ0) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

Here’s the link and thank you in advance:) Otherwise, please give us a second to explain why we’re asking you to chip in and why particularly right now. Jon won his last election by building the largest on-the-ground movement that Georgia had ever seen. Doing it again — and going even bigger — is not going to be easy. It is going to take sustained effort from now through Election Day. And we have to get to work right away. Unfortunately, a lot of people think maybe it's too early to give. Or they'll wait until later. We get that. But the truth is early money to a campaign is more important than a donation at any other time. Your donation now will help us build the strong foundation we need to win, and ensure we’re ready for anything that comes our way on this campaign, from Donald Trump, our MAGA opponents, or anyone else. So what do you say? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for everything you’re doing to reelect Jon and stop MAGA in its tracks. \- Team Ossoff Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: Daniel Cameron
subject: Happy Easter from our family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cameron for Senate, Inc
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | [](https://eot.cameronforkentucky.com/f/a/g3taZwViaFWL2fd1OEVjmw~~/AAAHURA~/xL8P_Fa_oJmKI7-sgTlGaz4daJN6XqKtJybKQbCcSEtjfmlOVoz2RSecD3OWomafhSsKRbQZqwXCL3jq4RkKQv92VE7Ez2x0_wsSM4pgB_xkrNHxyH_ICsqgGKcuEHNIWsaBtozcOM5EMfhsbNJyU7X42NVZB-sUwJyXdhEcWe0~)
---
Friend,
**He is risen!**
Makenze and I hope you and your loved ones are enjoying a meaningful Easter together, whether you're gathered around the table, hunting eggs with the kids, or simply taking a quiet moment to reflect.
**This season reminds us that because Christ rose from the grave, we don’t have to live in fear or defeat. His resurrection gives us real power to live full, courageous lives, standing firm for faith, family, and the truth that makes Kentucky and America strong.**
As a husband and father to three boys, that truth hits home every day. The same Spirit that raised Jesus from the dead is alive in us, empowering us to lead, protect, and fight for what’s right.
I love how** Romans 8:11 **puts it:
---
**“And if the Spirit of him who raised Jesus from the dead is living in you, he who raised Christ from the dead will also give life to your mortal bodies because of his Spirit who lives in you.”**
---
Let’s embrace that amazing truth today as we celebrate with our loved ones.
Wishing you and your family a joyful and blessed Resurrection Sunday.
**He is risen indeed!**
Daniel CameronCandidate for U.S. Senate, Kentucky
---

clean_body: = Former Congressman Adam Kinzinger here. = | | = I served this country flying KC-135s and RC26-Bs. I took an oath to the Constitution as a servicemember and a Congressman. I defended democracy and our fundamental rights with everything I had. So it was pretty easy for me to put my job on the line when Republicans cheered the January 6th Insurrection, trampled on the sanctity of our elections, and gave Donald Trump more power than any President should have. And that’s exactly why I’m so proud to be supporting George Conway for Congress. He turned his life upside down to stand up for the democratic ideals we both hold so close to fight back against what Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are doing to our country. We desperately need fighters like George in Congress.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to George Conway and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = – Adam Kinzinger If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Did you mean to leave this blank?
| We told you that Trump signed an executive order _TAKING OVER vote-by-mail._

If he gets away with this attack on voting rights, he will:

❌ Disenfranchise millions of Americans...
❌ Rig the midterm elections...
❌ Ensure EVERY future election is stolen by Republicans...

**So we were stunned to see your poll response missing! The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

clean_body: 🚨 THEY'RE HUNTING OUR BORDER AGENTS. THIS ENDS NOW. Patriot, let me tell you something that ought to make your blood boil. Not sneaking across. Not running from law enforcement. Hunting them. Drones. Military-grade rifles. Coordinated ambushes designed to kill Americans in uniform. And Jon Ossoff? Silent as a church mouse. Because Chuck Schumer told him to be. See, Schumer needs the border open. He needs the chaos. He needs the cartels moving freely so Democrats can keep counting bodies and calling it a "humanitarian crisis" instead of what it really is: An invasion. And Ossoff has voted with Schumer's open-border agenda every single time he had the chance to stop it. While American families bury loved ones lost to fentanyl, fentanyl that crossed that same border Ossoff REFUSES to secure, They live behind walls. They have private security. Their kids don't go to schools flooded with cartel poison. Yours might. I'm Mike Collins. I'm a Georgian, a businessman, and a fighter who believes if you won't defend this country's border, you've got no business sitting in the United States Senate. But right now, I need to hear from YOU. We're building a Rapid Response Poll from America First patriots across Georgia and this great country. I want to know exactly where you stand, because your voice shapes this fight. 👉 Thank you, Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please . |

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: He is Risen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Glenn Grothman for Congress]()
body:
Happy Easter!
| | | | Friend, I want to wish you a very Happy Easter.

I am grateful for Christ's sacrifice and the blessings I receive from God every day.
_"Now if we died with Christ, we believe that we will also live with him. For we know that since Christ was raised from the dead, he cannot die again; death no longer has mastery over him. The death he died, he died to sin once for all; but the life he lives, he lives to God. In the same way, count yourselves dead to sin but alive to God in Christ Jesus.”_**Romans 6:8–11**
Wishing you a beautiful, blessed day with those you love.
**\- Glenn Grothman**
---
|

| | Glenn Grothman for Congress

Fond du Lac, WI 54936

"Now if we died with Christ, we believe that we will also live with him. For we know that since Christ was raised from the dead, he cannot die again; death no longer has mastery over him. The death he died, he died to sin once for all; but the life he lives, he lives to God. In the same way, count yourselves dead to sin but alive to God in Christ Jesus.”Romans 6:8–11 Wishing you a beautiful, blessed day with those you love. \- Glenn Grothman | | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936

name: Urgent call
subject: $26 built a firewall against Trump. Only two days to hold it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Time is almost up and 53% of WI voters are still undecided. We have to act now!
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FlamNvX5F0FOt4kpItfwAk4LzK5CmEMHToi73drOUCt_a5gMASkNqG8dQCEJs8BVyhlCp-J8w-P1LfGixLfTFTQRkslj6vgYRy-o9UTn7NWIWRvt1Cbv0mAEefzLON2Yopu7PO3i9D5I1MjhM3dzw5YQJgPCA_g2pY_ZbXlWihK5ir7C6LbYYEiJCQHaEmXB1-YrqwF4i7pu4kcI3mchzeFZUye24eXk_3Y3eNE3cuo=&c=v1QTNg8rI56-RFMbck_wX-EGBenyefMKA8_wIod9AG2wWkx81WTUnw==&ch=jKT95agryZ7Rs8Nlp3m2z8TcGdpC8M2naYn5pCZJFhZPpGKiLtiOPQ==)
---
|
Peter,
$26.
That was the average donation from grassroots supporters like you in 2025.
On its own, it may not seem like much. But together, those donations powered something incredible:
Defend Our Courts reached 750,000 Pennsylvania voters who rarely show up for judicial elections--and turnout in that group didn't just increase...
It nearly doubled.
From 30.8% in 2023 -> 59% in 2025.
If you supported Defend Our Courts last year, make no mistake:
You helped build the firewall that protected our democracy.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FlamNvX5F0FOt4kpItfwAk4LzK5CmEMHToi73drOUCt_a5gMASkNqG8dQCEJs8BVyhlCp-J8w-P1LfGixLfTFTQRkslj6vgYRy-o9UTn7NWIWRvt1Cbv0mAEefzLON2Yopu7PO3i9D5I1MjhM3dzw5YQJgPCA_g2pY_ZbXlWihK5ir7C6LbYYEiJCQHaEmXB1-YrqwF4i7pu4kcI3mchzV8j7IwRQD3g5R8RUmSk6gw=&c=v1QTNg8rI56-RFMbck_wX-EGBenyefMKA8_wIod9AG2wWkx81WTUnw==&ch=jKT95agryZ7Rs8Nlp3m2z8TcGdpC8M2naYn5pCZJFhZPpGKiLtiOPQ==)
---

Now we have just 2 days to do it again.
The Wisconsin Supreme Court election is April 7, and this race will decide whether that same firewall holds in one of the most critical swing states in the country.
If you haven't donated yet, we need you to step up now. If you have, we're deeply grateful--but at this stage, we need you to double down.
Here's the reality: We don't have the same level of resources we had in Pennsylvania. But we didn't wait.
In just the past week, Defend Our Courts has deployed cutting-edge tools to engage thousands of Wisconsin voters directly--having real conversations to close the awareness gap in a race where voters are still tuning in.
In February, 66% of voters were undecided. Now, that number is falling, but as of mid-March 53% of voters are still undecided
We are making progress. But we are running out of time.
We can't add more days to the calendar--but we can reach more voters before Election Day. And that comes down to resources. So we're asking:
[Can you chip in $26--or more--right now to help us finish this fight strong and secure the Wisconsin Supreme Court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FlamNvX5F0FOt4kpItfwAk4LzK5CmEMHToi73drOUCt_a5gMASkNqG8dQCEJs8BVXGU1r6hfYJdq9wSFZWP6aKL2ghp7Tw1K-6qOLx8-rza8Phe6ZllqfQkji9eC7K0CPq1auByhGpRbeDVe-wd-tXNxLOnX7Amgc0-km6RK8AqFtP6FnL1djrKMPeMotkodj4B7M9oohrubcs980CpTV8LV4q74znTLEvcS_bZExTCo7fnH6myP3A==&c=v1QTNg8rI56-RFMbck_wX-EGBenyefMKA8_wIod9AG2wWkx81WTUnw==&ch=jKT95agryZ7Rs8Nlp3m2z8TcGdpC8M2naYn5pCZJFhZPpGKiLtiOPQ==)

body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260405-1349&t=1&akid=1359%2E294397%2EyXxeIv)
We have a simple ask for you: **[Can you pitch in $1?](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/154?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_1_ak.eyp9nY&refcode=em20260405-1349&t=3&akid=1359%2E294397%2EyXxeIv)**
The amount itself isn’t as important right now.
What matters is how many people step up to fuel our campaign through the final stretch.
When you pitch in $1, another person chips in too. Then, another does the same.
Together, we’re able to build a grassroots campaign powerful enough to take on right-wing special interests and win.
**But with a recent poll revealing that 53% of voters still haven’t made up their mind, we have to make sure we reach those folks before our extreme opponent does.**
[**That’s why we’re counting on your support. Can you start the chain reaction by pitching in $1 or more today?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/154?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_1_ak.eyp9nY&refcode=em20260405-1349&t=4&akid=1359%2E294397%2EyXxeIv)

Thank you,
Team Taylor

name: From President Trump
subject: A Very Loyal MAGA Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
Happy Easter!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**Dear Friend,**
**I want to wish you and your family a very blessed and Happy Easter.**
Today, we celebrate Christ’s sacrifice on the Cross. Wherever you are, I hope you take a moment to thank God for the many blessings He has given us.
I truly believe God spared my life for a reason on that terrible day in Butler, PA. America was founded on Christian principles, and I am grateful He has given me the mission to fight every day to Save America.
**Your support means more to me than I can ever say. Because of patriots like you, we are still standing strong.**
As a small token of my appreciation, I have a special Easter surprise gift I’d like to send to my top supporters. **_[Please confirm your address here:>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Consider this my way of saying thank you—and Happy Easter. God bless you for standing with me.

[CONFIRM ADDRESS](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**_[And if you’re able to, I would greatly appreciate a contribution of any amount - SMALL or very GENEROUS. Your support will help Republicans hold the MAGA majority this November.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
With faith in God and love for this great country, we will continue the fight to protect the America we cherish.
**God bless you and your family,**
**And may God bless the United States of America.**
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[CLAIM GIFT FROM TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Scott Presler
subject: The SAVE America Act would save the midterms, but not if the Senate doesn’t pass it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC
body:
The real election protection plan starts right here...
| Peter, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: **We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections.** While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. _And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind._ **I know this because I've lived it.** In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. **That is why Pennsylvania went red.** Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing.
---

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our campaign finished the first quarter of this midterm election year in a strong position.

_Thank you._

[_**But now, April has been off to a slow start and we’ve seen a downtick in our grassroots fundraising. Can we count on you to help us get back on track?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128821996/612463491/1674526804?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SlowStart_260405_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGYzYmVlZC1mYjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=forgpGaH-SQg-SeTWqFREje1JLtY9q4keUmgoWo3DgY=)

Look, Derek, it’s normal for operations like this one to see dips like this after big deadlines. And we know with everything going on, it can be hard to ask folks to chip in their hard-earned dollars.

But here’s the thing: there is simply too much at stake for us to slow down. Our president has plunged us into a war of choice overseas. His administration continues to drive everyday costs through the roof for working families. And Congressional Republicans have done essentially _nothing_ to hold them accountable.

**In the face of all this, we have to keep our foot on the gas.**

This November, we have the opportunity to reelect Mark Warner and flip as many as _4 House seats in Virginia from red to blue_. That means control of both chambers of Congress could come down to what happens here in the Commonwealth – and we need to make sure we have the resources to go the distance.

[_**Sustained engagement from grassroots supporters is what determines this campaign’s strength in the months to come. Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help us build a campaign that can elect Democrats across Virginia, flip control of Congress, and put a check on this administration **Friend ‐‐ Joe and Jill Biden are depending on this team to help Democrats defend their legacy, take back the Senate, and stop Donald Trump's MAGA agenda!** But according to official DSCC records, your April Democratic Membership requires activation.

name: Ken Martin
subject: Happy Easter!
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260405_6615_fr&refcode2=6615_22930333_jJ2cvp&akid=6615%2E22930333%2EjJ2cvp)
---
Derek,
I’m reaching out today to extend warm wishes and say happy Easter to all who celebrate, and to share my thoughts on what this holiday means to me.
I was raised Catholic and still remain Catholic today, and my faith has guided me throughout my life. It is, in part, what has called me to public service.
As the chair of the DNC, I bring the principle of standing with our most vulnerable people and communities to my work every day.
Today, Christians across the country and the world reflect on and celebrate the Resurrection. **To me, it’s important that the values we share with each other this weekend — joy, hope, and unwavering faith in humanity — inform how we live our lives.**
We must remember to love our neighbors and to care for the least of us, regardless of who they are, especially right now.
We have seen how easily hate can take hold in this country. **But I believe that love and community will always win in the end.**
**The DNC is committed to our mission — to work every day to ensure that hope and justice are at the center of our work, and to stand against hate.**
I hope everyone reading this email, regardless of your faith, is able to take a moment to reflect on what this fight means to them, and how we can best center love, hope, and resilience in our lives every day.
May this Easter bring joy and blessings to you and your community,
Ken
Ken Martin
DNC Chair

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/tU0mfDbo4s3VcBbe_M6s4OuLApgyFcBWk-meZITXJckkDv_1c6BZ2vKgEJvCBu1ZYtLaPBA_BUynz0P4Y4j3ZrWhUZ_wwmbE9KxMwDOU2LYwH5z_XFIZT0C2v4eq1rt6pve4vB0dEE16yWDD0U-VKZ1QIp-r4jLICirnYV3DOIqpp02QlqEALvCp/eZyO7Hs7EXO__pjw8lk1uNvzwpFuIJNM/19)_

Peter,
---
There's something the Left never thought they'd have to say out loud:

_They 're losing the numbers game. _

And now they're fundraising in a panic because of it:

_Above: The Left is sending fundraising texts that name-drop Turning Point to scare their donors._
---
In their own words, they're warning supporters about a "hyper‐partisan voter registration machine."

They even asked: _" Ever heard of Turning Point?" _

Yes. They have.

Because Charlie cracked the code -- and it works.

**Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Win more races. **

That's the math.

And the Left knows it's beating them.

Because while they talk, we train. While they protest, we're building.

Every day, we're training new Chase the Vote patriots -- men and women who know that a yard sign won't win an election...

_**... but a ballot chaser will. **_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3nntQXoZpmw6d3QltllQ-gfNkt_cQt29dqKtDDf6aYi7p4g1Q1sWl8iETdfJHyT1HaaujtsDFcqzsXQkcRGLXLiXQGAVfUiwL6epUigEh4oKYuJJZ9ofpljKVAA_M5YUgIpBXiQEg16D9RmOh0wJzDVJDQfKuA4qtG9IdUHzoJKeYHoDQC4Z0urh85BaXgX8pSKYoIJ_3AflJLS7MMOzpWUGSch0lBmPSzDixaorGcCHlylGShmKWkQImKS5wr80KGwZuHHGOXQNfEu5arAw8RmzealU5IpP-sn_3ZW5rCI8LjUWHerCNpm7WjrjxitTpCkFW6fpFSI4ss10czR8AC9fX7ZYOJR0poCEowm9RuIQ9XsBLgKKtuv2D2tqZKxSB0t2p-Ytcpxtvre4nqs6txr7nDHaYRAFXFNWPaUA2gd9iIIBd9iXT5e_u6kbtpe6zfsMM4rx78Fqa7VAbfxg9n4di-yWjGgUYCe4X4HRgoxlv23coUT3FGo2aOiifumlERfVujEJDcWGk9MMc5GtAZ_XBmx_D2X6S3QgIXeW0VLOH2vuMn--B0sOujwwWfN9bpKF2-ND2qW3KxNGGqQDkoh2HSiibNjz2AzvspvG7yc3eWFGkIBS3P8do71x5Kk6q6T5PcD9S6iU72xGjrqrU_XFRBva-n4No-dpiFQQ3lVgt6oxropFGOAF6ESji8s2rXubyhJ64RkPtpw/wiV51b4uior8lB7uEaeUUU2h7CZJ_ZYD/19)
---
And we're not slowing down.

We're already working around the clock in Arizona.

**We 've expanded aggressively into Nevada and New Hampshire, and opened a permanent office in Las Vegas -- a command center to lock in victories in '26 and beyond. **

This is what winning early looks like.

The Left sees it. And now they're rushing to respond.

That's why they're scrambling. Raising money. Trying to spin up their own copycat machine.

Because they know they're behind, so they're sounding the alarm NOW -- not in October.
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Y752lr4fV7ZLT9IDrLLFXjRqjCx5UF7T53RBKGw8DINaibYAER8Bm-3lZ3T9D-eQ-4_rzwLSFvCjg5Xf9xvp39RX7NpyFAQJ5mrwowI66mtZEI-8ITv84UEVS2B7kUGUPXcLEUZGfQcByo4c9nvJBtgOpOvalLybyDnc12ID5gKfMPfHPA5kwjO4F5mhFa3yusaIC0ZBY8OGwPf2xre2N-5aRW1edmHvthS5cOHnWC6CO3VMTaUb9NyXDQvE6WO3paVDTqemvnGF1uUTFNoohWIkdT9S8wKq26tcUxqzmnblXWEcFH1oqyWgmq4M2-ukO-zAcKGyZf7KgY0crHibk271yqTWAifwVmYSkTdwBRTWu5EHCQcUgzRbKA1tBpaH86KD7KO9EpINoi6jLYt1JHeX0Hw8e1VoXF_06r1XRBFfqGFAnOFU67S3BDgsP2XrfKhzB1I6J7QVvxpvwaSa7gq1jw534woBIjfrzicavRNq76SkhPzZqDb0HMB0mx783KNka61XANndoF69JLxn31-eB4S3qJ3Qg5PFfkcPGl0hm0xTH6vnIHKu7bF2q5W7QJt2c95jC2EVH1dxF2k8L51pEZ3TnaC4P4RgsUj7axzqa2OKJ3M7sE9A4-oAZGNEufDpkD8zlMZgjYvIlAECtOe0EssWCHfWIFf-47GyZTfusjPYzII5gWeRtVhnfpPXWnGD16B5SbkTflM/KabxfsMEWvolljt16wUqcqPN-LbQ5tlV/19)
---
_Above: Our latest "Chase the Vote" graduates who are being immediately deployed into the field. Every day, we're training more grassroots patriots to chase votes and deliver victories for our America First movement. _
---
**But Peter, here 's the choice in front of us: The Left wins when we wait. We win when we move. **

Doors. Ballots. Early. Often.

_It 's that simple. _

Saving America starts NOW -- not later.

We have the upper hand, for now. But we can't let the radical Left claw their way back to power.

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Peter, There's something the Left never thought they'd have to say out loud: They 're losing the numbers game. And now they're fundraising in a panic because of it: Above: The Left is sending fundraising texts that name-drop Turning Point to scare their donors. In their own words, they're warning supporters about a "hyper‐partisan voter registration machine." They even asked: " Ever heard of Turning Point?" Yes. They have. Because Charlie cracked the code -- and it works. Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Win more races. That's the math. And the Left knows it's beating them. Because while they talk, we train. While they protest, we're building. Every day, we're training new Chase the Vote patriots -- men and women who know that a yard sign won't win an election... ... but a ballot chaser will. And we're not slowing down. We're already working around the clock in Arizona. We 've expanded aggressively into Nevada and New Hampshire, and opened a permanent office in Las Vegas -- a command center to lock in victories in '26 and beyond. This is what winning early looks like. The Left sees it. And now they're rushing to respond. That's why they're scrambling. Raising money. Trying to spin up their own copycat machine. Because they know they're behind, so they're sounding the alarm NOW -- not in October. Above: Our latest "Chase the Vote" graduates who are being immediately deployed into the field. Every day, we're training more grassroots patriots to chase votes and deliver victories for our America First movement. But Peter, here 's the choice in front of us: The Left wins when we wait. We win when we move. Doors. Ballots. Early. Often. It 's that simple. Saving America starts NOW -- not later. We have the upper hand, for now. But we can't let the radical Left claw their way back to power. So here 's my ask, Peter: every $50 you give today helps train and deploy ONE ballot chaser into a battleground state. ### He is Risen
**A Prayer for Easter Sunday | 2026**
Father, our hearts are full of awe and gratitude as we celebrate the triumph of today. You did not stay in the tomb. The grave is empty and You have risen. You rose with power and authority and because You live, we have hope that is alive and unshaken. Through Your obedience and sacrifice, You did not just make a way... You became the way.

Thank You that the suffering of Friday gave way to this victory of Sunday. Thank You for the love You showed by giving Your life for us. Thank You for speaking final authority over death and the grave. Thank You that the same power that raised Jesus from the dead is now alive within us. Thank You that we are no longer bound by sin, shame, or death, but are made new because You have already overcome it all.

You are not a distant Savior. You have risen and are reigning, seated in authority over all things. And this is why Your resurrection is not just an event we remember, but it is an experience that reshapes everything we know about life, death, and eternity. We no longer stand in mourning... we walk in authority. We no longer live in defeat...we stand in victory. We are no longer held captive by fear... we are anchored in hope. We are no longer condemned... we are free because You did not just die for us, You rose for us too.

Let our lives be a reflection of Your resurrection power, and may everything we do point back to the truth that You are not only risen, You are reigning. We give you praise that death has been defeated, victory has been secured, the grave has been emptied and our King has taken His rightful place on the throne.

Strengthen our faith to walk boldly in the life You have already given us. Remind us daily that we are not waiting for victory... we are living from it. Let this truth transform us and help us walk in the freedom You secured, carry the light You revealed, and boldly proclaim Your Gospel. This is the life You died and rose to give us and because You are risen, we are risen!

In Jesus' Name, Amen

clean_body: Pray. Serve. Vote. | | | April 05, 2026 | == | | | He is Risen A Prayer for Easter Sunday | 2026 Father, our hearts are full of awe and gratitude as we celebrate the triumph of today. You did not stay in the tomb. The grave is empty and You have risen. You rose with power and authority and because You live, we have hope that is alive and unshaken. Through Your obedience and sacrifice, You did not just make a way... You became the way. Thank You that the suffering of Friday gave way to this victory of Sunday. Thank You for the love You showed by giving Your life for us. Thank You for speaking final authority over death and the grave. Thank You that the same power that raised Jesus from the dead is now alive within us. Thank You that we are no longer bound by sin, shame, or death, but are made new because You have already overcome it all. You are not a distant Savior. You have risen and are reigning, seated in authority over all things. And this is why Your resurrection is not just an event we remember, but it is an experience that reshapes everything we know about life, death, and eternity. We no longer stand in mourning... we walk in authority. We no longer live in defeat...we stand in victory. We are no longer held captive by fear... we are anchored in hope. We are no longer condemned... we are free because You did not just die for us, You rose for us too. Let our lives be a reflection of Your resurrection power, and may everything we do point back to the truth that You are not only risen, You are reigning. We give you praise that death has been defeated, victory has been secured, the grave has been emptied and our King has taken His rightful place on the throne. Strengthen our faith to walk boldly in the life You have already given us. Remind us daily that we are not waiting for victory... we are living from it. Let this truth transform us and help us walk in the freedom You secured, carry the light You revealed, and boldly proclaim Your Gospel. This is the life You died and rose to give us and because You are risen, we are risen! In Jesus' Name, Amen ~ see daily devotionals and prayers by Jenna in the new= | | Update your or unsubscribe © 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128, Houston, Texas 77098-4520

name: Scott Presler
subject: They're organizing. Are we?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC
body:
This is the only thing that is guaranteed to work...
| Patriot, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: **We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections.** While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. _And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind._ **I know this because I've lived it.** In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. **That is why Pennsylvania went red.** Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing.
---

subject: Thursday night's kickoff was just the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
I swept popcorn here 21 years ago. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBM9HVX4BjlfjTcO0n0mJeJtSqMSx6nWpCxo92HOCXN9lVTV_4bVKeCujYDE1cbDQjF7jfoSE_gEsX1b2lz7YuggIQSB4HDpsyjaqrdonF0m3/4pj/KSAVSQFJSFCbDS-a6Ht78w/h0/h001.BwEsJPnK83T-BYMWWr3YvgocHPqFYDVgb6Tv8FqUw7A)
---
Peter,

On Thursday night, over 120 people packed into a room and made some noise for real Democratic representation in WA-03.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH840V41lhbochMlwyPNoidW46OgOnGQ5TK5l5xxs17KOQwRZBUoHe-DOugtyb1Y_JramkWBXBFkl52QiuabsOrM7wVw9fkH9zjx85_Oo0RuuN72gLBV7eF65ZXaID1OLz1t7aTh4ui56fomIxCueL7OaJ4NUvXtUJy49Z__F3Wz_hMdlUugsvvJZltaQI3gMqIULelf6Obkm6Iu1FVUxJ_3GfarwSu1_juQQH_D84MLZi-znyTqcFljZSlNp5E_7lo_3p6K11c3hB74upTT-hv7qVdX8JziULkZAAMBZcXfWsRxrPQsdJzP1m1TBzzVXNx6AudKM-O1oLT1i4A0nkDsw/4pj/KSAVSQFJSFCbDS-a6Ht78w/h1/h001.AwX3Ykdv5TWGlTy1odRKFPx9PRt0Qzqq7lnRmvDd3Ag)
---
I want to tell you about the venue for a second. Twenty-one years ago, I helped oversee the final construction and opening of that building -- AMC Classic Mill Plain 8 (originally Cinetopia) right here in Vancouver. I started in the movie theater industry at 16, sweeping popcorn off the floors. Thursday night, I stood in that same building asking people to send me to Congress. **My first boss, Bruce Wren, introduced me. The same guy who gave a 16-year-old kid a job sweeping popcorn. I'll be honest -- that one got me.** There were a lot of new faces in that room. Hands I hadn't shaken before. People who are fired up and done waiting for Democrats who actually act like Democrats. I said it at our launch party, and I'll say it again: **_"I'm ready to work in DC and I know how to compromise, but I will say this now -- I will never compromise my morals. I will never compromise YOUR RIGHTS."_** That's what this is about. **We have a representative right now -- Marie Gluesenkamp Perez** **-- who keeps voting with MAGA.** On women's rights. On immigrants. Enabling a fascist in the White House, On the issues that define what it means to be a Democrat. That ends in November -- but only if we build this movement now. Our launch was the start of something. Let's make sure it is BIG. [**Chip in today and help us put a Real Democrat in Congress.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH840V41lhbochMlwyPNoidW46OgOnGQ5TK5l5xxs17KOQwRZBUoHe-DOugtyb1Y_JramkWBXBFkl52QiuabsOrM8RfOoY6atAQ9K1VPiTMDrZBV-Rrh1zSVsuMyDhKpS_khGk3e60F40WotBdYrG_TYAXr0ilOF7oW0MdWw9X3LRLYaOR2eEPAOMGS5a3hJNMNm2NgGaI-wZFRIIzIAcakAY5RNuzMW7tVE5gs-EAPGttE7qyBieNU36Kae0zez51E__TucMfUKG3SiJ8g4Gt7OCQH9B1XdEQzHjgnHsyJTxcvUYK-jQ4hG7IuRwU84KDCNMT2aGv8apGTZKkyyzC3ig/4pj/KSAVSQFJSFCbDS-a6Ht78w/h2/h001.BNRx3dIE65nukcp7wjNkeDrH2Ua03D56bXyhfLPodBg)
---

clean_body: I swept popcorn here 21 years ago. | | Peter, On Thursday night, over 120 people packed into a room and made some noise for real Democratic representation in WA-03. | I want to tell you about the venue for a second. Twenty-one years ago, I helped oversee the final construction and opening of that building -- AMC Classic Mill Plain 8 (originally Cinetopia) right here in Vancouver. I started in the movie theater industry at 16, sweeping popcorn off the floors. Thursday night, I stood in that same building asking people to send me to Congress. My first boss, Bruce Wren, introduced me. The same guy who gave a 16-year-old kid a job sweeping popcorn. I'll be honest -- that one got me. There were a lot of new faces in that room. Hands I hadn't shaken before. People who are fired up and done waiting for Democrats who actually act like Democrats. I said it at our launch party, and I'll say it again: "I'm ready to work in DC and I know how to compromise, but I will say this now -- I will never compromise my morals. I will never compromise YOUR RIGHTS." That's what this is about. We have a representative right now -- Marie Gluesenkamp Perez -- who keeps voting with MAGA. On women's rights. On immigrants. Enabling a fascist in the White House, On the issues that define what it means to be a Democrat. That ends in November -- but only if we build this movement now. Our launch was the start of something. Let's make sure it is BIG. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: I ended my speech by saying "Vote Blue. But it matters WHO. " AND I MEAN IT! Brent Hennrich Democrat for Congress, WA-03 | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. subject: Your April edition of The JanePAC Monthly is here! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We have a lot to discuss.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128828528/612476454/1328794144?refcode=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTQxMjM3LTAxMzEtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fi_4wMMQbFPdXty7GQeLDTww2q4YQF5uVGmVwAWS598=&emci=09defd46-772f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
Welcome to the April edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_**. From Jane taking the stage at one of the largest protests in American history, to a backroom fossil fuel deal that should outrage every taxpayer, to a pivotal election with major clean energy stakes, there is a _lot_ to unpack. Let's dive in. 👇
* * *
**📰 Jane Took the Stage at the No Kings Rally** History was made on the streets of America last month. An estimated 8 million people participated in the No Kings movement, and Jane headlined one of the largest rallies of the day in St. Paul, Minnesota, sharing the stage with Governor Tim Walz, Senator Bernie Sanders, Lieutenant Gov. Peggy Flanagan, and Bruce Springsteen. This rally was deeply personal for Minnesota. The state has been at the center of the fight against this administration’s immigration crackdown, and Jane was there to stand with the community and speak truth to power, as she always does. | [**HERE’S WHAT JANE HAD TO SAY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128828529/612476455/144443895?refcode=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTQxMjM3LTAxMzEtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fi_4wMMQbFPdXty7GQeLDTww2q4YQF5uVGmVwAWS598=&emci=09defd46-772f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**📅 Major JanePAC Election Update**
Tuesday, April 7, is a big moment for the climate movement. We’re facing one of our first major elections of the year, where our endorsed candidates are going head-to-head with candidates backed by Turning Point for seats on Arizona’s Salt River Project Board.
Yes, _that_ Turning Point.
Electing our clean energy slate to the largest public utility in the nation sends a message Big Oil can't ignore: that people-powered movements win when we show up.
There is no better way to build momentum in this critical election year than by defeating groups like Turning Point and showing Big Oil that we are just getting started. More soon. We’ll be in touch with results after Tuesday’s elections!
[**HELP JANEPAC FIGHT BACK →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128828530/612476456/2105508926?refcode=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTQxMjM3LTAxMzEtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fi_4wMMQbFPdXty7GQeLDTww2q4YQF5uVGmVwAWS598=)
---
* * *
**📚 Must-Read**
**Trump’s $1B payoff to stop offshore wind is even stranger than it sounds**

_**\- GRIST**_
---
Offshore wind delivers reliable, affordable energy into America's power grid.
With electric bills skyrocketing, we have to ask: why is the Trump administration paying $1 billion to walk away from these projects?
1️⃣ To them, it's free money — but in reality, that billion dollars is taxpayer money. __We__ are footing the bill to cancel this clean energy contract.
2️⃣ Blocking clean energy allows Trump to continue enriching the oil executives that bankrolled his campaign. More money for them, higher bills for us.
As one former Biden official put it, this is a “backdoor deal done with zero transparency,” while ratepayers in states counting on that offshore wind are left holding the bag.
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128828531/612476457/144455668?refcode=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmMTQxMjM3LTAxMzEtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fi_4wMMQbFPdXty7GQeLDTww2q4YQF5uVGmVwAWS598=&emci=09defd46-772f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=cf141237-0131-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**✊ Your Chance to Join the Conversation**
One of the most powerful actions you can take to elect the next generation of climate leaders is showing up and talking directly to voters.
So far this year, Jane PAC volunteers have helped our climate champions reach out to more than 50,000 voters in crucial down-ballot races. When so many state and local elections are won or lost on potentially razor-thin margins, every call, text, and door knock could make all the difference on Election Day.
As we head deeper into this crucial election year, JanePAC is ramping up phone banks and text banks to help our endorsed candidates reach and mobilize voters in must-win races across the country. Whether you have an hour to spare or want to make it a regular commitment, every single conversation moves the needle.

clean_body: We have a lot to discuss. | Welcome to the April edition of The JanePAC Monthly. From Jane taking the stage at one of the largest protests in American history, to a backroom fossil fuel deal that should outrage every taxpayer, to a pivotal election with major clean energy stakes, there is a lot to unpack. Let's dive in. 👇 📰 Jane Took the Stage at the No Kings Rally History was made on the streets of America last month. An estimated 8 million people participated in the No Kings movement, and Jane headlined one of the largest rallies of the day in St. Paul, Minnesota, sharing the stage with Governor Tim Walz, Senator Bernie Sanders, Lieutenant Gov. Peggy Flanagan, and Bruce Springsteen. This rally was deeply personal for Minnesota. The state has been at the center of the fight against this administration’s immigration crackdown, and Jane was there to stand with the community and speak truth to power, as she always does. | 📅 Major JanePAC Election Update Tuesday, April 7, is a big moment for the climate movement. We’re facing one of our first major elections of the year, where our endorsed candidates are going head-to-head with candidates backed by Turning Point for seats on Arizona’s Salt River Project Board. Yes, that Turning Point. Electing our clean energy slate to the largest public utility in the nation sends a message Big Oil can't ignore: that people-powered movements win when we show up. There is no better way to build momentum in this critical election year than by defeating groups like Turning Point and showing Big Oil that we are just getting started. More soon. We’ll be in touch with results after Tuesday’s elections! = 📚 Must-Read Trump’s $1B payoff to stop offshore wind is even stranger than it sounds \- GRIST Offshore wind delivers reliable, affordable energy into America's power grid. With electric bills skyrocketing, we have to ask: why is the Trump administration paying $1 billion to walk away from these projects? 1️⃣ To them, it's free money — but in reality, that billion dollars is taxpayer money. We are footing the bill to cancel this clean energy contract. 2️⃣ Blocking clean energy allows Trump to continue enriching the oil executives that bankrolled his campaign. More money for them, higher bills for us. As one former Biden official put it, this is a “backdoor deal done with zero transparency,” while ratepayers in states counting on that offshore wind are left holding the bag. ✊ Your Chance to Join the Conversation One of the most powerful actions you can take to elect the next generation of climate leaders is showing up and talking directly to voters. So far this year, Jane PAC volunteers have helped our climate champions reach out to more than 50,000 voters in crucial down-ballot races. When so many state and local elections are won or lost on potentially razor-thin margins, every call, text, and door knock could make all the difference on Election Day. As we head deeper into this crucial election year, JanePAC is ramping up phone banks and text banks to help our endorsed candidates reach and mobilize voters in must-win races across the country. Whether you have an hour to spare or want to make it a regular commitment, every single conversation moves the needle. We'd love to have you join us. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. In solidarity, – Team JanePAC = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States
