subject: Friend, have you heard that traffickers follow the crowds?
body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
Sound of FreedomBefore the crowds arrive, volunteers have prepared to protect vulnerable children. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE

Friend,

When a major sporting event comes to Dayton, Ohio…

Hotels fill quickly.
Bars are packed.
Crowds celebrate.

Fans wear their team colors and cheer for victory.

But law enforcement knows something else happens too.

Sex trafficking spikes.

Traffickers follow the crowds.

Because where thousands of visitors gather, buyers often show up too. And hidden inside busy hotels and motels…young girls can be sold for sex.

Most fans never see it. Families staying in a hotel for the next game have no idea what is happening just down the hall.

But for vulnerable young girls…these weekends can be some of the most dangerous days of the year.

And events like the men’s college basketball tournament are no exception.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Help Protect Children Now

Large sporting events create the perfect conditions traffickers exploit.

Packed hotels. Busy streets. Strangers coming and going.

All of it creates cover for those who want to hide evil in plain sight.

That is why the Sound of Freedom Foundation exists.

We are a faith-driven movement dedicated to one mission:
Stop the sale of God’s children.

Through prevention, education, and support for rescue efforts, we work to protect vulnerable children and help communities fight trafficking.

After producing the film Sound of Freedom, I realized something. Awareness was only the beginning.

The real mission was protecting children in the real world.

Real lives were still at risk.
Real children still needed protection.

For more than two decades, Dayton Ohio has hosted the games that tip off the men’s college basketball tournament.

Thousands of fans travel to the city each year. Visitors arrive from across the country.

And with crowds this large…traffickers often follow.

Ohio ranks among the top states in the nation for reported human trafficking cases.

Children in small towns, suburbs, and cities can all become targets, especially when large events bring thousands of spectators.

But this year, something powerful happened before the tournament even began.

Volunteers across Dayton stepped forward.

Ordinary people. Parents. Students. Believers.
People who refuse to look away.

They gathered for a special training organized by partners of the Sound of Freedom Foundation.

They learned how to recognize the warning signs of trafficking.

They prepared outreach kits that included soap bars and makeup remover wipes with a hotline number that victims can call for help.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

Those kits were delivered to hotels, motels, and shelters across the Dayton area.

Because sometimes a child trapped in exploitation sees that number…and realizes escape is possible.

Jesus said,

“Whoever welcomes one little child like this in my name welcomes me.” — Matthew 18:5

Children deserve safety and freedom.

But this mission cannot happen without people like you stepping forward.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

Because traffickers follow every major event.

Big games. Concerts.Tournaments.Conventions.

That is why the Sound of Freedom Foundation partners are already preparing for the next major gathering just around the corner - training volunteers, equipping communities, and placing life-saving resources where traffickers operate.

So when darkness moves in…someone is ready to shine a light.

And that is where you come in.

Your gift today helps place trained volunteers exactly where traffickers hope no one is watching.

Right where children may need help the most.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Help Protect Children Now

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Your generosity today of $60, $120, $180 or whatever you can give can make a real difference:

$60 helps equip one trained volunteer
$120 strengthens outreach and training materials
$180 expands protection across multiple hotel locations
$240 multiplies our presence when traffickers are most active

When I first learned what traffickers do to children…it stopped being a project. It became a call.

Because when good people stay silent…evil grows.
When faithful people act…light enters the darkness.

Children find hope.

Will you answer that call today?

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Help Protect Children Now

Together we can push back the darkness, protect vulnerable children and stop the sale of God’s children.

Please give as generously as you can today.

Please pray for the volunteers and partners standing watch for vulnerable children.

Every child protected and every life rescued is a victory worth celebrating.

With gratitude and prayer,

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation

6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

(c) 2026 Parler, All Rights Reserved.

But this mission cannot happen without people like you stepping forward. Because traffickers follow every major event. Big games. Concerts.Tournaments.Conventions. That is why the Sound of Freedom Foundation partners are already preparing for the next major gathering just around the corner - training volunteers, equipping communities, and placing life-saving resources where traffickers operate. So when darkness moves in…someone is ready to shine a light. And that is where you come in. Your gift today helps place trained volunteers exactly where traffickers hope no one is watching. Right where children may need help the most. Help Protect Children Now Your generosity today of $60, $120, $180 or whatever you can give can make a real difference: $60 helps equip one trained volunteer $120 strengthens outreach and training materials $180 expands protection across multiple hotel locations $240 multiplies our presence when traffickers are most active When I first learned what traffickers do to children…it stopped being a project. It became a call. Because when good people stay silent…evil grows. When faithful people act…light enters the darkness. Children find hope. Will you answer that call today? Help Protect Children Now Together we can push back the darkness, protect vulnerable children and stop the sale of God’s children. Please give as generously as you can today. Please pray for the volunteers and partners standing watch for vulnerable children. Every child protected and every life rescued is a victory worth celebrating. With gratitude and prayer, Eduardo Verástegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

**Mike Johnson is hosting a big dollar fundraising event for the opposition campaign against this critical redistricting amendment.**

Just like the YES campaign is ramping up our efforts in the final stretch of this election, so is our opposition. They’re courting high-dollar donors because they want to continue flooding the Commonwealth with misinformation and blatant lies.
Don’t forget, Republicans have already:
1. Sent out mailers comparing the redistricting amendment to Jim Crow.

This is what we’re up against. We’re up against Republicans with wealthy billionaire donors who aren’t afraid to use misinformation and confusion to muddy the waters and keep Virginia voters in the dark.
They don’t care about protecting Virginians’ right to vote. They only care about following Trump’s marching orders to rig the 2026 midterm elections.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: A virtually indestructible new chassis material—stronger than steel, lighter than aluminum—being hailed by insiders as the “miracle metal” of the auto world. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | It was supposed to be an ordinary test drive. Until a semi barreled through the intersection at 65 mph. Two vehicles. Two drivers. One car? Crushed like a soda can. The other? Barely a scratch. The driver walked away with a bruised ego. It doesn’t just survive crashes. It's now being used in: Self-driving car sensors EV battery shielding Military-grade EV fleets AI-powered manufacturing arms And get this... body:

body:
60 seconds of your time

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2664%2E49239%2E7aFQwC)

Null, we want to thank you for being a part of Haley's team as we work to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.
Since you're one of Haley's top supporters, we also want to invite you to share your thoughts and help shape the future of our campaign:
**[Will you take 60 seconds to complete our Senate Campaign Strategy Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16398?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=2664%2E49239%2E7aFQwC)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16398?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=2664%2E49239%2E7aFQwC)
---
Your input is so important as we work to build a winning campaign and deliver progress for every Michigander.

Thank you in advance for taking the time to weigh in,

Team Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16403?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=2664%2E49239%2E7aFQwC) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16402?t=6&akid=2664%2E49239%2E7aFQwC)
---

Thank you,
Haley

subject: 5 races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
5 key races will decide whether Democrats will control the Senate, folks.

[**_We have a real opportunity to defend vulnerable seats and flip competitive ones in states like Maine, Ohio, Georgia, North Carolina, and Alaska. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5 today – $1 for each seat – so we have the resources to compete everywhere it matters and flip the Senate. We need to hit our $10,000 daily fundraising goal before midnight._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128836870/612489466/948195731?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.05_Races_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg1M2ZlMi0wOTMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIw46IVCwRz6nQWDL3YTDvh4UXAZxLqtZGzkzk9oHuM=) | | [ CHIP IN $5 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128836872/612489468/948195731?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.05_Races_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg1M2ZlMi0wOTMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIw46IVCwRz6nQWDL3YTDvh4UXAZxLqtZGzkzk9oHuM=)

Make no mistake: whether we win or lose will come down to what we do right now. _Five races means 5x the resources,_ on air, on the ground, and online, to reach voters and win.

That’s why we’ve set up a $10,000 goal before midnight tonight, to make early investments across all 5 battleground states.

If we fall short, Republicans will funnel in super PAC money, flooding the airwaves with misinformation and attacks.

We’ve seen the consequences of that time after time. And the only way to hold Trump and his allies accountable is by flipping the Senate and building a real check on their power.

[**_Now that you know what’s at stake, will you chip in $5 or more to help us hit our $10,000 goal before midnight and secure the resources to win these races and take back the Senate majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128836877/612489472/948195731?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.05_Races_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg1M2ZlMi0wOTMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIw46IVCwRz6nQWDL3YTDvh4UXAZxLqtZGzkzk9oHuM=)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: To those who celebrate, Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7694?t=1&akid=8761%2E400544%2Eh-Tiww)
---
Hi friend,

I wanted to take a minute this Sunday to recognize all the different ways people spend the day, whether that’s with family, community, or just taking time for yourself. And for those celebrating today, Happy Easter! I hope you have a wonderful day.

Easter holds special meaning to those of us in New Mexico, which is home to one of the largest religious pilgrimages in the nation.
Every year, the country watches as streams of families walk along the highway on a pilgrimage to the Santuario de Chimayó, a church just north of Santa Fe.

They walk anywhere between 7 to 30 miles to seek healing, pray for loved ones, and honor Easter Sunday. It's an incredibly moving sight — _and every year it reminds me of how unique our state is._

We're home to some of the most vibrant, diverse cultures anywhere in the world, friend. And I am incredibly honored to be of and from New Mexico, leading the fight to protect our communities, our culture, and our traditions.
To everyone who celebrates today, I hope you have a wonderful Easter — and to those who made their way to the Santuario de Chimayó this week, I hope your pilgrimage was a source of peace and reflection.

Warm wishes,

Deb
|

name: Jim Jordan
subject: No one should ever accuse you of being a Democrat
body:
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Patriot!
| Patriot,
---
I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us.
---
All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you **_“betrayed”_** the Republican Party and became a Democrat?
---
So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing?
---
**_Give me a break! That’s just insulting._**
---
_Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low._
---
Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do.
---
Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1.
---
At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION _**away**_ from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who _truly_ needed help.
---
**You know what I care about most?** The _ONLY_ thing that WINS elections – **_VOTES_**.
---
_That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I _always_ have the best, most accurate data in the country._
---
That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026.
---
[**Please complete the brief questionnaire to verify that YOU are among the highest propensity voters we can count on in the midterms – and then I’ll officially mark you as “verified” in our GOP Voter file for the month.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=62f4a7371454438895beefc1c4196d3b&_e=dFnWLa5r4MRwmcqTFCBkfJtqc_X458nwPPqjSpwRHaz2DEwrtja5bE0k0XhD5FTXIyjRn9NK3fM3c2Ke7B_R66WObHYYrIdxv1zUPxuXWl5wZAaD49wdqJqNuy1LGtfatUFCgmn88GaSLJDcUSOSEiw41sZq7-QNnsdhKN18VnPyWYFqGYDipvsAfbrJQ8IBHF3nUvKMdNyxb9BJSypGINayOAKQ01kREa1S-1x7bpgypSvVpxtH16juOQQJuvNrVP_4Ksiqduo7pO_wHn95vd5RHHuP4x12sPjoWYo1MRXFSF6lL1e0FFVB9UhXep-VeQvvOmjOY6PPJ09cswFn8Y4P2JLX6U8C_jdcgd-zlTB6_hK9VAm7NkLo0M2QoHvI64WzLV-wzh3SXkGC9HPCBn7SUvVJrTSnygTKgqyq8noQUCsv3wreyc4XW3GvTSvZTJV4MyLkAsJF137-gIG-zCDzO_xAxI3zUwNZLrpEG1--Hun6kqUPRm7WJ3YXGu-hO8EbFrrazLZboC4OvdzrV7x2o_giAN06nbO89p3fLr_AFj7weGglaa5X6_wLw5XQd7c8mQKIdUNPtrWj7FiNTQ%3D%3D)

install his fourth loyalist on the Court.

Make no mistake: this is about Trump putting a crony judge on the highest

no matter the consequences.

If he succeeds, it will cement a conservative supermajority that could
control the Court and bend the rule of law to his will.

The implications are enormous. A fourth Trump justice doesn’t just tilt
the Court — it changes it for a generation, threatening rights and
freedoms we’ve fought for decades to protect.

This is court-packing for authoritarian power, and we cannot let it
happen.

back. But we cannot do this without you.

body:

---
---
| | [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oPoHX-tUQrMMtqSjW-38szAvux4z8NNoh4KcPv-UVOeKil0nR-ZnjBGIYVUup70niuFJzTm2y1AC7iRmgiQ7_lml9cVyXdfsqLtm3XDlRX_EjrvMtq7eHJVHwFtvYCVMRoNqCxLnPm2SHMUbYvC8RkIShmaY0ibN0elgASzDXTkdgPX6t83BX6S_MZ1fhEV11zunNVFYBMQx9H0nkSNuJpwsF4fP7ocm9s5s8q6EXq3i3SLuyOxmmMdvJnLYaOxu-mVDfV42i8M=&c=OOo9wq-5YcQwzufm1_TBFGkxGQKwZ6lZniqCT4H3NkUAn6C58B4Yeg==&ch=UDO67I_FsTbgCJjSCqxx28rdsgOHe1TsVqgR1t6kH4lSWPQdPZGcTA==)
---
| | Friend,
Last April, records were shattered in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election.
Two million voters showed up. Over $100 million spent. Elon Musk flew to Wisconsin and handed out million-dollar checks. Democrats won anyway.
But this year's April 7th WI Supreme Court race is a completely different story and it could be catastrophic for Democrats.
Absentee ballots are down 112,000 from this point last year. Spending is down 90%. A new poll shows only 12% of Wisconsin voters have heard anything about this race.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oPoHX-tUQrMMtqSjW-38szAvux4z8NNoh4KcPv-UVOeKil0nR-ZnjBGIYVUup70niuFJzTm2y1AC7iRmgiQ7_lml9cVyXdfsqLtm3XDlRX_EjrvMtq7eHJVHwFtvYCVMRoNqCxLnPm2SHMUbYvC8RkIShmaY0ibN0elgASzDXTkdgPX6t83BX6S_MZ1fhEV11zunNVFYBMQx9H0nkSNuJpwsF4fP7ocm9s5s8q6EXq3i3SLuyOxmmNceZda8x8qc4QrGYNKtwt4=&c=OOo9wq-5YcQwzufm1_TBFGkxGQKwZ6lZniqCT4H3NkUAn6C58B4Yeg==&ch=UDO67I_FsTbgCJjSCqxx28rdsgOHe1TsVqgR1t6kH4lSWPQdPZGcTA==)
---
| This is how MAGA wins.
And a loss here would be devastating for Dems--it would put MAGA on a path to flip the WI Supreme Court just months before the 2028 presidential election.
State supreme courts decide which votes count, how districts get drawn, and whether any challenge to an election outcome gets heard. Put MAGA judges on that bench and every one of those decisions gets made in MAGA's favor in 2028.
Right now, Defend Our Courts has identified 588,000 Democratic voters in Wisconsin and we're desperately scrambling to turnout as many of them as possible in these final 2 days.
But we don't have the resources to reach all of them. Not yet. Every dollar we raise in the next 2 days lets us contact more voters -- voters who are largely undecided, in a race where a few thousand votes could decide everything.
Our efforts could be the difference in this race. That's why we're asking you today: [There are only 2 days until election day and it's coming down to a mad dash to turnout as many voters as possible. clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | | Friend, Last April, records were shattered in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election. Two million voters showed up. Over $100 million spent. Elon Musk flew to Wisconsin and handed out million-dollar checks. Democrats won anyway. But this year's April 7th WI Supreme Court race is a completely different story and it could be catastrophic for Democrats. Absentee ballots are down 112,000 from this point last year. Spending is down 90%. A new poll shows only 12% of Wisconsin voters have heard anything about this race. | == | This is how MAGA wins. And a loss here would be devastating for Dems--it would put MAGA on a path to flip the WI Supreme Court just months before the 2028 presidential election. State supreme courts decide which votes count, how districts get drawn, and whether any challenge to an election outcome gets heard. Put MAGA judges on that bench and every one of those decisions gets made in MAGA's favor in 2028. Right now, Defend Our Courts has identified 588,000 Democratic voters in Wisconsin and we're desperately scrambling to turnout as many of them as possible in these final 2 days. But we don't have the resources to reach all of them. Not yet. Every dollar we raise in the next 2 days lets us contact more voters -- voters who are largely undecided, in a race where a few thousand votes could decide everything. Our efforts could be the difference in this race. That's why we're asking you today: == | | | | | == | == | == | == Only 2 days. 588,000 Democrats. We need your help to reach all of them. If you've been waiting for the perfect time to make a contribution, NOW is that time. Team Defend our Courts | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: A brutal new wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.

| | | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyU0EGOnDAQheHTmB2oMAa6FywijdhNFlGkLFFhF40VY1vlcrdy-ygt5QBzgafv_b8-t0_0wcfHd7xoYTk2LhvuXAVDpNcLn7Rp0FMLpoVxy5xKJitb37jFWYe9bWjp53k0ME8amnPB22H1Xd_MMcC0wzEOcKce98lYY_d5bPzybxAMjP1kRrh3E4Bzs6Z9Hwa4zUYZwEAsHVOue_AWo2D5fSS21Nl0NWE5RXJRwzelV6VXlyIKdQWfJCdl4kK2Cjl7si_iMZYu8UPplalUZrLiU2xLjQ7_tO935UwsW25zympYq1ybWDV8_Pi5tv-xSk9MtjL7-FDDh3ClhheXXz4EX6ZZGXhc6MNbKF9K-Vz03wAAAP__OZ6CAg)
---
Friend, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyU0EGOnDAQheHTmB2oMAa6FywijdhNFlGkLFFhF40VY1vlcrdy-ygt5QBzgafv_b8-t0_0wcfHd7xoYTk2LhvuXAVDpNcLn7Rp0FMLpoVxy5xKJitb37jFWYe9bWjp53k0ME8amnPB22H1Xd_MMcC0wzEOcKce98lYY_d5bPzybxAMjP1kRrh3E4Bzs6Z9Hwa4zUYZwEAsHVOue_AWo2D5fSS21Nl0NWE5RXJRwzelV6VXlyIKdQWfJCdl4kK2Cjl7si_iMZYu8UPplalUZrLiU2xLjQ7_tO935UwsW25zympYq1ybWDV8_Pi5tv-xSk9MtjL7-FDDh3ClhheXXz4EX6ZZGXhc6MNbKF9K-Vz03wAAAP__OZ6CAg)
---
These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable.

**[Your gift today will fuel our advocacy, amplify their stories, open doors with policymakers, and send a powerful message to the persecuted: You are seen. You are not alone. The risen Christ stands with you — and so do we.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyU0EGOnDAQheHTmB2oMAa6FywijdhNFlGkLFFhF40VY1vlcrdy-ygt5QBzgafv_b8-t0_0wcfHd7xoYTk2LhvuXAVDpNcLn7Rp0FMLpoVxy5xKJitb37jFWYe9bWjp53k0ME8amnPB22H1Xd_MMcC0wzEOcKce98lYY_d5bPzybxAMjP1kRrh3E4Bzs6Z9Hwa4zUYZwEAsHVOue_AWo2D5fSS21Nl0NWE5RXJRwzelV6VXlyIKdQWfJCdl4kK2Cjl7si_iMZYu8UPplalUZrLiU2xLjQ7_tO935UwsW25zympYq1ybWDV8_Pi5tv-xSk9MtjL7-FDDh3ClhheXXz4EX6ZZGXhc6MNbKF9K-Vz03wAAAP__OZ6CAg)**

_Will you act now?_ Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church.

He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged.

In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen
President & CEO
Save the Persecuted Christians
---
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyU0EGOnDAQheHTmB2oMAa6FywijdhNFlGkLFFhF40VY1vlcrdy-ygt5QBzgafv_b8-t0_0wcfHd7xoYTk2LhvuXAVDpNcLn7Rp0FMLpoVxy5xKJitb37jFWYe9bWjp53k0ME8amnPB22H1Xd_MMcC0wzEOcKce98lYY_d5bPzybxAMjP1kRrh3E4Bzs6Z9Hwa4zUYZwEAsHVOue_AWo2D5fSS21Nl0NWE5RXJRwzelV6VXlyIKdQWfJCdl4kK2Cjl7si_iMZYu8UPplalUZrLiU2xLjQ7_tO935UwsW25zympYq1ybWDV8_Pi5tv-xSk9MtjL7-FDDh3ClhheXXz4EX6ZZGXhc6MNbKF9K-Vz03wAAAP__OZ6CAg)

name: Yen Bailey
subject: Happy Easter from Yen
body:
Happy Easter!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/yenbaileyforcongress/team-bailey-march-newsletter-8347628?e=58216231a8)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=d3ba0ad161&e=58216231a8)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=8b86763564&e=58216231a8)
| | | | | | | | | | | |
Dear friend,

I wanted to take a break from the campaign and wish you and your family a very Happy Easter.
From the Gulf Coast to our inland farm communities, this is such a beautiful time of year across North Florida. Whether you are hosting a backyard egg hunt, gathered around the table for a family meal, or simply taking advantage of the weekend to enjoy the sunshine, I hope your day is filled with warmth and relaxation.
Easter Sunday is a wonderful reminder of the importance of tradition and the deep connections we share as neighbors. Our district is vast and diverse, but the spirit of community that binds us together is what makes this region so special.
I feel incredibly honored to be running to represent such a vibrant part of our state. However you are spending the day, I wish you a peaceful Sunday and a joyful season of renewal.

Warmly,
Yen Bailey

subject: We can stop a GOP lockout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41097%2E3422442%2EZuRHsj)
Peter,

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui?=
subject: Friend, have you heard that traffickers follow the crowds?
body:
Before the crowds arrive, volunteers have prepared to protect vulnerable children.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1012402/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOVRUUlQ5cTh4ag/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDU/LbmNsN3laUzZMcQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V2tFQzV5dlBscw/gadKUAw/s1tdca1bc0e)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Friend, When a major sporting event comes to Dayton, Ohio... Hotels fill quickly.
Bars are packed.
Crowds celebrate. Fans wear their team colors and cheer for victory. But law enforcement knows something else happens too. **Sex trafficking spikes.** **Traffickers follow the crowds.** Because where thousands of visitors gather, buyers often show up too. And hidden inside busy hotels and motels...young girls can be sold for sex. Most fans never see it. Families staying in a hotel for the next game have no idea what is happening just down the hall. But for vulnerable young girls...these weekends can be some of the most dangerous days of the year. And events like the men’s college basketball tournament are no exception.
---
[ Help Protect Children Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Large sporting events create the perfect conditions traffickers exploit. Packed hotels. Busy streets. Strangers coming and going. All of it creates cover for those who want to hide evil in plain sight. That is why the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** exists. We are a faith-driven movement dedicated to one mission:
**Stop the sale of God’s children.** Through prevention, education, and support for rescue efforts, we work to protect vulnerable children and help communities fight trafficking. After producing the film _Sound of Freedom_ , I realized something. Awareness was only the beginning. **The real mission was protecting children in the real world.** **Real lives were still at risk.**
**Real children still needed protection.** For more than two decades, Dayton Ohio has hosted the games that tip off the men’s college basketball tournament. Thousands of fans travel to the city each year. Visitors arrive from across the country. And with crowds this large...traffickers often follow. Ohio ranks among the **top states in the nation for reported human trafficking cases.** Children in small towns, suburbs, and cities can all become targets, especially when large events bring thousands of spectators. But this year, something powerful happened **before the tournament even began.** Volunteers across Dayton stepped forward. **Ordinary people. Parents. Students. Believers.**
**People who refuse to look away.** They gathered for a special training organized by partners of the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** They learned how to recognize the warning signs of trafficking. They prepared outreach kits that included soap bars and makeup remover wipes with a hotline number that victims can call for help.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Those kits were delivered to hotels, motels, and shelters across the Dayton area. Because sometimes a child trapped in exploitation sees that number...and realizes escape is possible. Jesus said, _“Whoever welcomes one little child like this in my name welcomes me.” —_ Matthew 18:5 **Children deserve safety and freedom.
**
**But this mission cannot happen without people like you stepping forward.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Because traffickers follow **every major event.** Big games. Concerts.Tournaments.Conventions. That is why the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** partners are already preparing for the _next_ major gathering just around the corner - **training volunteers, equipping communities, and placing life-saving resources where traffickers operate.** So when darkness moves in...someone is ready to shine a light. **And that is where you come in.** **Your gift today helps place trained volunteers exactly where traffickers hope no one is watching.** Right where children may need help the most.
---
[ Help Protect Children Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
__[_**Your generosity today of $60, $120, $180 or whatever you can give can make a real**_ _**difference:**_](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)__ $60 helps equip one trained volunteer
$120 strengthens outreach and training materials
$180 expands protection across multiple hotel locations
$240 multiplies our presence when traffickers are most active When I first learned what traffickers do to children...it stopped being a project. **It became a call.** Because when good people stay silent...evil grows.
**When faithful people act...light enters the darkness.**

**Children find hope.** Will you answer that call today?
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ Help Protect Children Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Together** we can push back the darkness, protect vulnerable children and **stop the sale of God’s children**. **Please give as generously as you can today.**

**Please pray for the volunteers and partners standing watch for vulnerable children.** **Every child protected and every life rescued is a victory worth celebrating.** With gratitude and prayer,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1012402/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDU/LbmNsN3laUzZMcQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V2tFQzV5dlBscw/gadKUAw/s2vd7b397b3)

name: Jena G.
subject: From my family to yours — Happy Easter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
I wanted to take a quick moment to wish you a very happy Easter.
Whether you’re spending the day gathered around the table with family or out in the yard hiding (or finding!) easter eggs, I hope today brings a little joy, a little laughter, and some well-deserved time with the people you love most.
I’ve always believed the traditions, the time together, and the memories we make matter. It’s what so much of this work is about: protecting a way of life where families can gather, celebrate, and look forward with hope.
Wishing you a beautiful Easter Sunday 💛
— Jena

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This is one of the last times I’ll ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260405-1340&t=1&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_2_ak.0gyo8d&amount=10&refcode=em20260405-1340&t=3&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)
Folks, it’s crunch time.
Judge Chris Taylor’s election is this Tuesday, and these final days are when everything happens at once:
**Outside money floods in, attacks ramp up, and every decision about resources matters more than ever.**
This is also one of the last times I’ll reach out to ask for your support. [**If you’re ready and able to support Judge Chris Taylor, please pitch in any amount today.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_2_ak.0gyo8d&amount=10&refcode=em20260405-1340&t=4&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_2_ak.0gyo8d&amount=10&refcode=em20260405-1340&t=23&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)**
Judge Chris Taylor is exactly the kind of leader Wisconsin needs on our state’s Supreme Court — fair, principled, and always on the side of people, not special interests. But she can’t win this election on values alone.
Right now, every dollar raised goes directly toward what will decide the outcome:
* Keeping ads on the air
* Reaching undecided voters
* Responding to last-minute attacks

So, I’m asking you personally: [**Can you pitch in $10 or any amount to support Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_2_ak.0gyo8d&amount=10&refcode=em20260405-1340&t=24&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_2_ak.0gyo8d&amount=10&refcode=em20260405-1340&t=43&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)**
Thank you,
Tammy
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260405-1340&t=44&refcode2=1360_294397_xr9w1R&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=45&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=46&akid=1360%2E294397%2Exr9w1R)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: AMAC Action
subject: We need to reach 1 million patriots calling for term limits
body:
Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.

You know it and I know it -- Congress is broken.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it -- Congress is broken. Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.Left-wing radicals like Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez work to destroy our country from within. And Washington never fixes anything. **[Today, WE THE PEOPLE have a chance to do something about it when you sign your “Time for Term Limits” petition and submit it in the next 72 hours.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)** Our Founding Fathers never intended for government service to be a permanent career. George Washington famously served just two terms — then went home.Our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves.That’s why they included a powerful safeguard in our Constitution -- an escape hatch -- enshrined in Article V. If Congress ever became too corrupt to fix itself, Article V. says the states can use this provision in the Constitution to act.34 state legislatures can call a convention, propose term limits -- and Congress can’t do a thing about it. [**Here at AMAC Action, we have led the term limits movement in the past, and we are ready to put our efforts behind the movement once again.**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)
---
[ **Time for Term Limits** ](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)
---
My friend, can you imagine Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez spending 30 more years in Congress?? We are AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of Americans, “action” is what we’re known for.President Trump has said that AMAC Action is so effective that members of Congress run the other way when they see our delegates coming down the hall. And our **“Time for Term Limits”** Petition Drive certainly has Washington lifers on the run![**Please sign your petition and submit it in the next 72 hours.**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)
---
**>>** No more golden pensions for people who work 170 days a year and spend half of that just trying to get reelected.**>>** No more using the power of the office to destroy American values from within.**>>** No more insider deals to get rich.**>>** No more jobs for life with nothing to show for it!
---
Some of these grifters and America-haters have been “working” in Congress over 30, and even 40 years!
---
* **Maxine Waters — 34 years**
* **Chuck Schumer — 44 years**
* **Patty Murray — 33 years**

---
They’ve been in the swamp so long they’ve grown gills. Please – let’s not let them drag America down into the swamp with them. It’s time to use the escape hatch our Founders left for us.34 state legislatures are needed. What will embolden states to act is seeing a massive groundswell of support for term limits from millions of Americans just like you.That’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this massive 50-state Petition Drive and why you got my email today.You’ve proven that you’re a patriot who can be counted on to take action. **[Please sign your “Time for Term Limits” petition and submit it in the next 72 hours with your sacrificial donation of $35, $50 or more to spread this national campaign across America.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)** We need to reach **1 million** patriots with petitions just like yours.And that takes time and money.The Washington lifers are counting on having more power, influence, and resources than the American people.They’re counting on our complacency and despair.But here at AMAC Action we say: Let’s finish the fight our Founders began and restore America’s government to the people.Your $35 gift is enough to send and collect 50 more **“Time for Term Limits”** petitions across email, text, and mail. Your gift of $70 funds 100 more **“Time for Term Limits”** petitions.Singlehandedly, you are an indispensable force-multiplier in this effort. But if you do nothing, nothing changes.
---
* Immigration policy will never get fixed and just stay a meaningless election year talking point.
* America’s spending and debt will continue to grow unchecked. Remember when we had a balanced budget? We can get back there if career politicians do something!
* Social Security will keep getting raided while real policies to protect your benefits sit on the back burner.
* Healthcare costs will do nothing but skyrocket leaving seniors vulnerable.
* America’s children will stay trapped in the leftwing indoctrination centers we call “public schools.”
* Radicals like Ilhan Omar, Corey Booker, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will continue to undermine America’s founding values.
* And the Washington, D.C. fat-cats will just get fatter and lazier.

---
Please join our army of patriots who are fed-up with the Washington lifers who work against our interests while our country sinks. What’s even more frustrating is that President Trump has policies that can save the ship and Washington lifers stand in his way! **[Your signed “Time for Term Limits” petition is critical. And we appreciate your donation whether it’s $35, $50 or anything higher or lower. What’s most important is that you respond in the next 72 hours.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)** **One million “Time for Term Limits” petitions is a bold goal but we can do it if we all pitch in.** Every dollar helps. Every signature counts. Every day matters.Thank you and may God bless you and these United States.
---
| | With hope and urgency,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)
---
| | P.S. 80% of the American people and President Trump support term limits! But Congress will never vote to limit itself. That’s why the states -- We the People -- must do it. Our Founding Fathers left us a Constitutional escape hatch in case Congress was sinking the ship. It’s Article V. of the Constitution and it’s time we use it to make term limits law. **[Please sign your “Time for Term Limits” petition and submit it with your emergency gift of $35, $50 or more in the next 72 hours.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyckM2K2zAQgJ9GvtlII_nv4EMWx0uhLiWE7VHIo3EiatlClrOvXxK2L7DH-WCG-b4_ox6NW9x6-2U8dTHNOu76k1Yim7ZIBu_Cu2Vx2xpMiho4VDlXOS91iNseCJMWme0sWiMwo07UdakE8LbK7h1HEqrm0wTNPMkKRDsrO7dScJiwFZS57nmQK16KhnPRFNAQtLytmrKGUpFgipuFYioihWNaHJo1mf3vvEWkAjefLd09pbAzeWIwMBiMN2gwuW0tIj0eBW4MhmCgsnYuVY2ixNk2qmyYHI7k9b4dEYnJ_q1_zy_nDwbVE3uy7vBM9ufxi6DxwbjbymT_-lmKSr_17_o0nq765_jj-pou5w_9-5RfrsPXWkIm-8t1gPy_aRY7Gz6fTfeqZorfvHHLyyV9t_-jg38BAAD__13JkSs)**

clean_body: Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind. You know it and I know it -- Congress is broken. | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it -- Congress is broken. Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.Left-wing radicals like Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez work to destroy our country from within. And Washington never fixes anything. Our Founding Fathers never intended for government service to be a permanent career. George Washington famously served just two terms — then went home.Our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves.That’s why they included a powerful safeguard in our Constitution -- an escape hatch -- enshrined in Article V. If Congress ever became too corrupt to fix itself, Article V. says the states can use this provision in the Constitution to act.34 state legislatures can call a convention, propose term limits -- and Congress can’t do a thing about it. My friend, can you imagine Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez spending 30 more years in Congress?? We are AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of Americans, “action” is what we’re known for.President Trump has said that AMAC Action is so effective that members of Congress run the other way when they see our delegates coming down the hall. And our “Time for Term Limits” Petition Drive certainly has Washington lifers on the run > No more golden pensions for people who work 170 days a year and spend half of that just trying to get reelected.>> No more using the power of the office to destroy American values from within.>> No more insider deals to get rich.>> No more jobs for life with nothing to show for it! Some of these grifters and America-haters have been “working” in Congress over 30, and even 40 years! Maxine Waters — 34 years Chuck Schumer — 44 years Patty Murray — 33 years They’ve been in the swamp so long they’ve grown gills. Please – let’s not let them drag America down into the swamp with them. It’s time to use the escape hatch our Founders left for us.34 state legislatures are needed. What will embolden states to act is seeing a massive groundswell of support for term limits from millions of Americans just like you.That’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this massive 50-state Petition Drive and why you got my email today.You’ve proven that you’re a patriot who can be counted on to take action. We need to reach 1 million patriots with petitions just like yours.And that takes time and money.The Washington lifers are counting on having more power, influence, and resources than the American people.They’re counting on our complacency and despair.But here at AMAC Action we say: Let’s finish the fight our Founders began and restore America’s government to the people.Your $35 gift is enough to send and collect 50 more “Time for Term Limits” petitions across email, text, and mail. Your gift of $70 funds 100 more “Time for Term Limits” petitions.Singlehandedly, you are an indispensable force-multiplier in this effort. But if you do nothing, nothing changes. Immigration policy will never get fixed and just stay a meaningless election year talking point. America’s spending and debt will continue to grow unchecked. Remember when we had a balanced budget? We can get back there if career politicians do something! Social Security will keep getting raided while real policies to protect your benefits sit on the back burner. Healthcare costs will do nothing but skyrocket leaving seniors vulnerable. America’s children will stay trapped in the leftwing indoctrination centers we call “public schools.” Radicals like Ilhan Omar, Corey Booker, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will continue to undermine America’s founding values. And the Washington, D.C. fat-cats will just get fatter and lazier. Please join our army of patriots who are fed-up with the Washington lifers who work against our interests while our country sinks. What’s even more frustrating is that President Trump has policies that can save the ship and Washington lifers stand in his way! One million “Time for Term Limits” petitions is a bold goal but we can do it if we all pitch in. Every dollar helps. Every signature counts. Every day matters.Thank you and may God bless you and these United States. | | With hope and urgency, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. 80% of the American people and President Trump support term limits! But Congress will never vote to limit itself. That’s why the states -- We the People -- must do it. Our Founding Fathers left us a Constitutional escape hatch in case Congress was sinking the ship. It’s Article V. of the Constitution and it’s time we use it to make term limits law. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Republican Task Force PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Get ICE out of our airports. Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Republicans are sending lawless ICE agents in to intimidate travelers. This can’t go on another day.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260405-6095-footer&t=1&akid=6095%2E420207%2EmCw3kR)
Peter,
Right now, armed ICE agents in tactical vests are roaming through terminals of the busiest airports across the country.
This is _not_ normal. And I want you to understand exactly how we got here.
Trump’s Republicans spent six long weeks refusing to pay TSA workers. _Six weeks._ Over 400 TSA officers have quit, and thousands more called out because they couldn't afford their basic necessities like gas, childcare, and rent while their pay was on pause. Security lines are stretching out of airport doors across the country, and wait times are as high as six hours.
Trump’s solution? Send in his lawless ICE agents to cause further chaos.
Let me be clear: ICE agents are not trained in airport security. They are not TSA officers — they’re Trump’s rogue force who have already shown this country exactly how dangerous they are. They’ve kidnapped immigrants and killed Americans in the street right before our eyes.
They have no business being in our airports.
And here’s what really makes me furious: Steve Bannon, Trump’s own former strategist, just called the airport deployment a “test run” for placing ICE agents at polling places during our elections.
**Read that again, Peter. They’re not just using our airports as political playgrounds; they’re rehearsing for voter intimidation.**
This is what lawlessness and unchecked power look like.
I’m not going to let this go down without a fight — and I need you standing with me.
[**Will you add your name to this petition to demand that ICE get out of our airports _right now_? We can’t let this intimidation go on another day. **](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/em20260405-ice-in-airports/?source=em20260405-6095&t=2&akid=6095%2E420207%2EmCw3kR)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/em20260405-ice-in-airports/?source=em20260405-6095&t=3&akid=6095%2E420207%2EmCw3kR)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260405-6095-footer&t=4&refcode2=6095_420207_mCw3kR&akid=6095%2E420207%2EmCw3kR)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Republicans are sending lawless ICE agents in to intimidate travelers. This can’t go on another day. Peter, Right now, armed ICE agents in tactical vests are roaming through terminals of the busiest airports across the country. This is not normal. And I want you to understand exactly how we got here. Trump’s Republicans spent six long weeks refusing to pay TSA workers. Six weeks. Over 400 TSA officers have quit, and thousands more called out because they couldn't afford their basic necessities like gas, childcare, and rent while their pay was on pause. Security lines are stretching out of airport doors across the country, and wait times are as high as six hours. Trump’s solution? Send in his lawless ICE agents to cause further chaos. Let me be clear: ICE agents are not trained in airport security. They are not TSA officers — they’re Trump’s rogue force who have already shown this country exactly how dangerous they are. They’ve kidnapped immigrants and killed Americans in the street right before our eyes. They have no business being in our airports. And here’s what really makes me furious: Steve Bannon, Trump’s own former strategist, just called the airport deployment a “test run” for placing ICE agents at polling places during our elections. Read that again, Peter. They’re not just using our airports as political playgrounds; they’re rehearsing for voter intimidation. This is what lawlessness and unchecked power look like. I’m not going to let this go down without a fight — and I need you standing with me. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: James Talarico
subject: Love wins in the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
During Holy Week, we remember: Love is stronger than fear.
In these dark times, we all need hope. Hope is what Easter is all about.
Last year, I delivered a sermon at my home church on Easter Sunday. **[You can watch it here:](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2236?t=1&akid=561%2E1347274%2EdNeaxK)**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2236?t=2&akid=561%2E1347274%2EdNeaxK)
Here’s an excerpt of what I had to say:
_“Palm Sunday was not a parade, it was a protest. Overturning tables in the temple was an act of civil disobedience. Crucifixion was punishment for rebels._
_God didn’t invent the cross. Rome did._
_If you don’t think Easter is political, then re-read your Bible. Because during Holy Week, we Christians should be asking ourselves, “what tables still need to be overturned?”_
_..._
_Christianity is a strange religion — our two major holidays, Christmas and Easter, are paradoxical. We celebrate birth in the dead of winter and death in the life of spring. To remind us that both are holy._
_Jesus is alone, rejected, and wounded to affirm the parts of ourselves that are alone, rejected, and wounded. To affirm our suffering. To affirm the hard parts of life._
_Father Richard Rhor says there are two ways to meet God: (1) great love and (2) great suffering. Those are the only two things strong enough to break our egos, to free us of our desire for power and control, to force us to finally let go._
_The Sufi poet, Rumi, put it this way: “The wound is the place where the Light enters you.”_
_..._
_When you walk outside after the service, you’ll see flowers blooming and birds returning. In spring, what was once dead is resurrected._
_Martin Luther said, “God has written the promise of resurrection, not in scripture alone, but in every leaf in springtime.” Everything is a miracle._
_In spring, we celebrate new beginnings — baptisms, weddings, graduations. It’s also the holiest time of year. In spring, billions around the world celebrate Passover, Easter, and Ramadan. We may use different lyrics, but we’re all singing the same hymn:_
_Out of domination, comes liberation_
_Out of darkness, comes light_
_Out of death, comes life_
_Winter doesn’t last forever. Spring is finally here._
_Love wins in the end.”_
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=3&akid=561%2E1347274%2EdNeaxK) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=4&refcode2=561_1347274_dNeaxK&akid=561%2E1347274%2EdNeaxK)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=561%2E1347274%2EdNeaxK).

name: Jim Jordan
subject: No one should ever accuse you of being a Democrat
body:
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Peter!
| Peter,
---
I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us.
---
All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you **_“betrayed”_** the Republican Party and became a Democrat?
---
So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing?
---
**_Give me a break! That’s just insulting._**
---
_Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low._
---
Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do.
---
Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1.
---
At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION _**away**_ from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who _truly_ needed help.
---
**You know what I care about most?** The _ONLY_ thing that WINS elections – **_VOTES_**.
---
_That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I _always_ have the best, most accurate data in the country._
---
That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026.
---
[**Please complete the brief questionnaire to verify that YOU are among the highest propensity voters we can count on in the midterms – and then I’ll officially mark you as “verified” in our GOP Voter file for the month.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2f967e2190f6422693a30c79bdb63cce&_e=w-0Vkyda6rkIo80IlYk4tEFOrlVpiZ5lmwlLJjtevjRXUplR0NVdtHYSl0UbgJn18_nh3vlQk7m1NivwwfTcqI9Ol6Ljk6r1gWXh_50MeNgG3HO_V5JL2p3-jGw4Pf-qkdngo_998qxUZiUetaKn6fJyckc6JLjDEBAWJAWKSXzOjy5MDjyKvv-kQVZ8v1t3ThBUSS59a90gDCtiuHf9yM-hZz4mA9RbEA4biluk0nY4xB4TYGafKD5J-YmQvN2b316nmWGW6vOxcrph6UJptqFmDDMcGIXpZ6DNAQ4G6dqgd91gVvclsUb0ZVbMicKlpRefPJpqfTacVZUi8ZFw3iRkw9c4L_BKoI4cZcLgmTFs3fAls34ViwKcVzRmUhnUEi74i8Wqo5s1EY9badZEzKzS_fWyURgsxN54_LoJTLeDnwgYTeSq1DtwFA94QTMso-BVWY4IOApCjo1ejCiiA9pNUH7JDmxS79x2IT3QyTs4LWBsTph9Tt7IKnmqisdM2l5-6zc8kfHNiOwO_tfCoPI_MBaIrREyOH8YJ41UOXALwh3nmKegugVWcWtMSzpNBgcz7ZVOb--KiRjPiu__Ajb7tVvr9L6oJvHc3JqOsLQ%3D)

clean_body: After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Peter! | Peter, I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us. All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you “betrayed” the Republican Party and became a Democrat? So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing? Give me a break! That’s just insulting. Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low. Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do. Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1. At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION away from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who truly needed help. You know what I care about most? The ONLY thing that WINS elections – VOTES. That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I always have the best, most accurate data in the country. That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026. “Official GOP Voter Verification Questionnaire Scope: Measuring Voter Propensity” GOP Voter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey ID #: 8337-190 | Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040
