name: Chris Pappas
subject: Still sorry about Karoline Leavitt
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH ]Chris Pappas for Senate

I’m sorry
about Karoline Leavitt.

A few years ago, Karoline Leavitt ran against me for Congress here in New
Hampshire. Her campaign was steeped in extreme MAGA rhetoric and zero
connection to the actual issues Granite Staters face every day. Voters saw
right through it and rejected her agenda by nearly 10 points.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260405_1.0LjgVQ&refcode=em20260405-1&t=1003&akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH ]Chris Pappas: 54% Karoline Leavitt: 45.9%

Unfortunately that race turned into a national audition. Now the same
talking points and spin that New Hampshire voters dismissed are being used
daily from the White House briefing room.

So if you’re wondering how the rest of the country ended up having to
listen to Karoline Leavitt, it’s because New Hampshire proved something
important first: Her extreme ideas don’t hold up when you put them in
front of real voters.

But that hasn’t stopped the MAGA machine from trying. National Republicans
are pouring money into New Hampshire because they think they can break
through and notch a win here to cling to their Senate majority. They’ve
lined up behind John Sununu, an NRSC-backed candidate who will vote with
Donald Trump and MAGA leadership when it matters most. It’s a new
candidate reading from the same old playbook.

I’ve beaten their playbook before by focusing on kitchen-table issues,
standing up for families, and telling the truth. [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260405_1.0LjgVQ&refcode=em20260405-1&t=1004&akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH ]Now I need your help
to do it again. Will you chip in $5 to help us keep this
Senate seat blue and fight on what matters to Granite Staters?

Granite Staters value independence. They reward common sense. And they
don’t like being sold a script written somewhere else.

If you believe New Hampshire should keep leading the way and showing the
rest of the country that MAGA politics don’t work here, I’m asking you to
be a part of our campaign. If Democrats are going to flip the Senate, we
need to win this open race in New Hampshire.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260405_1.0LjgVQ&refcode=em20260405-1&t=1005&akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH ]Will
you chip in to help us keep this Senate seat blue and stop national
Republicans from installing another vote for Trump’s agenda?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260405_1.0LjgVQ&amount=5&refcode=em20260405-1&t=1024&akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH ]Donate $5 »

Thanks for being in this fight with me.

Chris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5930%2E582294%2ENDp9pH

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Scott Presler
subject: I stopped waiting on Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC
body:
Congress debates. We register voters. Here's why that matters more.
| Patriot, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: **We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections.** While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. _And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind._ **I know this because I've lived it.** In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. **That is why Pennsylvania went red.** Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing.
---
[ SPONSOR A STAFFER ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ffe335b5e24a4d34833d15f164da8168&_e=8i04x1qPqei62jX36Y9sxseJqIRMdGo5kfBvzpBZ7FRv7oHoj6AExUOY6Jk3e506M7jjO03RRaLeAG3FQuR7PpsAbMGKyhSC2xtFBiRcSBGn4TGmjqhoQN1RIAyIq7tc3AfFPWDj-EQzHMiF2RoqXAyeW-Ee1h7AtIyzbEEkcRP2sP1yYKgGrmc20jm_c4zCKpby5khcin5O5nWPM4_lEg_mH2N50VytmGzNKvZaEBtXusj81Ssq2epMM6Vrc03UA0TzGof3yR0P0O0zgC4r3oarjAMZSkmrUWO2L_aAFA8iWo7gjuNozpT3Zy7VAfm06YhSwPVMqLos7oSs6wh83Ainqh4hDHRnkU74yyKJtsTqsIcX0n-lMq4TyB9jWvmUIW8gTynpCzTtfdehLWkF4YocLvuxDcudJOokRF0XXuVfQ7DP6EHcO5Z_Y8S6SZ0pA20-IzATYV2uyyqcgRY7970ASP4UyqnTlLr8X-pYiCMX2tqpauFTmNH77cOY0UMRH2jLrrCEN-MyO-rLxnZzeQdk3F06AorsG_0Gdn-MDWRtl0H_U4IhEoSVd_DwgbXRS0kXBylLh5FUYGULc0sU1A%3D%3D)
[ **Right now, I'm asking you to invest in the one election protection strategy that has actually been proven to work.** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ffe335b5e24a4d34833d15f164da8168&_e=8i04x1qPqei62jX36Y9sxseJqIRMdGo5kfBvzpBZ7FRv7oHoj6AExUOY6Jk3e506M7jjO03RRaLeAG3FQuR7PpsAbMGKyhSC2xtFBiRcSBGn4TGmjqhoQN1RIAyIq7tc3AfFPWDj-EQzHMiF2RoqXAyeW-Ee1h7AtIyzbEEkcRP2sP1yYKgGrmc20jm_c4zC2BRtTz58oscbaQaPZvEEcO30VDMweMsY7_bfEq4tkAeMtJcpWAVgTrRdkhGOe11jMXlCeAjZmRmFqMmeWlJ829TCZvMgbYRKX1sdU2df1q7bHXvEYqpk13HiobQoY5COlOb5IvSjditUWH2ck9DUk4f1ugF3UdqdWUZmxAlvdmMjF5acNYWpg8FzeqQpWfvNAFxFE6YFBrkACZwkl_9p0vFhZRgibZZqVMQwqLmS2xxGGsAxwKcHDPlpFDjpVlhNEUReZcNJDx9OmSH_wlKIxLA1v7KgqUpZIq7L7DRy_P_6vcgS0oaIfi_mylslHvwBguwhG-DPqGTXfZfcZjj8uctFzGo2-acaSrHBYsqu52B3My25CboUr9dhlCGfm5BVcU-C81UrjSo37gSq3oLe3A%3D%3D) My team is on the ground in Pennsylvania and preparing for the 2026 midterm elections. We are registering new Republican voters every single day. We are building the infrastructure to chase ballots and knock doors at a scale we've never done before. But I need sponsors to keep my team in the field. [ **Just $15 sponsors a voter registration staffer for an hour. $150 sponsors them for a full day.** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ffe335b5e24a4d34833d15f164da8168&_e=8i04x1qPqei62jX36Y9sxseJqIRMdGo5kfBvzpBZ7FRv7oHoj6AExUOY6Jk3e506M7jjO03RRaLeAG3FQuR7PpsAbMGKyhSC2xtFBiRcSBGn4TGmjqhoQN1RIAyIq7tc3AfFPWDj-EQzHMiF2RoqXAyeW-Ee1h7AtIyzbEEkcRP2sP1yYKgGrmc20jm_c4zCy5otuDyb0OxjfDN7vvev6V1QLpkC2KcVid0YFXg0ltWk3Qfsu-qZaZQnUiLjT-KrOfcm2RaH_LMGME3yb_uNqwPyz4x1x1il5qVEH0Pcpoq1yjRGeQ2iSVVzjamR8SLYrS9QFch3tF54Gj2Jjig6z9a4nqOYAFeGdd-LAarkmJzLr-KS_p8pek6qSwGUtAbsQSjUsWxW8OFEhk3kcid8KknmbIV5eDx1hXy9tQPxqlcnohXjGQgEKuP09pZyEa6-SCM07MrRO5GO0Ap7LkCYeihuNx_bdBaXwk-h8hjYQhEZLIJuX1wBjrk42YT7WBzGv2c3h7gTEr1CE3ty0hJqumLlFj1qjA1GZ4hzUVMYb-b2ev4123p9KXheWrqXjZZ5WP1qhNvCvwd-urrItrFx7w%3D%3D) Whatever you can do makes a real, direct, measurable difference in the number of Republican voters who are registered, mobilized, and ready to vote in 2026. The SAVE America Act debate will resolve itself one way or the other. What's not going to resolve itself is the Democrat ground game — unless we outwork them. I'm on the ground. I'm not stopping. I just need to know you're with me. In Liberty, Scott Presler Founder, Early Vote Action [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ffe335b5e24a4d34833d15f164da8168&_e=8i04x1qPqei62jX36Y9sxseJqIRMdGo5kfBvzpBZ7FRv7oHoj6AExUOY6Jk3e506M7jjO03RRaLeAG3FQuR7PpsAbMGKyhSC2xtFBiRcSBGn4TGmjqhoQN1RIAyIq7tc3AfFPWDj-EQzHMiF2RoqXAyeW-Ee1h7AtIyzbEEkcRP2sP1yYKgGrmc20jm_c4zCNAdAd9YZEFdTzbdDzwndqYMb7xgXxW_2Sa-y_3a0E9L6wkU54-rYYMwuxUgk7OBogdZW6DB3BM41rZ0bAarzW9vNigPY5V5m-UbBJGt0voNcetXqsMPSRSgNpWzlt7-HkHCaqmbQ7GA79m6oWG2rzscJlUHEgI195UrWDkjPykihj2OFBcIU8mkscwxwn4F9fayQXp8DBo0jBPyx95Cvd82QVdU8F6Y2sJX3myHZFzET-NRQV6oINyjardXZNwCJZK0oEhuCxQBhjC-gBe_M3ouVjBF6N54_RDxf-SSe1XBlKQxMH26AD8lKU6PA3wfneKAs-BszXO7om3f78PK3amKCL3luJ4_B-apopFcXf9drpQye7JThJW-bWpm6X2cbQA_Ic63vPq8DXcFw9wOhOQ%3D%3D)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Cannot let the GOP outraise us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
$1 or $100. Anything helps.
Hello Peter,
I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss a key campaign update.
**Michael Whatley, the far-right lobbyist President Trump handpicked to run against me, is gaining ground in the polls.**
Meanwhile, we recently learned that PACs aligned with Trump and the far-right have raised truly massive amounts to spend for the GOP ahead of the midterm elections. Since our race is the key to the U.S. Senate majority, we expect them to direct a lot of it our way.
**[With this in mind, I have to make a humble request for your support now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102465?refcode=em20260405-10265&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10265%2E614464%2EZYm4Ks)**
Peter, I really am grateful every time someone chooses to invest in our work — I know it’s not always easy to decide where to give. There are different campaigns competing for your attention and real-life priorities that determine whether folks are in a position to give.
But a gift of any size — $1, $100, or anything else — would go a long way today.
**[We’re taking on the GOP with grassroots support, but without meeting our fundraising goals, we won’t be able to keep up with far-right spending. In a toss-up race like ours, falling behind could tip the scales against us. Please donate any amount to split between our campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102465?refcode=em20260405-10265&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10265%2E614464%2EZYm4Ks)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102465?refcode=em20260405-10265&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10265%2E614464%2EZYm4Ks)**
I appreciate any help you can provide,
Roy Cooper

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

name: Can I vote?
subject: MAGA election meddling causing mass confusion among key voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Chaos, confusion, and fear is the MAGA plan to hijack elections. Education and information are the antidote.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-gLft8jQuiarPy2zO3cAy9Syi9n9fBTrzqZMr5bm3Lkpv6-pR-x0Qzg-Tj6zWiFNikoHvodOwZie25OvAiPispVVhbSRL8mWAZuJcQfoTa6BsI3uwA5RWtCEOG1mGWNsAgQvHGboq0gLIrpgOPMPGJ7FUA2U1l9ix3rGq-V-FUq0f85ri2HQikzAtx6PDietDs7ZuPuXpqoLtn7yY_EoLJvnF73vmvrnOl926ET3Zmc=&c=fWlFyy3bDSqNUEIYToBOp1qz8iz325nEZzLqMvdnpPw3n8Gl-3DZeQ==&ch=S1AnE3U9yVVJu7R7nCyT_ndb_CfPpp7n5L0zxtvuRffsEE4QLesE8g==)
---
|
Peter,
It's only April and voters are already confused about what they need to vote.
We know this because Defend Our Courts is talking directly with thousands of Wisconsin voters ahead of the April 7 Supreme Court election.
And one issue keeps coming up again and again:
"Do I still qualify to vote?"
That confusion isn't an accident.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-gLft8jQuiarPy2zO3cAy9Syi9n9fBTrzqZMr5bm3Lkpv6-pR-x0Qzg-Tj6zWiFNikoHvodOwZie25OvAiPispVVhbSRL8mWAZuJcQfoTa6BsI3uwA5RWtCEOG1mGWNsAgQvHGboq0gLIrpgOPMPGJ7FUA2U1l9ix3rGq-V-FUq0f85ri2HQikzAtx6PDietDs7ZuPuXpqoLtn7yY_EoLJvnF73vmvrnX5x11X7Dx4U=&c=fWlFyy3bDSqNUEIYToBOp1qz8iz325nEZzLqMvdnpPw3n8Gl-3DZeQ==&ch=S1AnE3U9yVVJu7R7nCyT_ndb_CfPpp7n5L0zxtvuRffsEE4QLesE8g==)
---

For months, the Trump Administration and its allies have been flooding the zone with proposals and threats designed to blur the rules and scare voters:

* A federal takeover of elections

* Strict new ID and citizenship requirements under the SAVE Act

* A national voter eligibility database controlled by the federal government

Whether these policies pass or not, they're already achieving their goal: Chaos. Confusion. Fear.
And when voters are confused, turnout drops:

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-gLft8jQuiarPy2zO3cAy9Syi9n9fBTrzqZMr5bm3Lkpv6-pR-x0Qzg-Tj6zWiFNikoHvodOwZie25OvAiPispVVhbSRL8mWAZuJcQfoTa6BsI3uwA5RWtCEOG1mGWNsAgQvHGboq0gLIrpgOPMPGJ7FUA2U1l9ix3rGq-V-FUq0f85ri2HQikzAtx6PDietDs7ZuPuXpqoLtn7yY_EoLJvnF73vmvrnmDc02DwZRrU=&c=fWlFyy3bDSqNUEIYToBOp1qz8iz325nEZzLqMvdnpPw3n8Gl-3DZeQ==&ch=S1AnE3U9yVVJu7R7nCyT_ndb_CfPpp7n5L0zxtvuRffsEE4QLesE8g==)
---

This is how elections get rigged without changing a single vote. Even in Wisconsin, where strict voter ID laws have been in place for years, voters are now questioning whether they'll be allowed to cast a ballot.
That is exactly what MAGA wants.
Defend Our Courts is cutting through the confusion--educating voters, answering questions, and making sure people understand what's at stake in this election.
But with only 2 days to go, time is running out.
There are still tens of thousands of voters we need to reach before Election Day--voters who are confused, uncertain, and at risk of staying home. That's where you come in:
[Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us cut through the chaos, educate voters, and secure a pro-democracy majority in Wisconsin through 2030? Every dollar helps us reach more voters before it's too late.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-gLft8jQuiarPy2zO3cAy9Syi9n9fBTrzqZMr5bm3Lkpv6-pR-x0Qzg-Tj6zWiFN-q3pDVYGACRxwP7dDmO-b6aO2HY8bNNKMiR058vj4wYTXzJsNcg25rJ-8C-76VRbuu6BtObsvLpfhGJqXfAYqvcPG5LksiK87CZXeDKikU-D2XoQd-0hYJVdMFw5uamUkKLIiiSNoANkSdNnoAoJVRKGOgtIoIwDEN1RIVFyF3hYv2k4THuQp42nO-OnkUYu&c=fWlFyy3bDSqNUEIYToBOp1qz8iz325nEZzLqMvdnpPw3n8Gl-3DZeQ==&ch=S1AnE3U9yVVJu7R7nCyT_ndb_CfPpp7n5L0zxtvuRffsEE4QLesE8g==)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: He’s the most progressive, anti-war Democrat in this race.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In case you missed it, Justice Democrats proudly endorsed veteran and
surgeon Dr. Adam Hamawy in this June’s competitive Democratic primary race
for Congress in New Jersey’s 12th district.

His mission is clear: Fund healthcare, not bombs. Abolish ICE. Unrig our
economy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260405-ah.URE07t&refcode=em20260405-37642&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37642%2E1203867%2EuGWsYd ]A post on X from @joeymdfox: 'News: @JusticeDems, a group closely tied
to Congress’s most prominent progressives, is adding @HamawyForNJ to its
2026 slate. An endorsement that sharpens NJ-12 battle lines and invites
more nat’l attention to a race that’s so far flown under the radar.'

Our endorsement last week helped thrust NJ-12 into the national spotlight,
putting this district at the center of a much larger fight over the future
of the Democratic Party.

What was once a race flying under the radar is now a battleground for
bold, people-first leadership — and for the kind of progressive vision
voters want this party to embrace.

But with that spotlight comes higher stakes. National attention means more
outside money, more outside pressure, and more attempts to hold back the
kind of change that Dr. Adam represents.

Other candidates in this race may call themselves “progressive,” but Dr.
Adam’s unwavering support for Palestinian liberation, opposition to more
forever wars, and clear vision to take on corporate and billionaire greed
stands unmatched. He was one of the few Americans to travel to Gaza and
provide voluntary medical care while witnessing the true devastation of
Israel’s genocide. Meanwhile, one of his top opponents was previously
backed by the Democratic Majority for Israel (DMFI), a Super PAC closely
aligned with AIPAC, just two years ago.

The AIPAC network and Democratic establishment will no doubt try to
install a corporate-backed, pro-war candidate in this seat to maintain the
status quo.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260405-ah.URE07t&refcode=em20260405-37642&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37642%2E1203867%2EuGWsYd ]If we’re going to stop them and send Dr. Adam to Congress, it’s going
to take all of us. Split $5 to his grassroots campaign and
Justice Democrats now to help us win this primary on June 2!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260405-ah.URE07t&refcode=em20260405-37642&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37642%2E1203867%2EuGWsYd ]Contribute $5

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260405-37642-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37642_1203867_uGWsYd&akid=37642%2E1203867%2EuGWsYd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37642%2E1203867%2EuGWsYd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: [URGENT] As we rejoice, do not look away:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e908ba515f14ca583ea0487b0f8f062&_e=0T31g3zK-P6MAwHhh6aQDQUo0uBy6GbDnsYN1Vznrtcs5SaBZXk7_f1W8-4ld6U4Gtnp_SlOPt4B3Yf7u2P0PRyXmNtqBJonrRDjfLABsR13o1Eup1otrWU4G-tSSgRqOHEJJ57PzBmZhFQkmbaFCYOBfbuglrqNmSnxQuxj7aWiMAaAiUw-ig2rsKkfJtfu-fuDiU8LCWvJ83wYek--Ki2SNWAVMIJN0kL8jC0hO6ejYepBe7aqmg5rniZRqphXDdlJtdu1TP58TXEyQUEm60R97X9Kea1Wlpvx5w4wiFJgnmC6D327FSovOEnye5BXXn0ykMlkI9tyGhzT5mkaSiqtaEg_gDM1NTh2ybZNgJsUORoc3-FFmIC3qz25-NfTLz5M8W_QKvMSsSUviuGpJUoIW46MNARXUdNaVof2Inq54sIIvchm95tt2tJTOGUs-3qp24mlMqnbBtlr3EGVfLIK1JeV6Rs1Gfk8C4E9OpRVXxGNB7nevv8GXxKBEW5JC3i9egdXMSfo3vp_JCnuEIKuIbj_MO1Dccs2FtGSfluqB1HkvjVy97hxKr6Pmqev9fxsIrf4H1Hoegf2GH9eWurhftEn7As8kHCRhHas9-Z8VTzpjCm5Gp26AE4lrOAPZcLP2ra75fcrE1gtSaaxSQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0e908ba515f14ca583ea0487b0f8f062&_e=0T31g3zK-P6MAwHhh6aQDQUo0uBy6GbDnsYN1Vznrtcs5SaBZXk7_f1W8-4ld6U4Gtnp_SlOPt4B3Yf7u2P0PRyXmNtqBJonrRDjfLABsR13o1Eup1otrWU4G-tSSgRqOHEJJ57PzBmZhFQkmbaFCYOBfbuglrqNmSnxQuxj7aWiMAaAiUw-ig2rsKkfJtfu-fuDiU8LCWvJ83wYek--KlJdxqdmr6y2259nHt_oIOjaR3qbTqA0AvgXjrfv3hIeg7bfhqJdDopBh-9Q9mU_MtPz13dUy6JXEdi-FBKu3A-OR_pgwgch9sTm4ud9AtCdcooYC-Qh8tI4navNQwkWF0zNmvz3XwVnhSd5xfgCgTb7bCueuhLg9hIt01fvUjfgQoXgTQCYiokm8cyZ_Gb12xu8pI0x1HZjRuz4Zfiz5LwKS-2oiqlAxg0-xqEYhCZiwsWmCass3X9gVToTlOlvpjVhPQP1rsVaBpycRV7E1A0IpCqwI40WT0qR5A6gGVurh2BLnmucQWrgQSfIcT0Kzb_P0VXZqdiW0DSGFnG3juL2JKfYNLryrNLnGMkjMo3CO0nzfEb_Pe6sAblcOFWJRqTQ9geIwlslNiCOYvhQsqQUr-eLeMLAkzAvRRcyfwOSA-tQ8Ntaq8K_o-hDTlxpvg%3D%3D)
---
These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable.

**[Your gift today will fuel our advocacy, amplify their stories, open doors with policymakers, and send a powerful message to the persecuted: You are seen. You are not alone. clean_body: | | | | Peter, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities. Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone. That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness. Across multiple attacks this week, nearly 100 precious souls were killed — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out simply for loving Jesus. The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe. When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph. Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear. These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable. Will you act now? Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church. He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged. In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen President & CEO Save the Persecuted Christians | | Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians Save the Persecuted Christians PO Box 543 Monument, CO 80132 USA

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: A brutal new wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.

| | | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkLvK3DAUhJ9G7mx082ULFSGLIcWmTEpzLB3bAlsyR5KXvH3wwt__3cDAxzfz9zW9wO8-rL_hQGMvP1GaYKaSYQ_4fsOFk-Syq7mueXuXonLGuk7JCo3o-1aLh1SPajODk51A4O1gl2F-DLoHsAvMUrhFC20rb24S17yVnHPVNRyVhqGVYhaL6hRnmpfTQcbU2BgS0gXZX-hDiHeKobHxqHaz5Xwmpn4wOTI5uhggY5PgwrzhiZTQlozObuRT9hBSE2llciRMhQjtTapTCQ7-1Z9taYuUp7M-48nUWPIxZcvU8-efX7L-UmayI7SFyIeVqWemghUZd779vvvU9Uzz9QC_fxTzN5-8jPwfAAD__yhefus)
---
Friend, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkLvK3DAUhJ9G7mx082ULFSGLIcWmTEpzLB3bAlsyR5KXvH3wwt__3cDAxzfz9zW9wO8-rL_hQGMvP1GaYKaSYQ_4fsOFk-Syq7mueXuXonLGuk7JCo3o-1aLh1SPajODk51A4O1gl2F-DLoHsAvMUrhFC20rb24S17yVnHPVNRyVhqGVYhaL6hRnmpfTQcbU2BgS0gXZX-hDiHeKobHxqHaz5Xwmpn4wOTI5uhggY5PgwrzhiZTQlozObuRT9hBSE2llciRMhQjtTapTCQ7-1Z9taYuUp7M-48nUWPIxZcvU8-efX7L-UmayI7SFyIeVqWemghUZd779vvvU9Uzz9QC_fxTzN5-8jPwfAAD__yhefus)
---
These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable.

**[Your gift today will fuel our advocacy, amplify their stories, open doors with policymakers, and send a powerful message to the persecuted: You are seen. You are not alone. The risen Christ stands with you — and so do we.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkLvK3DAUhJ9G7mx082ULFSGLIcWmTEpzLB3bAlsyR5KXvH3wwt__3cDAxzfz9zW9wO8-rL_hQGMvP1GaYKaSYQ_4fsOFk-Syq7mueXuXonLGuk7JCo3o-1aLh1SPajODk51A4O1gl2F-DLoHsAvMUrhFC20rb24S17yVnHPVNRyVhqGVYhaL6hRnmpfTQcbU2BgS0gXZX-hDiHeKobHxqHaz5Xwmpn4wOTI5uhggY5PgwrzhiZTQlozObuRT9hBSE2llciRMhQjtTapTCQ7-1Z9taYuUp7M-48nUWPIxZcvU8-efX7L-UmayI7SFyIeVqWemghUZd779vvvU9Uzz9QC_fxTzN5-8jPwfAAD__yhefus)**

_Will you act now?_ Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church.

He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged.

In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen
President & CEO
Save the Persecuted Christians
---
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkLvK3DAUhJ9G7mx082ULFSGLIcWmTEpzLB3bAlsyR5KXvH3wwt__3cDAxzfz9zW9wO8-rL_hQGMvP1GaYKaSYQ_4fsOFk-Syq7mueXuXonLGuk7JCo3o-1aLh1SPajODk51A4O1gl2F-DLoHsAvMUrhFC20rb24S17yVnHPVNRyVhqGVYhaL6hRnmpfTQcbU2BgS0gXZX-hDiHeKobHxqHaz5Xwmpn4wOTI5uhggY5PgwrzhiZTQlozObuRT9hBSE2llciRMhQjtTapTCQ7-1Z9taYuUp7M-48nUWPIxZcvU8-efX7L-UmayI7SFyIeVqWemghUZd779vvvU9Uzz9QC_fxTzN5-8jPwfAAD__yhefus)

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: I wanted to share an important January 6th update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Peter, this is Zoe Lofgren with a quick but important update:

A federal judge just ruled that Donald Trump does not have immunity for civil claims against his anti-democratic and violence-inciting actions on January 6th, 2021.

Trump and his MAGA allies have spent the last five years relentlessly trying to erase the events of that dark day, so this is a huge step forward in the fight for true accountability.

I was proud to serve on the original January 6th Committee, and I’ve never backed down from Trump’s continuous attempts to distort the facts, spread lies, or pardon insurrectionists.

Now, this lawsuit continues, as does my work to protect our democracy. If you’re with me in this fight, will you donate to my re-election campaign today to help me defend our democracy from far-right extremism?

clean_body: Peter, this is Zoe Lofgren with a quick but important update: A federal judge just ruled that Donald Trump does not have immunity for civil claims against his anti-democratic and violence-inciting actions on January 6th, 2021. Trump and his MAGA allies have spent the last five years relentlessly trying to erase the events of that dark day, so this is a huge step forward in the fight for true accountability. I was proud to serve on the original January 6th Committee, and I’ve never backed down from Trump’s continuous attempts to distort the facts, spread lies, or pardon insurrectionists. Now, this lawsuit continues, as does my work to protect our democracy. If you’re with me in this fight, will you donate to my re-election campaign today to help me defend our democracy from far-right extremism? name: Armageddon
subject: Trump’s Iran war quagmire leaves MAGA with no good options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
As Trump pulls the U.S. deeper into another unstable and dangerous Middle East quagmire, his dark agenda to dismantle free and fair elections at home is at risk.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ab_czKd0RmK-djtfsvwZdmotFf03ZBt-U6Osu0_uYZtOL2bT8erdDWlY7hDNZVbQJrO8jFjy81R3y1W6mqTW2YYG-BfTFb88kAdV8Xe1bzJzzzMsF7vauZc-uhsFMUQ-JMzCJZOXDD-6ivUiMEC7YV19drG5SSiV7vLsKyYS_QAR8Vu62ng2Im0c1tNgzDpG67qgOnbpThwlHxwoSRGtSOQDGmLu7I7p&c=MzA-9byCWigkvwpRtzm0vWGTOlwxIUQbOUd-vVyWE88JwRC3edwdsw==&ch=i-luKoLDJZWKl8O2cCZ-2ChXQ0uGQ7Xhg9rD0-yqMK7attEyDXIIvw==)
---
Peter,
Trump's historic unpopularity and international blunders are complicating MAGA's push to rig the midterm election.
In Florida, the GOP is rapidly descending into chaos as Republican leaders split on how they can gerrymander to net more red seats. Florida is getting hit hard by the fallout of the Iran war and Trump's massive cuts to health care.
The war in Iran has backfired. Gas prices are soaring. The cost for food and other everyday items is poised to skyrocket.
Iran's willingness to fight and to strangle oil exports and other commerce in the Strait of Hormuz caught Trump and his incompetent sycophants in charge of our national security off guard.
The effects of Trump's disastrous decision to attack Iran are being felt worldwide, and our economy looks headed for a recession.
And now, Trump's desperate plea to our allies and European partners to help the U.S. patrol the strait and reopen the crucial waterway for oil tankers and cargo ships has been "rebuffed"--a consequence of his impulsive, go-it-alone decision to follow Israel into endless war.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ab_czKd0RmK-djtfsvwZdmotFf03ZBt-U6Osu0_uYZtOL2bT8erdDWlY7hDNZVbQJrO8jFjy81R3y1W6mqTW2YYG-BfTFb88kAdV8Xe1bzJzzzMsF7vauZc-uhsFMUQ-JMzCJZOXDD-6ivUiMEC7YV19drG5SSiV7vLsKyYS_QAR8Vu62ng2Im0c1tNgzDpG67qgOnbpThx5ybPrDRrDc-YnYvk9QmRX&c=MzA-9byCWigkvwpRtzm0vWGTOlwxIUQbOUd-vVyWE88JwRC3edwdsw==&ch=i-luKoLDJZWKl8O2cCZ-2ChXQ0uGQ7Xhg9rD0-yqMK7attEyDXIIvw==)
---
On top of all of this, our stealth campaign to redistrict blue state Colorado is adding another unexpected wrinkle to what MAGA thought would be an easy path to a permanent majority.
Trump is like a cornered wild animal right now. What he will do next to hold power this midterm and in future elections is anyone's guess -- but we have to prepare for MAGA to unleash Armageddon to stop us from winning while they still can.
[Redrawing CO's maps is an existential threat to Trump's drive for permanent unchecked power. MAGA is coming for us now, and we absolutely need your support at this moment if we are going to pull it off. clean_body: As Trump pulls the U.S. deeper into another unstable and dangerous Middle East quagmire, his dark agenda to dismantle free and fair elections at home is at risk. | | | | | == Peter, Trump's historic unpopularity and international blunders are complicating MAGA's push to rig the midterm election. In Florida, the GOP is rapidly descending into chaos as Republican leaders split on how they can gerrymander to net more red seats. Florida is getting hit hard by the fallout of the Iran war and Trump's massive cuts to health care. The war in Iran has backfired. Gas prices are soaring. The cost for food and other everyday items is poised to skyrocket. Iran's willingness to fight and to strangle oil exports and other commerce in the Strait of Hormuz caught Trump and his incompetent sycophants in charge of our national security off guard. The effects of Trump's disastrous decision to attack Iran are being felt worldwide, and our economy looks headed for a recession. And now, Trump's desperate plea to our allies and European partners to help the U.S. patrol the strait and reopen the crucial waterway for oil tankers and cargo ships has been "rebuffed"--a consequence of his impulsive, go-it-alone decision to follow Israel into endless war. | == On top of all of this, our stealth campaign to redistrict blue state Colorado is adding another unexpected wrinkle to what MAGA thought would be an easy path to a permanent majority. Trump is like a cornered wild animal right now. What he will do next to hold power this midterm and in future elections is anyone's guess -- but we have to prepare for MAGA to unleash Armageddon to stop us from winning while they still can. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == We may have knocked MAGA back on their heels, but the cat is out of the bag now. We have to step up our game right now or risk being annihilated altogether. We’re sorry to be so direct, but with Election Day just _7 MONTHS AWAY_ , we need to make sure we get the momentum going early. If you’re still on the fence, here are 6 reasons why Andrea needs your help to defend her seat:
1. [**The path to a Democratic House majority runs through OR-06.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128862007/612515540/1482048376?refcode=email_040526_6for6&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY4YjI1MS0zMDMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JWxgzpyhbEGtxp_lIbM6rm5WcZjKnMrnSBE2rUL_eY=) Losing Andrea’s seat could guarantee two more years of Republican rule in Washington.

2. [**National Republicans have targeted Andrea’s seat FOR YEARS — and they’re going to do it again this year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128862008/612515541/1482048376?refcode=email_040526_6for6&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY4YjI1MS0zMDMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JWxgzpyhbEGtxp_lIbM6rm5WcZjKnMrnSBE2rUL_eY=) They’ve launched vicious attacks against Andrea in the last two cycles, and with their majority on the line this year, we need to be ready for another round of ruthless attacks.

3. [**This race came down to single digits in the last two elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128862009/612515542/1482048376?refcode=email_040526_6for6&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY4YjI1MS0zMDMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JWxgzpyhbEGtxp_lIbM6rm5WcZjKnMrnSBE2rUL_eY=) There is no doubt this race will be neck and neck again this year, and, as we learned in 2024, we can’t take any election for granted.

4. [**Andrea needs your help to keep fighting Trump’s authoritarian regime in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128862010/612515543/1482048376?refcode=email_040526_6for6&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY4YjI1MS0zMDMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JWxgzpyhbEGtxp_lIbM6rm5WcZjKnMrnSBE2rUL_eY=) She’s fighting hard to bring costs down, expand healthcare access, and protect your voting rights, but that work will only continue if she wins in November.

5. [**Our team is building a powerful grassroots movement, built by everyday, hard-working Oregonians like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128862011/612515544/1482048376?refcode=email_040526_6for6&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY4YjI1MS0zMDMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JWxgzpyhbEGtxp_lIbM6rm5WcZjKnMrnSBE2rUL_eY=) Andrea’s working to make your life better — but she can’t do it alone.

6. [**If everyone who receives this email chips in just $6, we’ll be in a great position to win in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128862012/612515545/1482048376?refcode=email_040526_6for6&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY4YjI1MS0zMDMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JWxgzpyhbEGtxp_lIbM6rm5WcZjKnMrnSBE2rUL_eY=) That’s why we need people like you to chip in today!

subject: She was locked in an attic for months… until this happened
body:
A rescue team changed Kristen’s life. Another mission begins in Phoenix.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8066329/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvMjZiR1R6YnZVTQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDU/LbmNseDFCdFk1Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYWtHU3laS0Vscw/gadLLpg/saq421c2738)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Friend, No one could hear her. A young girl named Kristen was locked in an attic. No windows. No fresh air. No way out. The door was locked from the outside. For months she lived there.
Alone. There was no bathroom.
Just a bucket. No shower. No clean clothes. And the only time she left that attic was when she was sold for sex.
Over. And over. And over. **This is the reality of child trafficking.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ Send help to children waiting ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Millions of children are trapped in exploitation around the world. But Kristen’s story did not end in that attic. One night she knocked on a hotel room door. Her trafficker had arranged and forced her into another “date.” But instead...**she met a rescue team - Freedom Strike Force.** They were working alongside law enforcement to identify victims and traffickers. When Kristen realized she was safe... She collapsed into the arms of one of our female advocates. **Free.** Law enforcement then raided the house where she was held. Traffickers were arrested. Kristen was taken to a safe place. For the first time in months, she had a real bed and a hot meal**.**

**She took the first step toward healing.** **This rescue was possible because people chose to act.**
---
[ Send help to children waiting ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** exists to _stop_ ___the sale_ _of God’s children._ Inspired by the film _Sound of Freedom_ , the Foundation works around the world to **prevent trafficking, support rescue efforts, educate families, raise awareness, and push for stronger laws that protect children.** Our mission is simple. **To stop the sale of God’s children.** And right now we are preparing a new mission, happening in just a few weeks in Phoenix. Our **Freedom Strike Force** partner will train local law enforcement for two days, teaching them how to identify traffickers and victims hidden in plain sight. Then on day three...they go into the field. **Real operations. Real arrests. Real rescues.**
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Children like Kristen are waiting. But these missions cannot happen without support from people who care.
---
[ Send help to children waiting ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
That is why I am reaching out to you today. [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**[Would you consider making your first gift of $30, $60, $130 or whatever you can do right now to help rescue children from trafficking?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your donation today can help:
---
* Train officers to find trafficked children
* Support rescue operations
* Provide food, clothing, and care for survivors
* Help children begin the journey to healing

---
When I first heard the stories of trafficked children, I asked myself a question. _What if it were my child?_ I could not stay silent.
And you do not have to either. **Friend, will you please help rescue the next child today?** Your gift — whatever God places on your heart — will help bring freedom to children still waiting in the dark. **Together we can make sure more children hear the Sound of Freedom.** With gratitude and prayer,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
**P.S.** The cost to staff, equip, and execute a **Freedom Strike Force** **Training Camp** is $25,000. To raise these funds, I need Freedom Fighters like you to rally in support and sponsor this mission.

**Please pray about what you can do to help and donate today.**

clean_body: A rescue team changed Kristen’s life. Another mission begins in Phoenix. | | | | | | GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE | | | Friend, No one could hear her. A young girl named Kristen was locked in an attic. No windows. No fresh air. No way out. The door was locked from the outside. For months she lived there. Alone. There was no bathroom. Just a bucket. No shower. No clean clothes. And the only time she left that attic was when she was sold for sex. Over. And over. And over. This is the reality of child trafficking. Millions of children are trapped in exploitation around the world. But Kristen’s story did not end in that attic. One night she knocked on a hotel room door. Her trafficker had arranged and forced her into another “date.” But instead...she met a rescue team - Freedom Strike Force. They were working alongside law enforcement to identify victims and traffickers. When Kristen realized she was safe... She collapsed into the arms of one of our female advocates. Free. Law enforcement then raided the house where she was held. Traffickers were arrested. Kristen was taken to a safe place. For the first time in months, she had a real bed and a hot meal. She took the first step toward healing. This rescue was possible because people chose to act. The Sound of Freedom Foundation exists to stop _the sale of God’s children. Inspired by the film Sound of Freedom , the Foundation works around the world to prevent trafficking, support rescue efforts, educate families, raise awareness, and push for stronger laws that protect children. Our mission is simple. To stop the sale of God’s children. And right now we are preparing a new mission, happening in just a few weeks in Phoenix. Our Freedom Strike Force partner will train local law enforcement for two days, teaching them how to identify traffickers and victims hidden in plain sight. Then on day three...they go into the field. Real operations. Real arrests. Real rescues. | | | | | Children like Kristen are waiting. But these missions cannot happen without support from people who care. That is why I am reaching out to you today. Your donation today can help: Train officers to find trafficked children Support rescue operations Provide food, clothing, and care for survivors Help children begin the journey to healing When I first heard the stories of trafficked children, I asked myself a question. What if it were my child? I could not stay silent. And you do not have to either. Friend, will you please help rescue the next child today? Your gift — whatever God places on your heart — will help bring freedom to children still waiting in the dark. Together we can make sure more children hear the Sound of Freedom. With gratitude and prayer, Eduardo Verástegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation P.S. The cost to staff, equip, and execute a Freedom Strike Force Training Camp is $25,000. To raise these funds, I need Freedom Fighters like you to rally in support and sponsor this mission. Please pray about what you can do to help and donate today. 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

body:
Will you take our priorities survey today?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=938%2E124072%2ETgIlFe)
| | | |
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8477?zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=8&akid=938%2E124072%2ETgIlFe)
Peter,
Right now, there’s a fundamental disconnect between what most folks want – good schools, good jobs, and safety and security for their families – and the chaos and dysfunction coming out of Washington, DC. We have to change that.
Roy is in this fight to bring some North Carolina common sense to the U.S. Senate, and he’s building a grassroots campaign where your voice is front and center.
Roy wishes he could meet with every member of this team for a cup of coffee and to hear from you directly. **Since that’s not possible, sharing your input in our priorities survey is the next-best thing.**
**[_Will you let Roy know what issues matter most to you in this election? He’s relying on your critical insights to flip this seat, take back the Senate and ensure our government is truly powered by the people._](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8477?zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=9&akid=938%2E124072%2ETgIlFe)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8477?zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=10&akid=938%2E124072%2ETgIlFe)

Thank you,
Team Cooper

[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=938%2E124072%2ETgIlFe)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=938%2E124072%2ETgIlFe)_**

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Get a call from me →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I count on grassroots supporters like you to keep me competitive in this race.
Dear Peter,
Grassroots supporters like you are what power this campaign, and I want to say thank you.
I’ll be calling a few people who donate any amount through this email. Chip in any amount through this link today for a chance to get added to my call list!
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260405_2_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260405_2_ak.ymTOL_&refcode=em20260405-41088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=41088%2E3422442%2EekCh0Y)**
I’m running for governor against candidates with massive financial resources.
One of them is a billionaire self-funding his campaign to the tune of _$112 million_. Others are cashing huge corporate checks and will do their bidding if they win.
I don’t run my campaign that way. I’m a working single mom who doesn’t have millions to spend. And I’ve never taken corporate money because I fight for the people, not corporations.
**I count on grassroots supporters like you chipping in to my campaign instead.** And so far, you’ve helped keep me competitive in this race.
But as we get close to our primary election, this race will only get tougher—and I need to know you’re on my side.
That’s why I’m calling grassroots supporters personally to say thank you for standing with my campaign. Chip in any amount through this link today and you just might get a call from me.
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260405_2_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260405_2_ak.ymTOL_&refcode=em20260405-41088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=41088%2E3422442%2EekCh0Y)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Katie
P.S. Keep your ringers on and look out for an Irvine area code!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41088&t=3&akid=41088%2E3422442%2EekCh0Y)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41088)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41088&t=4&akid=41088%2E3422442%2EekCh0Y)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

body:
Peter,

In some parts of Virginia, turnout is higher in Republican-led areas right now. That tells us MAGA Republicans are showing up early and falling in line behind Donald Trump’s push to tilt the playing field before the midterms.
[**Can you help us fight back and turn the tide on this vote? We need to overcome Republicans’ numbers and their misinformation that is flooding the Commonwealth.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260405_2.hHQlPh&amount=3&refcode=20260405-424&t=4&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)
That’s the bad news.
Here’s the good news: **this election is far from decided.**
Millions of ballots are still left to be cast. Virginia voters still have the power to level the playing field and make sure the 2026 elections are decided by people, not politicians.
But only if we match their energy.
Early voting is already underway. Election Day is April 21. And this race is shaping up to come down to enthusiasm and turnout in these final weeks.
Right now this is the state of the election:
* Turnout is ahead in Republican-held areas
* Some polls show the YES vote trailing, while others show it within reach
* This will come down to who shows up and who gets reached in time

Meanwhile, MAGA-funded misinformation is flooding mailboxes and feeds across the Commonwealth, trying to confuse voters and slow our momentum.
_That’s why we’re going all in._
But here’s the reality: **reaching the voters who will decide this election takes resources, and we’re up against big money trying to block this amendment.**
We cannot afford to fall behind right now. If we’re going to win, we need to expand our outreach, stay on the air, and keep building momentum through Election Day.
[**Will you rush a donation of $3 or whatever you can to help power this final push?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260405_2.hHQlPh&amount=3&refcode=20260405-424&t=5&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260405_2.hHQlPh&amount=3&refcode=20260405-424&t=24&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)**
This is a close election. We always knew it would be. But this moment is a flashing red warning sign, and also an opportunity.
If we act now, if we meet this moment with everything we have, we can still win this and protect fair elections for years to come. Let’s not look back and wonder what more we could have done. **We don’t want to wake up with regrets on April 22.**
Let’s do all we can right now to fight back and win.
Thank you for being with us,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=25&refcode2=424_12592_C_DcaZ&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=27&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=424%2E12592%2EC_DcaZ)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Should Donald Trump be forced to testify under oath?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
It’s time for him to face accountability
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128863346/612520006/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM5Y2M2MC0zYzMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuB3jfz9UcVOmFSwS8MU3bj_ieavG7C4saCQt2K3s68=)
**[Do you think Donald Trump should be forced to testify under oath before Congress about the Epstein files?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128863347/612520007/12538990?refcode=260405_RG_Trumptestifty-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM5Y2M2MC0zYzMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuB3jfz9UcVOmFSwS8MU3bj_ieavG7C4saCQt2K3s68=&emci=df990cd8-2b31-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=bec9cc60-3c31-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=16877361)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128863348/612520008/12538990?refcode=260405_RG_Trumptestifty-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWM5Y2M2MC0zYzMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuB3jfz9UcVOmFSwS8MU3bj_ieavG7C4saCQt2K3s68=&emci=df990cd8-2b31-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=bec9cc60-3c31-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=16877361)**
Because here’s the reality:
👉 Thousands of documents tied to Jeffrey Epstein have been released.
👉 Donald Trump’s name appears throughout those files — along with records of his past relationship with Epstein.
_**👉 And yet the Trump administration has spent months trying to slow-walk transparency and avoid real accountability.**_
That’s not how oversight works. Congress has the authority — and the responsibility — to investigate misconduct, demand documents, and require testimony under oath when serious questions arise.
No one should be above that process. Not billionaires. Not presidents. And certainly not Donald Trump.

name: Team Hong
subject: "She didn't sugarcoat her words"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
Sustainer Sunday
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260405-2687)
Peter,
Happy Easter! Hope everyone had a great weekend.
For this week's edition of Sustainer Sunday, we've got Jaiden Rosheisen from Beloit.
He walked into one of our campaign events not knowing what to expect, and he walked out knowing exactly who he wanted as his next governor.
* * *
_I was reading about the candidates for the upcoming governor's election here in Wisconsin, and Fran's policies_ _— universal childcare; paid leave for all; fully funded schools by taxing the ultra-wealthy; fairer, cheaper healthcare_ _— caught my eye. There happened to be a campaign event that week in Beloit, so I decided I'd go._
_Just from hearing her speak once, I instantly knew this was who I wanted to be the next governor of my state. Her personality was so different from any candidate I'd listened to before. She was so passionate and straightforward — she didn't sugarcoat her words. She just said it how it needed to be said._
_After the event, I wanted to meet Fran, but when I spoke to her, I was really nervous. I have Asperger's, and social interactions are hard for me. But Fran was patient with me and helped me calm down. That's when I knew she had my full support._
_I love the issues she wants to progress on — legalizing cannabis, raising the minimum wage, ensuring rights for LGBTQ+ people and protecting women's bodily autonomy._
_When I think about the future, I think Fran is our best chance for Wisconsin to become what we all want Wisconsin to be._
**— Jaiden Rosheisen, Beloit**
* * *
This campaign is as much about people as it is about policy, and we're so grateful for supporters like Jaiden.
We don't have big-money donors funding mailers and media buys — but we do have a movement built on real, human connection.
And maybe that's why it feels so different.
**[Our Sustainer Sunday goal is 50 new monthly donors by the end of April.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260405.LiczRW&refcode=em20260405-2687&t=1&akid=2687%2E105371%2EqFhQvF) **
******[Will you become one of them today?](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260405.LiczRW&refcode=em20260405-2687&t=2&akid=2687%2E105371%2EqFhQvF)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260405.LiczRW&amount=5&refcode=em20260405-2687&t=21&akid=2687%2E105371%2EqFhQvF)**
With gratitude,
Team Hong
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_fh_footer?refcode=em20260405-2687&t=22&refcode2=2687_105371_qFhQvF&akid=2687%2E105371%2EqFhQvF)**
---
Email us: [info@francescahong.com](mailto:info@francescahong.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most powerful tools that grassroots campaigns like ours have to reach everyday people across Wisconsin and beyond, so thank you for reading to the end.
The more people who engage with our emails, the more likely we’ll go straight to your inbox. For a free and easy way to help our campaign, please [click this link to our website](https://francescahong.com/) after you finish reading our emails.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=2687%2E105371%2EqFhQvF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.francescahong.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2687%2E105371%2EqFhQvF)

Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong

# [Easter Bombs](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/04/05/easter-bombs/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on April 5, 2026
---
| **District Round-up 04.05.26**
---
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=a262ba82ba8141ca9cbf252799c59f908cfdd7111a0198b94e500aea411b9b55&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=cd92164ec179ca12dc104f715ea2d69f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc)**
---
| Happy Easter, But Not Really
---
| |
---
While the Christian world celebrates a holiday rooted in the life, death, and resurrection of their Lord and Savior, and the Jewish people celebrate the Passover of God’s mercy, our current U.S. President threatens to bomb the power plants and bridges of Iran in hate-filled social media posts.
---
Meanwhile, our current U.S. Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, does nothing, says nothing about his golden idol’s proposed war crimes. Neither Joyce, nor Trump, recognize their own hypocrisy of claiming to be Christian, yet calling for violence against neighbors. Their pseudo Christianity is stomach-turning, yet reflective of the Christian nationalism that has taken root in our nation. They are there because our neighbors chose to love hate rather than people who are different from them.
---
We face these uncomfortable truths every single day, but remain in this fight for our nation’s soul because we love our country, and I pray that one day, our neighbors will eventually see the light, not dropped from B-2 bombers, but from within.
---
Please spread the word of my campaign so that they know they have a real choice in leadership and representation.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e611bd2ec196848b4cf4b2d024bc562081ef3e213b538cc41046e200625ece4c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f31ad8bcdb5fe5fada1bef95dc0527af&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc)!
---
| | **How is This Unlike Nazism**?
---
| |
---
For those who don’t yet understand, we’re at the point when the government is now asking for lists of Jews.
---
“While we acknowledge the important role of the E.E.O.C. to investigate discrimination, we also have an obligation to protect the rights of our employees,” the university said. “We continue to believe that requiring Penn to create lists of Jewish faculty and staff, and to provide personal contact information, raises serious privacy and First Amendment concerns.” – University of Pennsylvania
---
Vote our disgraceful representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, out of office.Together, we[ #ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f8e10b01c28d68073b27c7c418bd0fa063cf73592ce6ceeb811c66e4a0e11b22&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a124ea042a8bae8ec90fca2235bc1854&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc) and validate the sacrifices of WW2 veterans.
---
Source: [https://www.phillyvoice.com/penn-jewish-students-staff-information-lawsuit/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=576dd5d22123ceb4fe9bdd0d8516f870739eab9cea0c21842bd731a2cbb488a3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=77e7b33de893100d15154bdc0b089edc&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGhpbGx5dm9pY2UuY29tL3Blbm4tamV3aXNoLXN0dWRlbnRzLXN0YWZmLWluZm9ybWF0aW9uLWxhd3N1aXQv&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc)
---
| **Pesach Sameach to All Who Celebrate!**
---
| |
---
| **Gas Prices Increase**!
---
| |
---|---
Guess what didn’t go down since the last time I posted?
---
Up by 20 cents, actually.
---
You can thank our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, for this increased price of gasoline.
---
Vote for me, Beth Farnham, to check Trump’s aggressions so Everyday Americans don’t keep paying exorbitant prices for essentials.
---
Together we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=c10aaee358e1b256e4f5cb6a4ca36c4e83d32172ef8cfef9234341725acfbb85&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=19fd50258880e9f4e62407cdb3397db7&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc) and Affordability!
---
| **A Lovely Community Dinner!**
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
Many thanks to Stephanie Auer and her group, Gettysburg Community Dinners, for hosting their “Alice in Wonderland Easter Dinner” on Friday, April 3rd.
---
It was a joyous occasion of egg-dying, egg hunts, spring crafts, and breaking bread together.
---
Campaign Manager, Jack Stansbury, volunteered many hours preparing for the event and led the afternoon egg hunt which the children finished in a matter of minutes. I served pasta.
---
I am so proud to run in a district full of kind people who so willingly give to those in need.
---
May this community spirit continue to bless all involved.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4adac3ac282edf5fd7053da6cfbb5ce10dbfab559cef3b1a0491c82d0b795042&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f5489e75188c265422fd456414e40e91&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc)
---
| **Charity of the Week!**
---
Please donate, if you can, to South Central Community Action Programs (SCCAP)!
---
Beginning in 1965 in order to fight poverty, SCCAP serves local (Adams & Franklin counties) families in need through respect, trust, integrity, and diversity by inviting them to use applicable services like Early Learning Resource Center, Women, Infants, and Children (WIC), @Home in Adams and Franklin Counties, Franklin Together, Weatherization Program, Family Services, Circles, and Shelters, the Gleaning Project, food pantries, and more. Please visit their website:
---
[https://www.sccap.org/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e1334606fc228c9bd7b05d20aee21e77bd9813a2788dadf00f57c052fa1bde9b&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6782&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=84a06aeef020aa4f0847973142ca563c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2NjYXAub3JnLw=&email_id=da6083c216430ddfc6d44600e2bae5fc)
---
|
**Bowl from Empty Bowls Gleaning Project event.**
---
| **Comparing and Contrasting Votes on Legislation**
---
Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison, and why!
---
---
---
| | If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth
---
---

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: An inside look
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Why we actually send these emails
| I’ll be real: your inbox is probably a disaster zone of political emails right now. Most of them are filled with fake "triple-match" deadlines or claims that the world is ending in five minutes. I don’t want to be that guy. I want to tell you exactly where your money goes and why the GOP is so determined to outspend us. The math of modern elections is exhausting. Right now, Donald Trump and the Republican machine have **over $600 million** ready to spend. They are targeting this seat because they know we represent a threat to the status quo. The GOP is going to spend record-breaking amounts to replace me with a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda. They have the billionaires; we have the people. In my last race, special interests outspent us by tens of millions of dollars, and it was still decided by 1%. I think about what a few more organizers or one more week of ads could have done. We can’t leave that to chance this time. Since **we don't take corporate PAC money** , every staffer we hire and every door we knock is funded by people like you. Transparency is the only way we win. I’m asking for your support today, not because the sky is falling, but because we have a job to do, and I can’t do it without you. **[Can you chip in $15 today to help us build the infrastructure we need to win this toss-up race?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-apr26.K8_u48&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_040526_b1_honesty&t=2&akid=6009%2E196590%2EV1hWR-)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=mb-em-fr-apr26.MCM433&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_040526_b1_honesty&t=3&akid=6009%2E196590%2EV1hWR-)

This is the most important email I've ever sent you.

The runoff election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene is coming up in just TWO days.

We're up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, so we've set a mission-critical goal to raise 500 grassroots contributions before our deadline expires in a few hours.

My name is Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat, a Veteran, a Farmer, a father, and a grandfather.

**I'm counting on you to help show Donald Trump and Clay Fuller that we have what it takes to hold them accountable, take back power, and win this seat on April 7th.** **[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Jasmine Clark before midnight to help us meet our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128863460/612520379/1543997949?refcode=260405em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NjYwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGIxOWQ0NC0zZjMxLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RRXhXtb0x25o8DiIlzBPNVuIYMLpcXm-CdWZTuoG108=)**

clean_body: Did everyone forget about this race already??| | | = This is the most important email I've ever sent you. The runoff election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene is coming up in just TWO days. We're up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, so we've set a mission-critical goal to raise 500 grassroots contributions before our deadline expires in a few hours. My name is Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat, a Veteran, a Farmer, a father, and a grandfather. I'm counting on you to help show Donald Trump and Clay Fuller that we have what it takes to hold them accountable, take back power, and win this seat on April 7th. = = Thank you for standing with me, Shawn Harris = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia Jasmine Clark for Georgia 4370 Lawrenceville Hwy #96 Lilburn, GA 30048 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Dead names on voter rolls... Bureaucrats who "forget" to clean them up... Politicians who pretend not to notice...
It's not just incompetent. It's convenient. A messy system benefits the folks who built it.
And when I start pushin' to clean it up, the same crowd gets awfully uncomfortable. Funny how that works.
So here's what we're gonna do:

clean_body: , Quick question for ya: If you need an ID to board a plane...Cash a check...Or rent a dadgum fishing boat... That's what the SAVE Act does. No tricks. No loopholes. No legal mumbo jumbo. Just this: And yet somehow... It's "controversial." Dead names on voter rolls... Bureaucrats who "forget" to clean them up... Politicians who pretend not to notice... It's not just incompetent. It's convenient. A messy system benefits the folks who built it. And when I start pushin' to clean it up, the same crowd gets awfully uncomfortable. Funny how that works. So here's what we're gonna do: not beggin'. We're not whisperin'. We're buildin' a list so big the Senate can't dodge it. Let's make 'em answer. Onwards,Tim Burchett * | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Burchett for Congress PO Box 51345 Knoxville, TN 37950-1345 |
