body:
| | | **BREAKING via CNN:****The U.S. Postal Service could run out of funding _**within a year!**_ **
[](http://go.dscc.org/go/23048?ask=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&akid=23352%2E9716520%2EKQ5NyJ)
**We NEED to know where you stand:**[**Sign on to tell us you support the USPS!**](http://go.dscc.org/go/23048?ask=7&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&akid=23352%2E9716520%2EKQ5NyJ)
| | [ADD MY NAME](http://go.dscc.org/go/23048?ask=7&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&akid=23352%2E9716520%2EKQ5NyJ)
---

For over 50 years, the USPS has diligently delivered our mail and connected our communities.

They've protected our democracy. They've delivered life‐saving **prescriptions** and **Social Security checks.** Our postal workers _always_ get the job done ‐‐ but now, that's all at risk! Trump's failed leadership has dug the USPS into a _massive_ hole, and new reports say **it could run out of money and even HALT mail delivery right as mail‐in ballots are being cast!**

**We've launched an URGENT survey to confirm your support for the USPS, but we don't have your signature recorded.**The deadline is midnight, so please:****

[**Sign on to tell us you support the USPS!**](http://go.dscc.org/go/23048?ask=7&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&akid=23352%2E9716520%2EKQ5NyJ)
| [ADD MY NAME](http://go.dscc.org/go/23048?ask=7&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260405-USPSAlertviaDSCC-USPSFundingSignOntoSupport-Pros-sl1&akid=23352%2E9716520%2EKQ5NyJ)

Trump's failed leadership has dug the USPS into a massive hole, and new reports say it could run out of money and even HALT mail delivery right as mail‐in ballots are being cast! We've launched an URGENT survey to confirm your support for the USPS, but we don't have your signature recorded.The deadline is midnight, so please:** | Thank you for your input, Team DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | ** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Not a scare tactic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260405-1350&t=1&akid=1362%2E294397%2EBfP16Q)
Team,
In the most recent Wisconsin Supreme Court race, more than $50 million was spent by right-wing special interests, with a wave of that money coming in late.
There’s no guarantee it will happen the same way this time.
That’s not a scare tactic. It’s how things have played out before.
**Right-wing special interests and billionaires have shown they’re willing to spend big to try and influence races like this -- especially in the final days.**
That’s why we have to be ready, and with Election Day coming up on Tuesday, there’s no time to wait.
[**Can you chip in $10 or anything you can today to help us stay prepared for whatever comes next?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260405_3_ak.eymkfg&amount=10&refcode=em20260405-1350&t=3&akid=1362%2E294397%2EBfP16Q)

Thank you. Grassroots support is what allows us to respond, reach undecided voters, and make sure we’re not caught off guard if spending ramps up.
-- Team Taylor

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260405-1350&t=23&refcode2=1362_294397_BfP16Q&akid=1362%2E294397%2EBfP16Q)**

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Asking for a bit of your time, not money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
I’m eager to share with you what goes on behind the scenes.
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4386%2E898137%2E8zN5RL)
Growing up, running for office was never on my radar.
But now that I’m here, I’ve learned so much — and I’m eager to share with you what goes on behind the scenes. Whether it’s through a chat over a beer on our brewery tour, AMAs on Instagram, or your inbox, I want you involved in the journey, discovering alongside me how we can make a real impact.
This isn’t your typical email program. I won’t harass you with nonsense like TONIGHT ONLY 6000% MATCH or doom-and-gloom harassment. I want this to be a real dialogue. And conversations go two ways —**so I want to know what you care about.**
This is a team. One of the most important things to me on this team is building trust. I made the decision at the outset of this campaign that we’re not taking any corporate PAC donations, knowing that was going to make it _much_ harder to fundraise.
I’m also not listening to special interests telling us what we should prioritize and how we should build policy. Every policy proposal we’ve rolled out so far has been responsive to what I’ve heard from _you -_ from clamping down on surveillance pricing to keeping our kids safe from Big Tech and our communities safe from gun violence - our agenda is driven by you.
[**My campaign has put together a priorities survey to learn more about what matters most to you. Your voice helps shape our priorities in this critical election year. So, will you take a moment to fill out this survey?**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/survey/2604-issues-survey?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260405_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4386%2E898137%2E8zN5RL)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/survey/2604-issues-survey?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260405_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=4386%2E898137%2E8zN5RL)
---
Thanks for taking the time to respond.
\- Mallory

* * *

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: [URGENT] As we rejoice, do not look away:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
| | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=15895cdd71a24451a503d79bc27bee4b&_e=YN5o7eUjy-Ek-lR99vvFf19xEAy40eT159JYAYZgz2IAQuOTjim9oCb52teM5spFBDqoDuGlFt6XBlYNKZoGNYHq_wzfEXZD0fvFcAqLe1_j_yXNT9fuV8c0wK6rljTn9dlARtaaM_sAewdFomBGcdZlWIIGN-GXHR-UudHwVv6oSbQ9bhkh5Sy15jICTMya2dPUDFJwvhxWKMjKFshJ3B4BSXjzIKx8iv8-Z69tP86tJyMwcuhfUHfzRSvX5Uc8fksA-wi2xP1NHEzv24RvaTRnUMik7FKxlnaTk5KdZxQEC7sWHV4ErtWviXoZatpIOGKKw7SNQIn_wcIiIe3ldhiPRurb0JmHsBFJEpCnla7Cm_RkmoULr4wkJCUyFbL3i5DQmLnSyTSVikBEJnEAMw0JwXEoDclSVrIX6AF-aJGflBZCyv1akFkcmrzyAHIj0_m5X2bXuS9IurEqMEdhii5godUQ1MqT7lMP7eENLvXttG9ChYRVXYFD09DiuM0A47Xx2V3vNQj5rPuAdtZ7jzgwXIH3AN0P7dys37oXoVrMLNiLkNXLVhpeyBGB1ticgVWbOT4tsQH1DxZCV4fcNfZynbgILS1q4iZaLwok9sZtdwIEHEkAaaAfB00mNYLdN8r_xk582YLVLuPGq5YVuQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=15895cdd71a24451a503d79bc27bee4b&_e=YN5o7eUjy-Ek-lR99vvFf19xEAy40eT159JYAYZgz2IAQuOTjim9oCb52teM5spFBDqoDuGlFt6XBlYNKZoGNYHq_wzfEXZD0fvFcAqLe1_j_yXNT9fuV8c0wK6rljTn9dlARtaaM_sAewdFomBGcdZlWIIGN-GXHR-UudHwVv6oSbQ9bhkh5Sy15jICTMya2dPUDFJwvhxWKMjKFshJ3B4BSXjzIKx8iv8-Z69tP85GiyIBuK9Pi4Bzy8QV5Zjd43zU7xATCVeVVJ4ksITq3ye75uDmdkbu___6xCbo1Ql0k4RE8PnnH4Vz_aFX4tpmIoL9WngULCOHhC9_jod9_w6yCyIfHNioK5nIdkYULOi7bqyuxuNOcvL0EmVDDw7ibcrKfKH-21rLBntQxzcNXSY9PhyqT-_5AparyR5UrwRdqbWQbnbGhbXFMQa60J-Y41ndjfCF6pnvoWoIsiwLQMjBoXFd38as-_OoRaYkSMLzsdVuGQe0PDAo1tBBHA3ufKL2Re2Iy7NzCovzPzMrktTczMENZ1RrZtqgvgKNNMdj6vJPJnLjilmRFloGIK7UIJQ-XtjO5NSRgflG6KqVcTtCaOUSnHwt6FcF5_gxyo4UQ2Fs35XaLJNWPzZzh3FzgF0IGry539gdi5cFoBqjPQ%3D%3D)
---
These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable.

**[Your gift today will fuel our advocacy, amplify their stories, open doors with policymakers, and send a powerful message to the persecuted: You are seen. You are not alone. The risen Christ stands with you — and so do we.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=15895cdd71a24451a503d79bc27bee4b&_e=YN5o7eUjy-Ek-lR99vvFf19xEAy40eT159JYAYZgz2IAQuOTjim9oCb52teM5spFBDqoDuGlFt6XBlYNKZoGNYHq_wzfEXZD0fvFcAqLe1_j_yXNT9fuV8c0wK6rljTn9dlARtaaM_sAewdFomBGcdZlWIIGN-GXHR-UudHwVv6oSbQ9bhkh5Sy15jICTMya2dPUDFJwvhxWKMjKFshJ3B4BSXjzIKx8iv8-Z69tP87RX59T1GWDncrPViJvqdXXOcyAqxdnbXibAmMaZ1halgfSKSTsX-Y7ERt2yw25YQUAnV4I9zFs7x5QxnCblzeXyhXnV17b3gRksIq4HdqwPF7IPM7gf5oWnSreOi_tSy2WZiMTiY7h_WXTfiEq1fGuqfhH5FHM1FwJcigvzC2cHZrwFpht7plU3rw8W3hZCQ5IFZSgFP4JEEfZ094i7kKCcFos-Q3D73EJIxg5UL6GlUO1mGn08BMJNr3vkUs6r-Is0nWM3I6flDMTts5aE2XMPnrfaJLZdIip10tp_raUO2L_bdr1AoC6pecPr7muE6gtwYfpF-hsH_Ofio6MBgBi75vqYxNJjZD5nh04k1LKeH1JesfEX2Xbj79GY-yawqs_lbde3zzA3RE_KTrIQYE88a9-aruOaOYvOfHVjFbX4Q%3D%3D)**

_Will you act now?_ Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church.

He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged.

In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen
President & CEO
Save the Persecuted Christians

name: Team Bains
subject: Valadao’s vote for the Big Beautiful Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jasmeet Bains for Congress
body:
Policy is about more than just politics, it’s personal.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128864204/612522997/981257658?refcode=header-img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA5NTk1Y2UtNDUzMS1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K6zXGBVzfYzGU5xtICgNC7Gm--ojajKtLZtzb7Up3e4=)
---
Friend,

When Rep. Valadao voted for Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill, he betrayed our district — and people are feeling the impact. Valadao’s constituents have the highest enrollment rate in California for Medi-Cal, our version of Medicaid. 527,000 people — roughly two thirds of residents — are enrolled in Medi-Cal. 87% of children in the district are enrolled.

* * *
It has already been said that if what occurred in Iran this Easter weekend were the plot of a movie, people would roll their eyes because it would be too on the nose. And yet, a weapons service officer for an F-15, who was shot down on Good Friday, was rescued by American forces come Easter Sunday after intense fighting and complex planning.
The reports stated shortly after the pilot was rescued, the weapons officer was still missing but managed to get to high ground. This provided the U.S. military and intelligence community time to locate him and rush assets to the area. Despite Iranian militias trying to converge on the WSO's position, our air dominance kept the militias at bay. It has been reported the U.S. military was able to establish a temporary airfield in Iran.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b321713-da87-4eb9-98c6-047d75f2f1ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The U.S. says once the WSO was in American hands, several aircraft got stuck in the mud and were unable to lift off from the temporary airfield. Instead of digging them out, more aircraft were sent and everyone was able to evacuate without any U.S. fatalities. In order to prevent the U.S. aircraft from falling into enemy hands, they were destroyed by us with explosives.
To make it crystal clear, if this is indeed how the events played out, this is another humiliating defeat for Iran. Yes, the regime was able to shoot one of our aircraft, but the pilot and the WSO should have been captured since they landed in enemy territory. Instead, not only was the U.S. able to leverage every asset to get our men home, they were able to operate openly and during the day in order to accomplish the mission.
Despite this, the Iranian regime and its sympathizers are trying to twist this humiliation into a "victory."

Naturally, some of the seething is coming from Democrats here at home. Before the WSO was extracted, Senator Tim Kaine (D-Va.) bemoaned War Secretary Pete Hegseth's "no quarter" mentality for our nation's enemies, adding, "we have to hope that Iran follows the humanitarian laws that US leaders now dismiss."

You don't have to agree with President Trump's decision to strike the Iranian regime, but our ability to project power across the world can not be denied... | | | Apr 5| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Help us beat and replace the mainstream media! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today: It has already been said that if what occurred in Iran this Easter weekend were the plot of a movie, people would roll their eyes because it would be too on the nose. And yet, a weapons service officer for an F-15, who was shot down on Good Friday, was rescued by American forces come Easter Sunday after intense fighting and complex planning. The reports stated shortly after the pilot was rescued, the weapons officer was still missing but managed to get to high ground. This provided the U.S. military and intelligence community time to locate him and rush assets to the area. Despite Iranian militias trying to converge on the WSO's position, our air dominance kept the militias at bay. It has been reported the U.S. military was able to establish a temporary airfield in Iran. | | ---|---|--- The U.S. says once the WSO was in American hands, several aircraft got stuck in the mud and were unable to lift off from the temporary airfield. Instead of digging them out, more aircraft were sent and everyone was able to evacuate without any U.S. fatalities. In order to prevent the U.S. aircraft from falling into enemy hands, they were destroyed by us with explosives. To make it crystal clear, if this is indeed how the events played out, this is another humiliating defeat for Iran. Yes, the regime was able to shoot one of our aircraft, but the pilot and the WSO should have been captured since they landed in enemy territory. Instead, not only was the U.S. able to leverage every asset to get our men home, they were able to operate openly and during the day in order to accomplish the mission. Despite this, the Iranian regime and its sympathizers are trying to twist this humiliation into a "victory." We can 't do it without your help! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today: "We are witnessing the greatest humiliation of the US military since Vietnam, and this will be Trump's legacy! Another hundreds of millions fighter plane downed by Iran," one user claimed. The Iranian embassy in India posted a video of the wreckage we created and said, "Welcome to hell." "Lose all this to rescue 1 pilot and call it your greatest military success of all time," one user based in Poland stated." Guys will literally be complete losers but say 'hey, we behaved like heroes, you can't understand that.'" Naturally, some of the seething is coming from Democrats here at home. Before the WSO was extracted, Senator Tim Kaine (D-Va.) bemoaned War Secretary Pete Hegseth's "no quarter" mentality for our nation's enemies, adding, "we have to hope that Iran follows the humanitarian laws that US leaders now dismiss." At the time of writing this piece, Kaine has not posted in celebration of the operation's outcome from the same account. It is telling that our enemies can only point to the dollar amount of destroyed equipment. Sure, it sucks we lost some stuff, but we were able to show the world just how dominant the U.S. is in Iran. You don't have to agree with President Trump's decision to strike the Iranian regime, but our ability to project power across the world can not be denied. | | POLL Do you stand with President Trump in the fight against Iran? | ? ? ? I’m Shawn Harris — a retired Army Brigadier General, a Marine, and a farmer — and I’m running to replace chaos with serious leadership in MTG’s district.
